With the help of you and this grassroots team, we made history last November – flipping four chambers, adding three new Democratic trifectas, and defending every single majority. **But we can’t take our foot off the gas now – the stakes are too high.**
State Democrats are facing _nearly a dozen_ special elections over the next two months – some of which are vital for Democratic control – and the Virginia House and Senate are in play this November.
**Electing Democratic leaders who will support President Biden’s agenda in statehouses across the country is _critical_ to building a better future in your state. But it’s up to grassroots supporters like you to own a piece of this fight and give state Democrats the resources they need to go toe-to-toe against their Republican opponents. **
As an official member, you’ll be at the forefront of the fight to defeat extremist state Republicans, helping elect Democrats who will work to secure a progressive future in your state. **So can we count you in?**

](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxdkF9rgzAUxT9NfFPyx0T74MM21w4Ge9hgrE8lJjc1xRibaqXfflG6MQbhQn7n3JvcAxURBdtQQhlOdCWFNKATW1EcASEFppgwknHIWQmwwaXhgkODcgxO2i6TZJYheO8y5V3SVliXhW6MVIJjw1nZEMJJnpcyVxtpcpx0VTuOwwWxB0S38ZgAoL2b5ajaLMD1GgdFHMCBayCkJ5F6h9h2Gt3h4qegALH6rzoHiqhYZAfaTtFby-ZOlHSDtMc-Mrcw6fzUj_FG-Y_D9yOsqFddWqiXXVM-f_DPKB_6zuoo_IOt1fH3df0uTPiKO4dKD7PtOnsRRYzluMayhBHf7qy5Vah4RJSubZSue9PzfnZhOrnXXXrc79KzeHN8EelTrONtgF_nfUi2pr3Qov4GuMeHJA) I hope you enjoyed a wonderful Christmas and New Year with your family and friends.

**At this time, I can’t help but think of my client, Marine combat veteran Jesus Rivera, and the other January 6 Peaceful Protesters who’ve been thrown to the wolves.**

Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren’t allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church.

**If they celebrated, they did it as political prisoners who prayed and sang...while hoping that the guards wouldn’t show up and beat them again.**

You and I know they’re being railroaded for just exercising their Constitutionally protected rights that day at the Capitol building.

Jesus Rivera didn’t even protest. He just shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida. He entered the Capitol peacefully like many other patriots that day.

But Jesus has been sentenced to eight months in federal prison anyway.

Disabled Marine veteran Zach Rehl protested peacefully, but he’s been held without bail and the VA cut off his disability payments.

As you know, other January 6 peaceful protesters have been driven to such desperation by the abuse and torture they endure, that over 30 of them begged to get transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba!

**Many of these jailed patriots haven’t held or even seen their families in a year or more...some, like prisoner Peter Stager, have been jailed for over 600 days.**

That’s why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.**

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court.

I’m suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray.

name: Paul  Bud  Haedike, American Veterans Center
subject: D-Day from a paratrooper who was there
body:
| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6dc48eb097b94e5f847326eadbe5967b&_e=_QzJH29LiRqwQ2X8c7382H--XsmzuNyN4g_ZZL7ufPPAT1tmLJ0-xdtG9JBVRJHZZwFKBF74Me4PQyRh9r5gsWnLlv5VbhR0mzRG1_34Wxus6txRgDkb-qt3TVZdm1sc9wAujHWVa8lO4qIdTogsl3AbfryGcRA7xqLJ9fAbefypwv-h_7chNB2h3Frb53UNR_LptiRY2zRoE15C_4YW2JdKL3uBhzvadCCW9ge0I8UsaIlELGUUptFOdRahQh6I5kVx3i_ocP282kfQd_NaCbONBwv13zGrUFl-pgid-Qk%3D)
---
Fellow American, My plane was shot down by the Germans in my first combat mission in World War II. Our rookie B-17 crew was in "Tail End Charlie," which is what we called the last plane in the formation to pass over the target. The Germans had zeroed in on us with 88 millimeter cannons -- which could fire five miles up -- and they hit our number one and number two engine. A B-17 is not made to stay up on two engines. But with skill, determination, and good fortune, we crash-landed in Belgium just over the Nazi lines. Five days later, we were rescued ... and I went on to fly 22 more missions.
---
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6dc48eb097b94e5f847326eadbe5967b&_e=_QzJH29LiRqwQ2X8c7382H--XsmzuNyN4g_ZZL7ufPPAT1tmLJ0-xdtG9JBVRJHZZwFKBF74Me4PQyRh9r5gsWnLlv5VbhR0mzRG1_34Wxus6txRgDkb-qt3TVZdm1sc9wAujHWVa8lO4qIdTogslwg5gllqSVlgI6aNtIXZjMD7OU0AliDcM7Nys9ZyYlLWChysC-gLgJMGLMz_6o3bjmytGJawnvMX1TezBt91AKQxihPuJ_Khy6QvuAJphlCgQkmuteKGceT_hz73dGUJGPlfn_Pk8sWfW4jk4SlZDKc%3D)
---
_Above: The American Veterans Center recorded and released a 30-minute video documentary with me about my service in World War II._
---
**A few years ago, my friends at the American Veterans Center invited me to record a video documentary about my experience in World War II.** I was proud to share my story with the American Veterans Center (AVC), both to honor the memories of the brave men I served with and to pass on our hard-fought lessons to the next generation. Right now, the American Veterans Center is working around the clock to interview and record as many video documentaries as possible with World War II veterans like me. [**May I ask you to chip in $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more today to help fund the American Veterans Center** '**s critical video documentary project? As a non-profit, AVC depends on the contributions of patriotic Americans like you.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6dc48eb097b94e5f847326eadbe5967b&_e=_QzJH29LiRqwQ2X8c7382H--XsmzuNyN4g_ZZL7ufPPAT1tmLJ0-xdtG9JBVRJHZZwFKBF74Me4PQyRh9r5gsWnLlv5VbhR0mzRG1_34Wxus6txRgDkb-qt3TVZdm1sc9wAujHWVa8lO4qIdTogsl6sE7E7OC3ojQCaJaFMQ6CWckI7ju67v-4vXziEdezN8zCtU5NZrvCiwb-9i-eCShW8nAlVQNigFktC0QRYJ_DxQi9VigpqfH-t9_XOxBKET5xI_H42oz2G-PuH_vEPNQjISjKkoENBIPQ4zZQNXu5g%3D)
---
[Help the American Veterans Center](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6dc48eb097b94e5f847326eadbe5967b&_e=_QzJH29LiRqwQ2X8c7382H--XsmzuNyN4g_ZZL7ufPPAT1tmLJ0-xdtG9JBVRJHZZwFKBF74Me4PQyRh9r5gsWnLlv5VbhR0mzRG1_34Wxus6txRgDkb-qt3TVZdm1sc9wAujHWVa8lO4qIdTogsl3yH0JX3HvWm0CNuDrv--aHFWkF2RReSssW5oI7XIqY8Od8drDDwhdeeIJUMAAMwq6iVCOGSv9A05TLt2D3MbrU8MUZOfZI9Kk4ucdE5HHYV7vlW4XmZMnSNJR38SrhuFGT5-v_RqJX-81b6KUq8BlM%3D)
---
When the American Veterans Center records video documentaries with veterans like me:
• The experienced AVC video team coordinates travel plans with the veteran and his or her family. Oftentimes, AVC will even send out their staff to veterans' homes - of course, at no cost to the veteran.

• AVC records a beautiful, professional-quality video documentary that lets veterans tell their own stories in their own words. A keepsake copy is also given to the veteran and their family to enjoy. • AVC makes available - for free! - these powerful video documentaries to be used as part of our shared American history. These videos reach millions on YouTube and have been used by the Library of Congress, presidential museums, and award-winning films. [**Can I count on you to help the American Veterans Center record even more video documentaries with your gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more today? Your gift is urgently needed for AVC to continue their efforts.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6dc48eb097b94e5f847326eadbe5967b&_e=_QzJH29LiRqwQ2X8c7382H--XsmzuNyN4g_ZZL7ufPPAT1tmLJ0-xdtG9JBVRJHZZwFKBF74Me4PQyRh9r5gsWnLlv5VbhR0mzRG1_34Wxus6txRgDkb-qt3TVZdm1sc9wAujHWVa8lO4qIdTogslwBby4iFLG6ORdgP6r4xsi8cnQB-o4_WfDPmq3hkWil9xKGmxMa0HcDwmy9IXSbyPkeidlM_bMAx8dx0HhbGe9txNY0AgXZDlnEMy_8Kth2SRpOhWnpzBp5rKTmNxO2NavLSZ7TEQrM2qvWEN_nmz6o%3D)
---
[Help the American Veterans Center](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6dc48eb097b94e5f847326eadbe5967b&_e=_QzJH29LiRqwQ2X8c7382H--XsmzuNyN4g_ZZL7ufPPAT1tmLJ0-xdtG9JBVRJHZZwFKBF74Me4PQyRh9r5gsWnLlv5VbhR0mzRG1_34Wxus6txRgDkb-qt3TVZdm1sc9wAujHWVa8lO4qIdTogsl0NOHVyqhovs3Fd3M9VpCUeM75zdzLmyPWZWCZGNS1h-B6okH-lMVLCl3ZnVldYEMbmofF5Zsi9w_ljpt3bzp8IcCEcCAXXyWUhr-6wbwfkmB5xWqU5aQTlD5g7Ovr5nBU378NMT5K2IKaHqQ97ZjMA%3D)
---
The history books will teach you the facts, but only the servicemen and women of World War II can tell you what it was really like. In the beginning of the war, they said if a guy flew six or eight missions, he was on borrowed time. There were many men who served with me who didn't come home. They didn't get to be husbands, didn't get to be dads, and none of them got to be grandfathers -- which you can't understand until you reach that point in your own life. _Thanks to the American Veterans Center, and generous Americans like you who made my video documentary possible, my story, and the story of the young men in the Eighth Air Force, has entered our shared American history._ [**To help preserve the legacy of more World War II veterans like me, please make your most generous gift to the American Veterans Center today.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6dc48eb097b94e5f847326eadbe5967b&_e=_QzJH29LiRqwQ2X8c7382H--XsmzuNyN4g_ZZL7ufPPAT1tmLJ0-xdtG9JBVRJHZZwFKBF74Me4PQyRh9r5gsWnLlv5VbhR0mzRG1_34Wxus6txRgDkb-qt3TVZdm1sc9wAujHWVa8lO4qIdTogslzBlCk0s7QHVa5xOZp8aE3RnPtMgkjk118ttjhYaCksS_KvUk14DsZdZca0LN2Q_sVe1qZFVY7h1cF6tnbt90vrGHtA5cIPLZank4we0MGqjyOfFbD7JIsqQsE79s_hvFzZHNOTt6T7WiDZUn3te16A%3D) I understand first-hand what good, important work the American Veterans Center does - and why their mission to record video documentaries with more veterans like me is so urgent. [**That** '**s why I** '**m asking for your support of the American Veterans Center today.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6dc48eb097b94e5f847326eadbe5967b&_e=_QzJH29LiRqwQ2X8c7382H--XsmzuNyN4g_ZZL7ufPPAT1tmLJ0-xdtG9JBVRJHZZwFKBF74Me4PQyRh9r5gsWnLlv5VbhR0mzRG1_34Wxus6txRgDkb-qt3TVZdm1sc9wAujHWVa8lO4qIdTogsl9NUTQ0889FhtQcAkA0ilH1wDS_7tpckgYYuP-eaAXFIcJ2s8aTcXLHAwwv275aPxDHcxMGmvPwqdnJBfvWc1urYB_SxP4TTD3CP0pA-0C7Jh9REteoXDcIQaRFWd23NffTtFQK3Lt2ECfyBWFTo0HI%3D) Thank you,
---
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6dc48eb097b94e5f847326eadbe5967b&_e=_QzJH29LiRqwQ2X8c7382H--XsmzuNyN4g_ZZL7ufPPAT1tmLJ0-xdtG9JBVRJHZZwFKBF74Me4PQyRh9r5gsWnLlv5VbhR0mzRG1_34Wxus6txRgDkb-qt3TVZdm1sc9wAujHWVa8lO4qIdTogsl5xlbFZhG8A9ro0bVJVJrgWjeCesjcYochYwDZX9B23Cv4ijJR9cnyPkEisLiAi4S5zPK3KysFPTHA4Fc1RCKuoFR2NUNQerD48ftiu2kbnMSPGmOV39XUWs2LlpUmPHK0UZ5l17mr_QI2RND2lqtG0%3D)
---
Paul "Bud" Haedike World War II Veteran For the American Veterans Center
---
[Support the American Veterans Center](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6dc48eb097b94e5f847326eadbe5967b&_e=_QzJH29LiRqwQ2X8c7382H--XsmzuNyN4g_ZZL7ufPPAT1tmLJ0-xdtG9JBVRJHZZwFKBF74Me4PQyRh9r5gsWnLlv5VbhR0mzRG1_34Wxus6txRgDkb-qt3TVZdm1sc9wAujHWVa8lO4qIdTogsl3Qc4QtQfgf3EMCSZjNTsVzZw0xvu4kT1fIvI0IL8iZXKMSkUFOzKV46k0avdKEZ4sxe-w-889bifEF-UQju2KDs4LbqVqlA0ERrpX-jMuBVGUtXl42qrBCUF0zOq5bZ9fwJOQxynZO1CH67YiALYg4%3D)

name: James H. Harvey III, American Veterans Center
subject: The first "Top Gun"
body:
| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=2321f3a98c1844c4ae4be537ca46d17a&_e=4MhyJcD6JciUABiqmkrDZPTs7CWqUjp2jWpzgdSK-qG4wfqN8AO5ax58R-hOqhN_0uZ3bhsihshjDUmelgLhxiTC9uGk4VGRohbQ0-deJlVyIVDdKaqkjOhxY_wdgNaz-FS61RQTN3BEKYi7VfXJ8AmxR_U8Eeyc289vK2TDaQ1jBrtJ5h5lZbQJ5adiQIg7QHKqs3LvPxbfz27BLmSbBwCBXNmn54HxW9TjmAL34QI6QkTv00_ovUfUC0s_z3kWlw00xthaKYhgrks1m-r3g1RvxU4iqAxXEP_47lfOBT0%3D)
---

Fellow American,
I was one of the first “Top Guns” of the U.S. Air Force.
In 1949, I was on a small pilot team at the Air Force’s first Fighter Gunnery Meet.
Over multiple days, we competed against other squadrons in dive bombing, skip bombing, rocket firing, panel strafing, and aerial gunnery at 20,000 and 12,000 feet – _and we won_.
But the Air Force listed the 1949 competition winner as “Unknown” for 46 years because our team was composed of Tuskegee Airmen ... and they didn’t want people to know we were so good.
---
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=2321f3a98c1844c4ae4be537ca46d17a&_e=4MhyJcD6JciUABiqmkrDZPTs7CWqUjp2jWpzgdSK-qG4wfqN8AO5ax58R-hOqhN_0uZ3bhsihshjDUmelgLhxiTC9uGk4VGRohbQ0-deJlVyIVDdKaqkjOhxY_wdgNaz-FS61RQTN3BEKYi7VfXJ8DSE_Sfqyu6CZNqsQh_6FZjVJpCA8RUabXQrm20XQq01MSV187fwdR1KTx_n41nNVZM6QCFr1ds7PRcInS3ZqCCOROd7f2fwo3R2_6BVzuKPWBW8p1wlz9sNnxnIG3kHkc44cwt5HdOUO73gK-VGyf0%3D)
---
_Above: My friends at the American Veterans Center recorded a special video documentary about my military service in World War II and the Korean War._
---

**I** ’**m a proud 22-year military veteran who served in World War II and the Korean War with the 33rd Fighter Group, better known as the Tuskegee Airmen.**
In addition to being one of the Air Force’s first “Top Guns,” I was the first African-American combat pilot to fly in Korea, and I went on to fly more than 125 missions there.
I’m proud to share my story of patriotism, service, and hard work with the next generation and to see the Tuskegee Airmen I served with recognized for their skill and bravery – after so many years of stonewalling and silence.
**I truly understand the importance of recording and sharing veterans** ’ **stories so we can honor the men and women who served and inspire young Americans.**
That’s why, when my friends at the American Veterans Center told me they needed to raise more funds to record veterans’ stories – from World War II to today’s Special Forces – I knew that I had to take action.
[**Can I count on you to chip in $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more right now to help support the American Veterans Center** ’**s critical work to honor veterans** ’ **legacies? As a non-profit organization, AVC depends on support from patriotic Americans like you.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=2321f3a98c1844c4ae4be537ca46d17a&_e=4MhyJcD6JciUABiqmkrDZPTs7CWqUjp2jWpzgdSK-qG4wfqN8AO5ax58R-hOqhN_0uZ3bhsihshjDUmelgLhxiTC9uGk4VGRohbQ0-deJlVyIVDdKaqkjOhxY_wdgNaz-FS61RQTN3BEKYi7VfXJ8GIsuzBRHyQaSgGACdm0R-0yBaUH5Z6pSWbZgBi-fTtXzpBLQaszqnQT9Cu-_73Gq9GDFdGn6YHbFgN1EDHHiEROeJnZDWRhG_IIUCR82rbdWRuwYPmj5RM7nTp7aMXH1zGEzl-_Ro1E5gmUsLq44LU%3D)
---
[Support the American Veterans Center](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=2321f3a98c1844c4ae4be537ca46d17a&_e=4MhyJcD6JciUABiqmkrDZPTs7CWqUjp2jWpzgdSK-qG4wfqN8AO5ax58R-hOqhN_0uZ3bhsihshjDUmelgLhxiTC9uGk4VGRohbQ0-deJlVyIVDdKaqkjOhxY_wdgNaz-FS61RQTN3BEKYi7VfXJ8GJhMDgFySFiyjCIVLaC4Rr0ToLUsnzGugDCZ2FrVcsS0hmHDi1A9wpP58MK-9JWoXyPL765aLXvTDwPm8ZRDHm5N8TLdF02i3QIEnpW2-hZ29-eIoNJk711zef6KrYv-oSlSzwQcER5g2vYky-H9T0%3D)
---
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=2321f3a98c1844c4ae4be537ca46d17a&_e=4MhyJcD6JciUABiqmkrDZPTs7CWqUjp2jWpzgdSK-qG4wfqN8AO5ax58R-hOqhN_0uZ3bhsihshjDUmelgLhxiTC9uGk4VGRohbQ0-deJlVyIVDdKaqkjOhxY_wdgNaz-FS61RQTN3BEKYi7VfXJ8AW7glsU8uyuI-JY5vIzvWbKhVfYNO_FCkvjvnSXI-HK0OcY8PasG1Mhv76QbfZ-k_wLYVXtAcfuoeA3nPPwu_voA4Gkw8d1KlY_jM81Fxbqtyr7mQNLDty88WkG9VhbdBWheO69sg9EZFaPRjEYbFY%3D)
---
_Above: I was honored to join AVC_ ’ _s Annual Conference – alongside my fellow Tuskegee Airmen and in the company of hundreds more veterans, students, and military cadets – in Washington, D.C. this year._
---

I was proud to partner with the American Veterans Center for a 37-minute video documentary about my service in World War II and Korea – and also about the Tuskegee Airmen’s long journey to rightful recognition for our skill and service.
**No other group does as much as the American Veterans Center to safeguard our veterans** ’ **legacies and to let our veterans tell their own stories in their own words.**
[**That** ’**s why I** ’**m writing to you today to ask for your support of the American Veterans Center** ’**s critical work. Will you make your most generous tax-deductible gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more today?**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=2321f3a98c1844c4ae4be537ca46d17a&_e=4MhyJcD6JciUABiqmkrDZPTs7CWqUjp2jWpzgdSK-qG4wfqN8AO5ax58R-hOqhN_0uZ3bhsihshjDUmelgLhxiTC9uGk4VGRohbQ0-deJlVyIVDdKaqkjOhxY_wdgNaz-FS61RQTN3BEKYi7VfXJ8JZ1xPOwY_fGB33MsMKSWNpHSrt2WQNkKKh84BgU4hHCWWhcalPoKxg1si-EtMy-vfYqLQt5wKwVFnqxi8v96SPPUECHr6UXFzv8zHMjttQ6ZajiNAP9EB2QrXt45wT9qTJsaCtwTp-WqIbzSkID-IY%3D)
---
[Support the American Veterans Center](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=2321f3a98c1844c4ae4be537ca46d17a&_e=4MhyJcD6JciUABiqmkrDZPTs7CWqUjp2jWpzgdSK-qG4wfqN8AO5ax58R-hOqhN_0uZ3bhsihshjDUmelgLhxiTC9uGk4VGRohbQ0-deJlVyIVDdKaqkjOhxY_wdgNaz-FS61RQTN3BEKYi7VfXJ8GSB-ZGrXhW1N1rZcsbUR4iHgS21ovZA6rq242Ry0cIgJNp5dQuC7NNBE4GqUmA07G8jU06vm7HdgELwaPb5RlZUqnhvskKS1cRn8BB0LbDfUb6pJji2pD9H9rGPZKZVq1lglhUZ9EjNkVkjc3Ts1PQ%3D)
---

As a young man, I stood outside in my yard and looked up as a formation of P-40 Warhawks flew overhead. In that moment, I knew I wanted to become a pilot.
**Today, I hope that my story of serving America – in World War II, in the Korean War, and as one of the first** “**Top Guns” in the Air Force – will similarly inspire the next generation of young people.**
Every year, the American Veterans Center reaches _millions_ of Americans through their video documentaries ... their National Memorial Day Parade ... and their Annual Conference for veterans, students, and military cadets.
[**Will you join me in supporting the American Veterans Center – and helping them reach even more veterans and young people with their powerful programs – and make a gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more right now?**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=2321f3a98c1844c4ae4be537ca46d17a&_e=4MhyJcD6JciUABiqmkrDZPTs7CWqUjp2jWpzgdSK-qG4wfqN8AO5ax58R-hOqhN_0uZ3bhsihshjDUmelgLhxiTC9uGk4VGRohbQ0-deJlVyIVDdKaqkjOhxY_wdgNaz-FS61RQTN3BEKYi7VfXJ8L_UYwrxXALvgGFBZYnGKeUuwxATOS3pmB3p7EdxvJqX-dMT2R5Y7I9Dxq7AL6kyqb1Lqb_oHmcidNjsUiTPoPVihrXeptoxK3RuLVYRZclwNPvxY-zomFV5icsQbWwvKcMhMh_NUDw8-uak5CEzvEo%3D)
---
[Support the American Veterans Center](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=2321f3a98c1844c4ae4be537ca46d17a&_e=4MhyJcD6JciUABiqmkrDZPTs7CWqUjp2jWpzgdSK-qG4wfqN8AO5ax58R-hOqhN_0uZ3bhsihshjDUmelgLhxiTC9uGk4VGRohbQ0-deJlVyIVDdKaqkjOhxY_wdgNaz-FS61RQTN3BEKYi7VfXJ8GhbRoac2zVJ2QOo1bvZNye4iasr-6PRH-CtsgdGp5k9lOprRM0hiPC60WcilvhrzhAR5Ob53my0Hx3c-4s73JcrT_OYMbe6PnYFpYflkSQMSwZmN73vK1hMW1Udvvnn_3ImHR6X0GUikT1xY2nH5Qc%3D)
---

Friend, your support will help the American Veterans Center pass on the lessons of veterans like me – lessons of service, sacrifice, patriotism, duty, and courage.
Thank you for helping the American Veterans Center preserve the stories of American heroes so together we can inspire the next generation.
---
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=2321f3a98c1844c4ae4be537ca46d17a&_e=4MhyJcD6JciUABiqmkrDZPTs7CWqUjp2jWpzgdSK-qG4wfqN8AO5ax58R-hOqhN_0uZ3bhsihshjDUmelgLhxiTC9uGk4VGRohbQ0-deJlVyIVDdKaqkjOhxY_wdgNaz-FS61RQTN3BEKYi7VfXJ8NgYhvcWpP3mmGDl7ms3vuDuXzgiN_otMykr0v4c4CDDRXAWJwbzQelJpdPSe66v3M5z2Zuoli3NR4VcNSz102ZTbcGNFme346FqImLcny_sMY8cLfjDH3fRFFaYeImgAtphCGpucS2PWBsQFEZ-ruU%3D)
---

Lt. Col. James H. Harvey III U.S. Air Force (Ret.) For the American Veterans Center
---
[Support the American Veterans Center](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=2321f3a98c1844c4ae4be537ca46d17a&_e=4MhyJcD6JciUABiqmkrDZPTs7CWqUjp2jWpzgdSK-qG4wfqN8AO5ax58R-hOqhN_0uZ3bhsihshjDUmelgLhxiTC9uGk4VGRohbQ0-deJlVyIVDdKaqkjOhxY_wdgNaz-FS61RQTN3BEKYi7VfXJ8PmtGETch8OK290HZ8kjNyHbZaRKIu2Tu6kS01xO8wgubgSGM4nb08vKUKSQ2IB9X0aaQfk-RGCw14VKqUjdtLw7QWjBcPoHy4ulyGQEq0cOcjl_v_7YoGipUedEverjRgFEemeP8uS1SAWno8sOR4E%3D)
---

subject: Biased Fact-Checker Is Targeting PragerU!
body:
| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9159db0ec90f4715892d1a789ea51996&_e=ZKNk5VpSPVZJXsg2NbRFXV7dv2bKS5Gly3JvQBwFM99RUoT0tUTxaRnuB7wbgquR-s_mYCGLWCvAc3dMjcW86HJy8aHNh3Ih6zvs_0SM0q6eKxISQrNmiLOsnRgC-FSVAQF0Wiz2r2E-Q_AOwTw_y2K1yY5vjTpls6vbUzJofjs_Rh68jrtnut7Hwnr7PTEoOIlHmq_lydhSh5YGx8WXhaZbvS_pUReC63iUkCiuWSoVjYABWg4uGSGGaHG53YqMf7POjul7PPVy08l8DcG5hQ%3D%3D)

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9159db0ec90f4715892d1a789ea51996&_e=ZKNk5VpSPVZJXsg2NbRFXV7dv2bKS5Gly3JvQBwFM99RUoT0tUTxaRnuB7wbgquR-s_mYCGLWCvAc3dMjcW86HJy8aHNh3Ih6zvs_0SM0q6eKxISQrNmiLOsnRgC-FSVD66gOyNveFSd58UPn_S7msNk48IhWN4K_Gs2PI_amQAQe1KxtHYO5vD95cVskky5PCwcNnUr-Km8qawmdLLavJfH9OjCZ1O35Aq09xxDO3rK_Ej2ctrXT3zgioJPSohwc5OTrHwWw-fC3ClqtAgeWQ%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear PragerU Supporter, NewsGuard--one of the largest and most influential "fact-checkers" employed by Big Tech--is targeting PragerU! After labeling PragerU as misinformation, encouraging tech platforms to cancel us, warning users to "proceed with caution" before viewing our content, damaging our reputation, and costing us hundreds of thousands--if not millions--of dollars, NewsGuard refuses to leave us alone.
---
[Support PragerU](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9159db0ec90f4715892d1a789ea51996&_e=ZKNk5VpSPVZJXsg2NbRFXV7dv2bKS5Gly3JvQBwFM99RUoT0tUTxaRnuB7wbgquR-s_mYCGLWCvAc3dMjcW86HJy8aHNh3Ih6zvs_0SM0q6eKxISQrNmiLOsnRgC-FSVAE07YHL262L8PJSKTlUFhENq8E9j1xd9J9mXziJ7UN0M82uo5lsLcyW-U0-CX8pxITIfGXFquFKbd5YeAAWDq10bhlvAduBmvdgsmD9jDpZNQ2BdfKBnRL8E9CiF9WHWb0llMFUSS4ELuovgBwjACg%3D%3D)
---
| | Political and corporate elites empower third-party fact-checkers like NewsGuard to censor companies they don't like--companies like PragerU. Meanwhile, leftist, legacy media companies like the **New York Times** and **NPR** get near-perfect "credibility" ratings. So, who is behind NewsGuard, and why are they controlling what you can and cannot see? NewsGuard is partnered with Big Tech companies (like **Microsoft**), Big Pharma (like the PR firm for **Pfizer** --the maker of the COVID vaccine), government agencies (like the **Department of Defense**), and even national teachers unions (like the **American Federation of Teachers**) "to combat disinformation, especially around COVID-19 and elections" according to the **World Economic Forum.** So, it's no wonder NewsGuard doesn't want open dialogue about COVID-19 and lockdowns.

[**They want to stop PragerU from exposing the truth.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9159db0ec90f4715892d1a789ea51996&_e=ZKNk5VpSPVZJXsg2NbRFXV7dv2bKS5Gly3JvQBwFM99RUoT0tUTxaRnuB7wbgquR-s_mYCGLWCvAc3dMjcW86HJy8aHNh3Ih6zvs_0SM0q6eKxISQrNmiLOsnRgC-FSVEGsFECLnkCkvooSdRqFe6aX7UenA-f5bO6ANagbabL2ngYS3YQmqPgoqGubpXOEx07AmpmjvLAsktOErg2VcLzPt3EW1Bw_CedW9ZF5aafprC6fjBODkCxGEYCkyCTihQqIgDEAAFZNjlYIhehvTJg%3D%3D)
Advisors to NewsGuard include former Directors of the CIA and other government agencies. Their partners, advisors, and staff overwhelmingly support left-wing causes. So, how can NewsGuard claim to be "independent" and call itself "The Internet Trust Tool"? If you've seen any of our videos, you know that PragerU is fiercely committed to the truth. [**But NewsGuard slapped us with a misinformation label just because they don 't want the public to hear what we have to say.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9159db0ec90f4715892d1a789ea51996&_e=ZKNk5VpSPVZJXsg2NbRFXV7dv2bKS5Gly3JvQBwFM99RUoT0tUTxaRnuB7wbgquR-s_mYCGLWCvAc3dMjcW86HJy8aHNh3Ih6zvs_0SM0q6eKxISQrNmiLOsnRgC-FSVaqbyHTVeI5eUU_DjJXyOpk5vT8Sf1UlqD4jhyglY8hNCpjA2_NDUJSNqeY75nw_B1b_IoRP6_fViA5ICjLA7PFvOsk7a6xOd2bq19z7IQ0sdTGYhe6xyg0iw165ZtR9yRP-efIJmhKI7iyAZF4bRMg%3D%3D) Here's just one of many examples of how third-party fact-checkers like NewsGuard are hurting organizations like **PragerU** , **Breitbart** , **The Daily Wire** , and **The Babylon Bee** : The company that used to host our videos, **JW Player** , informed us 18 months ago that they were not willing to work with us anymore. When we asked why, they said we had been blacklisted by NewsGuard and claimed our content was "misleading." Suddenly, we had to devote considerable time and money to find a new video host. Now, NewsGuard is back, threatening to further harm us if we don't comply with their long list of ridiculous demands.
---
[Expose NewsGuard](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9159db0ec90f4715892d1a789ea51996&_e=ZKNk5VpSPVZJXsg2NbRFXV7dv2bKS5Gly3JvQBwFM99RUoT0tUTxaRnuB7wbgquR-s_mYCGLWCvAc3dMjcW86HJy8aHNh3Ih6zvs_0SM0q6eKxISQrNmiLOsnRgC-FSVrOJLI0wFCgSLTZvwMaeeeo0nnbpBsIqZ6GAL2rFT9vG5rjXkcTX6PeJEXWFhj6ZHFXvl5P3YSx95PPkGaMI5wr3JMlWrYjgZde7sfMzdB62v-MH1CDlZo2vRtphKyW4a6h84FY-A_HGZ2RzOsqnI9w%3D%3D)
---
| | We will not let NewsGuard and their cronies get away with this. We're not going to let them suppress free speech, conceal information, and control what you can and cannot see, all while keeping you completely in the dark. There might be severe consequences for us for pushing against NewsGuard. But if we don't do it, who will? clean_body: | | | | | Dear PragerU Supporter, NewsGuard--one of the largest and most influential "fact-checkers" employed by Big Tech--is targeting PragerU! After labeling PragerU as misinformation, encouraging tech platforms to cancel us, warning users to "proceed with caution" before viewing our content, damaging our reputation, and costing us hundreds of thousands--if not millions--of dollars, NewsGuard refuses to leave us alone. | | Political and corporate elites empower third-party fact-checkers like NewsGuard to censor companies they don't like--companies like PragerU. Meanwhile, leftist, legacy media companies like the New York Times and NPR get near-perfect "credibility" ratings. So, who is behind NewsGuard, and why are they controlling what you can and cannot see? NewsGuard is partnered with Big Tech companies (like Microsoft), Big Pharma (like the PR firm for Pfizer --the maker of the COVID vaccine), government agencies (like the Department of Defense), and even national teachers unions (like the American Federation of Teachers) "to combat disinformation, especially around COVID-19 and elections" according to the World Economic Forum. So, it's no wonder NewsGuard doesn't want open dialogue about COVID-19 and lockdowns. Advisors to NewsGuard include former Directors of the CIA and other government agencies. Their partners, advisors, and staff overwhelmingly support left-wing causes. So, how can NewsGuard claim to be "independent" and call itself "The Internet Trust Tool"? If you've seen any of our videos, you know that PragerU is fiercely committed to the truth. Here's just one of many examples of how third-party fact-checkers like NewsGuard are hurting organizations like PragerU , Breitbart , The Daily Wire , and The Babylon Bee : The company that used to host our videos, JW Player , informed us 18 months ago that they were not willing to work with us anymore. When we asked why, they said we had been blacklisted by NewsGuard and claimed our content was "misleading." Suddenly, we had to devote considerable time and money to find a new video host. Now, NewsGuard is back, threatening to further harm us if we don't comply with their long list of ridiculous demands. | | We will not let NewsGuard and their cronies get away with this. We're not going to let them suppress free speech, conceal information, and control what you can and cannot see, all while keeping you completely in the dark. There might be severe consequences for us for pushing against NewsGuard. But if we don't do it, who will? Third-party fact-checkers and their "partners" have all the money and all the power. But we have you. This is David vs. Goliath. We know that God and the truth are on our side and will prevail. But we can't do this alone. We're willing to take the risk. We're putting everything on the line. But we need your help. Please join in the fight and help us. Sincerely, Marissa Streit, PragerU CEO | | | Copyright (C) 2023 PragerU All rights reserved. name: American Veterans Center
subject: Help preserve this veteran's story before his 100th birthday
body:
I have an urgent request -- and since I know you care about our nation's heroes, I wanted to reach out to you right away.
| | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zo8vlt3q9il7c4b5grghjmnrpokiomondq867j0o_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjimcoj2cph2bs)
---
Fellow American, I have an urgent request -- and since I know you care about our nation's heroes, I wanted to reach out to you right away. Jack Nakamura, a World War II veteran of the legendary 442nd Regimental Combat Team, wants to share his story with the American Veterans Center so we can preserve his legacy for the next generation. **_To film, produce, and release a documentary with this World War II hero, the American Veterans Center must urgently raise $1,583._** Will you make a gift to this emergency fundraising campaign right now? >>**[_https://secure.anedot.com/american-veterans-center_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zbtu570ta4ahevieml7n36p7jiopuhs239fgcc20_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjimcoj2cph2bs)** Jack, who will celebrate his 100th birthday in February, is one of the last surviving members of the all-Japanese-American 442nd Regimental Combat Team. In October 1944, the 442nd saved more than 200 American soldiers of the "Lost Battalion" that had been cut off from Allied communications and surrounded by Nazis in the mountains of eastern France. **Today, Jack is one of the few remaining American heroes who can tell this story from first-hand experience --_and I don't want to miss the opportunity to preserve his lessons and experience._** Fellow American, because you're a strong supporter of America's veterans, I'm hoping that I can count on your help for this emergency request before the holiday season. I hope to be in touch soon with updates about our interview with Jack -- because _YOUR_ support is what makes it possible. \-- James Roberts, American Veterans Center
---
[**Support the American Veterans Center**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zjoo61pmpl3tplnfjhrcnkea2t3ls84duog9o4po_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjimcoj2cph2bs)
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. © American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201
---

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Fighting for the lives of the unborn
body:
I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of h
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of human life. Our society has been infected by an anti-life ideology, treating its most vulnerable members as disposable objects. Abortion that was once thought of as a last resort in a medical emergency has become the new normal. Medicine tells us that life begins at the moment of conception. It also tells us when an unborn baby develops a heartbeat, brainwaves, and nervous system. Yet, despite all of this, the unborn are not treated as though they are alive or even human. **As a surgeon, I have operated on infants pre-birth. I can assure you that they are very much alive.** [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zqbqcd262jiusibgoopfcr57kamj63q3crem62o8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjimcoj4c3h2bs)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ Life is a precious gift that has been given to us from our creator. No person is disposable, and every life is precious according to Him. I believe that everyone deserves life, even those who have been denied this right by our society. I believe that together we can make a difference and bring dignity and a voice to the unborn. I also believe that I’m not alone in this belief. I believe that you believe that too. I’ve started working with a group of like-minded individuals who are looking to change our culture. We want to build a society that values life but that takes people like you and I making a commitment. The first step is clearly stating what we believe and what we are willing to do to protect the lives of the unborn. [**Will you join me today and stand up for those who cannot do it for themselves?**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z51kro7ekph98e1cglfjj1tfogbe1o6fltujmkm8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjimcoj4c3h2bs) I’ve created a new pro-life pledge; I’d love your support. Would you read the pledge below to see if you align with our shared goals and are willing to commit to fighting for the lives of the unborn? [https://offers.americancornerstone.org/pro-life-statement/](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z1auv9g5anigfsbl546esvul7kkgt1aip7cvbg48_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjimcoj4c3h2bs) Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---

name: Delegate John McGuire III
subject: Press Release Simplify Home School Process House Bill 1454
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE January 17 th, 2023
McGuire Introduces Bill to Simplify Homeschool Process RICHMOND, VA - Today, Delegate John McGuire announced he is introducing legislation HB 1454 to make it easier for parents to homeschool their children.
This legislation will streamline the notification process for parents who plan to homeschool their children under the Virginia home instruction statute. The bill does not affect the requirement for such a parent to annually provide a description of the home instruction curriculum before the school year begins and evidence of the child's academic progress after the school year ends. Homeschool students are doing very well academically.
---
|
---
| "As Democrats continue their attempts to implement radical left ideologies in our schools, parents have a fundamental right to choose how their children are educated. It's important that parents have options when it comes to educating their children. It is apparent, especially during the Pandemic, a "one size fits all" approach to educating our children does not work. Home schoolers do an incredible job and we should make it easier not harder to do so.
That is why I'm introducing legislation to simplify the homeschool process, allowing parents an easier path to homeschool their children as long as their children meet the necessary requirements set by the state." - Delegate John McGuire, Candidate for Virginia Senate District 10
"This change will simplify the process, not only for parents, but also for superintendents and their staff. It will eliminate unnecessary paperwork, processing time, and the potential for misapplication of the law. It's the results that count, and studies show homeschool students are doing very well academically and socially. When students meet the academic standards set by the statute, homeschooling can continue. This is a reasonable change that will help everyone." - Yvonne Bunn, Home Educators Association of Virginia (HEAV) Director of Government Affairs
You can read the bill text [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014Y7kMQ_h73D-ZEh-3GqPB5sk_ZgpIZ0IcX8xORrssFuMygKsJxM5xNYofwJU007cjReUCkEbYJT4RBBE03ludQUIXGFzyGq1S4OP18K92N3J-BYcmcEvO7eU0GtdSMQDhzgglu1UDfvkIcaEDtmW8idjyfTzjQibn_qE-Runo_vLz4iJaMAbCBYmpZYX320dcyuxt6x-mfg=&c=W3kgxkkmlCBnPrfZIYp1C-VMqxnVwUpjyG1vuAvlQY1WdDN8gGqbgw==&ch=fCo_e_80LHny4zpXn6IggsIcAd3R39-WH1r6D9C1PMYT_hNKhIWwjQ==). ### Contact: [Press@mcguireforvirginia.com](mailto:Press@mcguireforvirginia.com)

clean_body: | | | | | | | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE January 17 th, 2023 McGuire Introduces Bill to Simplify Homeschool Process RICHMOND, VA - Today, Delegate John McGuire announced he is introducing legislation HB 1454 to make it easier for parents to homeschool their children. This legislation will streamline the notification process for parents who plan to homeschool their children under the Virginia home instruction statute. The bill does not affect the requirement for such a parent to annually provide a description of the home instruction curriculum before the school year begins and evidence of the child's academic progress after the school year ends. Homeschool students are doing very well academically. | | "As Democrats continue their attempts to implement radical left ideologies in our schools, parents have a fundamental right to choose how their children are educated. It's important that parents have options when it comes to educating their children. It is apparent, especially during the Pandemic, a "one size fits all" approach to educating our children does not work. Home schoolers do an incredible job and we should make it easier not harder to do so. That is why I'm introducing legislation to simplify the homeschool process, allowing parents an easier path to homeschool their children as long as their children meet the necessary requirements set by the state." - Delegate John McGuire, Candidate for Virginia Senate District 10 "This change will simplify the process, not only for parents, but also for superintendents and their staff. It will eliminate unnecessary paperwork, processing time, and the potential for misapplication of the law. It's the results that count, and studies show homeschool students are doing very well academically and socially. When students meet the academic standards set by the statute, homeschooling can continue. This is a reasonable change that will help everyone." - Yvonne Bunn, Home Educators Association of Virginia (HEAV) Director of Government Affairs You can read the bill text ==. ### Contact: mailto:Press@mcguireforvirginia.com | | | | CBN News Home School Article == | | | | God Bless America, Delegate John McGuire Running for == in 2023 Jesus is my Savior Husband Father Navy SEAL Business Owner Pro-Life Pro-Gun America 1st Family Foundation 100 VCDL 100 NFIB 100 == our Facebook Page Twitter: @JohnMcGuire4VA Instagram: JohnMcGuire4VA Email: john@mcguireforvirginia.com | | == | == | == | == == == | | McGuire for Delegate | Friends of John McGuire, PO Box 168, Manakin Sabot, VA 23103 | | Sent by mailto:john@mcguireforvirginia.com powered by

name: Caitlin O'Dea
subject: KELLY LOEFFLER RELEASES 2022 IMPACT REPORT
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cGU2NwlmIL-cT2FBuc_D9Z3IRQFGLc6ZMuV4bfIkIOnuF50XS8ixmYNbU5VQc_aQgl0FECvPn_Ud4fXpyJ2H9BBTmBDdy766QC6mSZDFcqg9ks7WC11KMt7YTMx0UjrgP2cWna4Bm9hGQXqiKdnx0Q==&c=fzGIWrHjIXPXVIgVkWi3JE8nUD6JWmnAJ82Pom1joUdjzfzYQktHLQ==&ch=slDeElKkbBCre6ckNj_pbAXr_XCNwWHUfTtN2bGXgX91yEEXRjN_PQ==)
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE TUESDAY, JANUARY 17 KELLY LOEFFLER RELEASES 2022 IMPACT REPORT ATLANTA - Today, former U.S. Senator Kelly Loeffler released a [2022 Impact Report](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cGU2NwlmIL-cT2FBuc_D9Z3IRQFGLc6ZMuV4bfIkIOnuF50XS8ixmdaCrXvBAbx4LZCDcfXNTOGVoO6VBTR8j6ie2nIOE0jJZfuwvsvtOgbqG-ce-JBP1LFn88HrAdx6fr0xXIrNsTcPhAISrM5KIRKAVzzdHd2fB5BuWd2EV2wpGhJckcBFmw==&c=fzGIWrHjIXPXVIgVkWi3JE8nUD6JWmnAJ82Pom1joUdjzfzYQktHLQ==&ch=slDeElKkbBCre6ckNj_pbAXr_XCNwWHUfTtN2bGXgX91yEEXRjN_PQ==) highlighting the efforts of two conservative organizations, analyzing the state of Georgia's Republican victories, and presenting further opportunities to grow the conservative movement. The data support her assertion that Georgia remains a red state - but that sustained investment in Republican campaigns, infrastructure, and the ground game are critical for continued success. Loeffler serves as Chairwoman of the conservative voter mobilization group Greater Georgia and was Vice-Chair of Citizens for a Greater Georgia, one of the State Senate's leadership committees. With her multi-million dollar investment in statewide mobilization and issues advocacy, Greater Georgia was able to make more than 2.6 million voter contacts, while Citizens for a Greater Georgia made over 600,000 direct voter contacts at doors and on phones, and millions more impressions through digital, text, television and radio. "Despite national media narratives, 2022 was a record-breaking year for Georgia Republicans. Thanks to sustained and dedicated work on the ground, a commitment to growing the conservative movement, and proven Republican leaders, Georgia is a red state. Now, our focus must shift to building on the infrastructure and momentum - continuing to assess the data and lessons learned from each cycle to expand our margins and grow our tent," said Loeffler. "That work starts now. The state is changing - economically, demographically, and politically - but that change is positive as long as conservatives put in the work. If we continuously adapt to this dynamic environment, then conservatives will have the infrastructure and mobilization needed to succeed in even greater numbers in 2024 and beyond. Elections are about the future. And in the Peach State, now is a crucial moment to commit to protecting the future of our state and our values - because the Left is fully focused on turning our state blue." In 2022, Democrats dramatically outraised Republicans, particularly in the state's marquee races where Republicans' top federal candidate was outspent by $100 million and the top state candidate was outspent by over $30 million. Republicans also faced a changing electorate with growth among young and diverse voters, as well as independent and swing voters - who now comprise 30% of Georgia's electorate. Nonetheless, Republicans won every statewide office from the Governor's race down - and increased their margins of victory compared to 2018. The top Democrat candidate only won 25 counties - four fewer than four years ago. Republicans in the State House and Senate, meanwhile, retained their legislative majorities - in stark contrast to the last midterm election in 2018 when they lost a combined 16 seats. These victories can and should be attributed to three things: first, a renewed commitment to mobilizing on the ground - and direct voter contact - through groups like Citizens for a Greater Georgia. Second, the key role of groups like Greater Georgia and a year-round voter engagement apparatus designed to register voters, expand and diversify the conservative movement, and promote election integrity. And third - but not least - strong conservative candidates at every level, from the top of the ticket on down, who are critical to keeping Georgia as the best state in America to live, work and raise a family.
To read or download the Impact Report, click [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cGU2NwlmIL-cT2FBuc_D9Z3IRQFGLc6ZMuV4bfIkIOnuF50XS8ixmdaCrXvBAbx4LZCDcfXNTOGVoO6VBTR8j6ie2nIOE0jJZfuwvsvtOgbqG-ce-JBP1LFn88HrAdx6fr0xXIrNsTcPhAISrM5KIRKAVzzdHd2fB5BuWd2EV2wpGhJckcBFmw==&c=fzGIWrHjIXPXVIgVkWi3JE8nUD6JWmnAJ82Pom1joUdjzfzYQktHLQ==&ch=slDeElKkbBCre6ckNj_pbAXr_XCNwWHUfTtN2bGXgX91yEEXRjN_PQ==).
### Media Contact: Caitlin O'Dea press@kellyloeffler.com

name: Fair Courts America
subject: BREAKING: new development in the case
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Courts America |
body:
| | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62213525:JmS9bKGNb:m:1:3334294963:AD70AEECF9ACFED8AD8D9B615BA06D5A:r)
---
Peter, Great news: A federal appeals court **BLOCKED** the Biden Adminstration's attempt to **_[force religious doctors and hospitals to provide dangerous "gender-affirming" care](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62213525:JmS9bKGNb:m:1:3334294963:AD70AEECF9ACFED8AD8D9B615BA06D5A:r)_** to people identifying as transgender. This was the second court ruling to push back on the Biden Administration's attempt to force medical providers to violate their deeply held beliefs in the name of leftist ideology. Here's the truth: **Conservatives had some major victories in 2022: **
* Overturning _Roe v. Wade. _
* Blocking OSHA's unconstitutional vaccine mandate.
* And now fighting back on the Biden Administration's push for far-left gender ideology.

You might notice a pattern: **these BIG wins for conservatives keep coming from the courts.**
---
[**SUPPORT CONSERVATIVE COURTS**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62213525:JmS9bKGNb:m:1:3334294963:AD70AEECF9ACFED8AD8D9B615BA06D5A:r)
---
**_[And that's exactly why the Left is focusing its fire on the judiciary in 2023.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62213525:JmS9bKGNb:m:1:3334294963:AD70AEECF9ACFED8AD8D9B615BA06D5A:r)_** They know that the judicial branch has the power to put a stop to the Biden Administration's craziest liberal policies. It drives them INSANE to be kept within the bounds of the Constitution now that we've started fighting back against their judicial activism.
---
[**STAND WITH US**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62213525:JmS9bKGNb:m:1:3334294963:AD70AEECF9ACFED8AD8D9B615BA06D5A:r)
---
As a well-informed conservative, you've heard of judicial activism before -- but too many people think of it as something that happens only at the level of the Supreme Court. body:
Dear Peter,

Liz Cheney, Nancy Pelosi, Adam Kinzinger, and Adam Schiff hid the truth about January 6 under lock and key.

_Those days are over._

But thanks to the conservatives who fought the swamp, you and I won the right to release every second of footage from January 6.

**The new GOP majority will now make all 14,000 hours of video public which will exonerate our patriots.**

**[I hope you take a few moments to watch my interview with Charlie Kirk, where I discuss the vital victory](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61391219:sOv9PEDNB:m:1:2365227053:F64FFDFF94DC6EA3B0709B8E3BE416F9:r).**

Biden threw Trump supporters in a D.C. gulag and smeared America First patriots like you as domestic terrorists.

**But investigating the FEDSURRECTION on January 6 is step one.**

I plan to ensure Americans know the truth about the Gestapo raid on Mar-a-Lago, the Russian collusion hoax, and the FBI targeting parents who protested mask mandates in school as domestic terrorists.

This is what draining the swamp looks like.

**And now that conservatives won the right to investigate the weaponization of the federal government, I cannot wait to get to work by releasing all the footage from January 6.**

**[Please join me by chipping in and supporting the fight to expose the truth about January 6](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61391219:sOv9PEDNB:m:1:2365227053:F64FFDFF94DC6EA3B0709B8E3BE416F9:r).** **[RELEASE THE JAN 6 TAPES

body:
The Supreme Court should see this for what it is -- an attempt to manipulate the system at the expense of voters.
|
---

So here’s the situation -- extreme Republicans in North Carolina have a long history of manipulating maps. But voters keep prevailing in overturning those maps in court.

Since they can’t get their gerrymandered maps approved by the state courts, North Carolina Republicans are resorting to a fringe theory that would take checks and balances out of the equation.

**That’s a huge red flag.**

North Carolina Republicans brought this case to the nation’s highest court because the state supreme court held them accountable for violating the law and stopped them from enacting a gerrymandered map. **The Supreme Court should see this for what it is -- an attempt to manipulate the system at the expense of voters.**

**[The Supreme Court heard arguments on this case last month. Will you chip in $25 as we prepare for the fallout if SCOTUS sides with extreme Republicans over voters?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57415915/387878921/1243905992?amount=25&refcode=20230114_AOTL_F_mvh3resend_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIzMDdhYTNjLTZmOTYtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=owERiwTTJgm-NELOrnUDSsPrR3TQPdKSQWCZOamNX6w=)**

Voters sent a resounding message during the midterm elections -- they do NOT want election deniers in office. But as our movement prevents more and more gerrymandered maps, manipulating elections might be extreme Republicans’ only path to power.

[**That’s why the _Moore v. Harper_ case is so important.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57415922/387878928/1243905992?refcode=20230114_AOTL_F_mvh3resend_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIzMDdhYTNjLTZmOTYtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=owERiwTTJgm-NELOrnUDSsPrR3TQPdKSQWCZOamNX6w=)

North Carolina Republicans brought this case to the nation’s highest court because the state supreme court held them accountable for violating the law and stopped them from enacting a gerrymandered map. The Supreme Court should see this for what it is -- an attempt to manipulate the system at the expense of voters. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Voters sent a resounding message during the midterm elections -- they do NOT want election deniers in office. But as our movement prevents more and more gerrymandered maps, manipulating elections might be extreme Republicans’ only path to power. = We’ll keep you posted as things unfold. \-- Olivia Olivia Mendoza Deputy Director, Litigation and Policy All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. **1.** Experts say that Nevada could once again decide Senate control next year, and they're already calling me one of the most vulnerable Democrats on the ballot.
**2.** During the 2022 midterms, the GOP flooded Nevada with more than**$55 MILLION** to try to defeat Sen. Catherine Cortez Masto. _There's no question that Mitch McConnell and his megadonor allies will spend just as much to defeat me._

name: National Gun Owner
subject: When nature smacks you, it’s time to fight back…
body:
I had my Tactical Balaclava around my neck...
| | | Unsubscribe [here](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/11293/6374453/8227c823ae6c05bc7559e091ec6638eb2326e33b/b4c5c1364d4e922f2468c22f64251f2b810926b5). We'll miss you - so will great opportunities.
To view this email as a webpage, click [here](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/11293/6374453/07c4f76fc501380345ea6aebc9884a7acef35d26/b4c5c1364d4e922f2468c22f64251f2b810926b5?message_id=IjNjN2ViMTUwLTc4YTQtMDEzYi1lNzkyLTQyMDEwYTgwMDAxM0BuYXRpb25hbGd1bm93bmVyLm9yZyI=).
---
| |
---
---
|
---
Greetings friend!

When I left my house this morning, a blast of cool 19 degree wind blasted me in the face, tracing its way around my ears!

Talk about being caught off guard!

Then I realized...

I had my Tactical Balaclava around my neck...

I quickly pulled it up over my head and within seconds I was protected from that nasty NYC winter gust.

Let me tell you...

[Tactical Balaclavas](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/11293/6374453/bc11d2224db6409b570d174af991a56b32d89e49/b4c5c1364d4e922f2468c22f64251f2b810926b5) are an absolute necessity for any outdoor enthusiast.

They’re made of durable, breathable material and designed to protect your head and neck from harsh weather. And they can be worn several different ways, depending on the style you’re going for.

They’re also a solid solution for protection against UV rays, bugs, and other outdoor annoyances.

I love mine and it goes with me almost all the time.

And right now, Gunner Gear has a steal running for the holidays...

[If you buy one balaclava, they’re giving away an additional 3 (THREE) for FREE! ](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/11293/6374453/bc11d2224db6409b570d174af991a56b32d89e49/b4c5c1364d4e922f2468c22f64251f2b810926b5)

That’s unheard of and an untouchable deal!

For real, hurry up before they run out...

With the holidays here, tactical enthusiasts are snagging them up quick!

Don’t lose out, [go here now](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/11293/6374453/bc11d2224db6409b570d174af991a56b32d89e49/b4c5c1364d4e922f2468c22f64251f2b810926b5) and get some for yourself and your friends.

All the best,
---

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: BREAKING: January 6 kangaroo court seals records for 30 to 50 years!
body:
Yes, you read that right, the J6 Kangaroo Court is trying to cover up crucial information that affects you and me, our families, and our fellow Americans, for 30 to 50 YEARS! | | | [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62215207:J1k0uKGNy:m:1:3331421248:CFB6672FC159DFF621DFF586A7A515B2:r)
|

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62215207:J1k0uKGNy:m:1:3331421248:CFB6672FC159DFF621DFF586A7A515B2:r) Dear Peter,

[**Please give any amount IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS and GET THEM JUSTICE.

**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62215207:J1k0uKGNy:m:1:3331421248:CFB6672FC159DFF621DFF586A7A515B2:r) **The lawless January 6 Congressional Committee is trying to conceal its crimes against the Constitution and the American people.** Yahoo News reports:

"House Speaker Nancy Pelosi (D-San Francisco) already named the House Committee on House Administration the custodian of the records. Under current House rules, the committee is obligated to hand over the official records to the House clerk, who transmits them to the National Archives. _The rules also prevent the National Archives from releasing committee records for at least 30 years. Sensitive records, such as those from a major investigation, can be held up to 50 years before being made public. "_

**Yes, you read that right, the J6 Kangaroo Court is trying to cover up crucial information that affects you and me, our families, and our fellow Americans, for 30 to 50 YEARS!

** They want to bury:

\- Videos from police body cameras,

\- Videos from on-site security cameras,

\- Videos from countless smart phones,

\- Emails and texts from federal agencies and law enforcement,

\- And so much more.

Why?

**Because they know that the patriots who protested that day outside the U.S. Capitol building were peaceful.

** They know that the U.S. Capitol Police were warned that Black Lives Matter terrorists would disguise themselves as Trump supporters and cause trouble.

They know that undercover police and federal agents were in the crowd and may have even provoked attacks on police and the Capitol building.

**They know their narrative that patriots took part in a bloody insurrection to overthrow the government is a lie.

** So, they're trying to bury that evidence until everyone they've falsely accused, ruined, browbeat, and everyone who pushed the lying Biden narrative, has died from old age.

**This is an outrageous attack on our Constitution, our rights, and our freedoms, especially in light of the two years of abuse, torture, and injustice January 6 peaceful protesters have endured.

** That's why I ask you to stand with me before it's too late.

**I'm Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.

** I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years.

You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

** I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents, AND WIN!

** And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten criminal regime in court.

I'm suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray.

[**Peter, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of any amount RIGHT NOW.

**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62215207:J1k0uKGNy:m:1:3331421248:CFB6672FC159DFF621DFF586A7A515B2:r) Your best gift today will help me fight for these jailed patriots, bring them justice, and fight for the future of our Great Nation.

[**So please give what you can right away.

**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62215207:J1k0uKGNy:m:1:3331421248:CFB6672FC159DFF621DFF586A7A515B2:r) Thank you so much!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Peter, it's been two years since the fake insurrection on January 6, and the real reign of terror launched by Biden and his lawless FBI and DOJ on Trump supporters and peaceful protesters.**

[**Please help me fight for them in court with your best gift of any amount right away.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62215207:J1k0uKGNy:m:1:3331421248:CFB6672FC159DFF621DFF586A7A515B2:r)

Now we have to ask: _**_Is this man working for Russia??_** [**_Can you join us in giving CREW $5, $10 or $25 to make sure Santos is exposed for charlatan and Russian stooge that he is?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2d46a751-4c9b-4830-9cae-550152c7e519/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _In addition to lies about work, college, even his name(!), and his thievery being investigated in Brazil and the U.S.,_ **_it turns out Santos was not only funded by Andrew Intrater--Russian-American cousin of sanctioned, pal-of-Putin oligarch, Viktor, Veklesberg, but in business with him!_** From the Washington Post: [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4ee78987-7f0d-4ee6-8ea5-e0c0fa90a96a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_This is ludicrous. This man can't sit in the House, where he is being kept around because, Weaker--or Speaker--McCarthy needs him for his vote. He must be removed now. He must be investigated now. _**
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8fc2b9cf-6f60-4c65-a13c-732f3d6db364/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| **_I know of no organization that has exposed GOP corruption in the past--from Jack Abramoff to Trump's Cabinet--like Citizens for Responsible Ethics in Washington (CREW)._** **_It's a simple question: Where did his money come from?_** _How did he go from a guy with no savings in 2020 to flush with a few million in 2022 to give his own campaign $700,000??_ _I think we know the answer. But we need CREW on it to make sure he's investigated and kicked out of Congress for what could amount to treason._ [**_Without CREW on this, or we'll never get this plant out of Congress._** **_Can you join us in giving CREW $5, $10 or $25 to make sure Santos is exposed for charlatan and Russian stooge that he is?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T24eb02ea-5436-4577-a64d-0b701d21cdcb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for staying in the fight for our democracy! Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T47750293-6acf-4981-87fd-31dc3c4fa289/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Trump News HQ
subject: “What happened to my country?”
body:
Our newest online course opens with the question, “What happened to my country?”

| | | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5evv6v7q5kqr2jf9cn5fqctulpumm6dt6e914oo_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjjmco32c9h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Our newest online course opens with the question, "What happened to my country?"

It's a question I've asked myself many times over the last few years as I've read the latest reports on radical gender ideology pushed in our elementary schools, speech squashed by the media and corporate class, basic rights left unprotected in many of our cities, and economic opportunity diminished for millions of Americans.

To understand the source of these radical changes that undermine the rights of American citizens, we've produced the new online course, **" The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism."**
---
| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvfoologb7nhms66be27a5uelopkngmm7lnfve80_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjjmco32c9h2bs)
---
In this course, Dr. Kevin Slack, associate professor of politics at Hillsdale College, traces the transformation of the American left over the last 100 years. You'll learn how post-sixties radicals rejected the midcentury liberalism of Franklin Roosevelt; you'll discover the origins of modern gender ideology, identity politics, and today's global elite; and, you'll explore how these movements overtook America's key institutions.

You can watch the trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/american-left-preregister/](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmhb24m4984s0jouliu6jmslas70qt4n9va9po2o_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjjmco32c9h2bs)**

I hope you'll join us to better understand--and learn how to confront--the woke ideologies that dominate American politics today.
Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Trumptrainnews, [please use this preferences page](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/prefs/9z2zbfvq3cj6eurbqvddbdepbgv3h9vrk10praitk3o).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

You'll learn how post-sixties radicals rejected the midcentury liberalism of Franklin Roosevelt; you'll discover the origins of modern gender ideology, identity politics, and today's global elite; and, you'll explore how these movements overtook America's key institutions.

You can watch the trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/american-left-preregister/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3d5qopapep5toph7r6k42htnqgckt64seos4pn0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjjmcp74chh2bs)**

I hope you'll join us to better understand--and learn how to confront--the woke ideologies that dominate American politics today.
Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

subject: The 5 lies of Critical Race Theory
body:

---
Dear Fellow Conservative, The anti-critical race theory movement is gaining traction both ideologically and politically. And that has progressives both outraged and panicked. They'll do anything they can to stop this movement. Their latest strategy is to distort the truth and mislead the American people so that they can continue to push their Marxist agenda. And they are using their friends in the establishment media and Big Tech to do so. But these lies are being unmasked and exposed by The Heritage Foundation. That's why I'm sending you this email today.
---
| | I'm told that you are an American who is concerned about the levels of indoctrination we've seen from Critical Race Theory--and what that could mean for the future of our country. **So, today,[I want to send you a FREE copy of The Heritage Foundation's latest eBook, ](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z148o14qd0ukp33sqpmnpil6cr8la6u01k4uct8o_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjjm2p35cdh2bs)**[**_The 5 Lies of CRT_****.**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z56svbn156tdpecki948hn71jvs9s2er9hd4h8n8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjjm2p35cdh2bs)

---
| | Inside this important resource, you'll not only learn the 5 lies Progressives have employed in their campaign to push Critical Race Theory, but you'll also discover that:
* None of CRT's policy approaches would help people of any race or national origin.
* All of the biggest names pushing CRT have affirmed that they are promoting Marxism.
* The Left is using CRT to wage a battle royal for the soul of America--and even the West itself.

**You can get instant access to your FREE eBook right now using this secure link:[ https://secured.heritage.org/5lies-of-crt-ebook/](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zrli9gb947g7o4kodn0ku73nuk0cgurljfnolhp0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjjm2p35cdh2bs)** As the Left ramps up their campaign through the power of the media and Big Tech, it is crucial that we inform as many people as possible with the truth about what is really going on. I hope this is a helpful resource for you. Best, Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development, The Heritage Foundation

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: Keith Olbermann Attacked Me On Twitter...
body:
Pseudo-Journalist, Keith Olbermann, attacked me on Twitter last night over my post about Martin Luther King Jr. I am pretty certain that Dr. King wou
| | |
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16868043.9884.1.db45c9e2ff815fb696d3d2ed48de9c00)
---
_Pseudo-Journalist_ , **Keith Olbermann** , attacked me on [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16868043.9885.1.a80f70d81d749b65476dab684e49e6d6) last night over my post about **Martin Luther King Jr**.
I am pretty certain that **Dr. King** would not touch the modern Radical Left of today.
I highly doubt that **Dr. King** would advocate for the **genocide of black babies** in their mother's womb like the Radical Left does.
When you examine the life of **Dr. King** (not a perfect person by any stretch of the means) it would seem he would more align with the **MAGA movement than the godless globalist movement**.
Like MAGA Patriots today, **Dr. King** was under FBI surveillance for his political views.
Like MAGA Patriots today, **Dr. King** was against endless foreign wars (Vietnam then, Ukraine today).
Like MAGA Patriots, **Dr. King** believed that people should not be judged by the color of their skin but by the content of their character.
Like MAGA Patriots, **Dr. King** was a Bible believing Christian.
I think it's safe to say that **Dr. King** would not associate with ideals and political philosophy of the Radical Left.
And... if **Keith Olbermann** disagrees, that is all the more reason to rest assured that **Dr. King would probably be MAGA!**
Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer
Follow me on [TruthSocial](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16868043.9886.1.d7499043701a151e02827dcf3cc66490), [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16868043.9887.1.8fa5db9cc3271013f7abc76dd4c474ad), [Instagram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16868043.9888.1.b9fd62549276294595c7d886152e8f28), [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16868043.9889.1.b8d12cf4cddc7a8efefad775350605e4), [Telegram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16868043.9890.1.f56d12cbca89374e4914ea539dda61e7) & [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16868043.9891.1.e4410d3c7f7f8276f282140a230eb304)).
[www.jacksonlahmeyer.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16868043.9892.1.825c188136466a9c72bf5cba639d63b2)
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16868043.9893.1.0fd50663d6dd06304ca4724b2b0f8007)
---
Recently, **President Donald Trump** sent me a message of thanks over the newly formed [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16868043.9894.1.a103d578a185974c0b79d6af63d40ee8) organization that he also recently shared about on **TruthSocial**. You can read the Pastors For Trump full **[PRESS RELEASE](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16868043.9895.1.6fa19c4043b8474ebb75fae1f8e2f664)** here: [Pastors For Trump Press Release](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16868043.9896.1.6c01c932ae5708994f72ccf13b4de7ed) We are off to a TREMENDOUS start and with **President Trump's** share, our numbers are highly increasing. Many media outlets have reported on the formation of the Coalition such as **Newsweek** , **Rolling Stone** , **One America News Network** , **Real America's Voice** , **Gateway Pundit** , **Right Wing Watch** , **Baptist News Global** and others. This coalition is made up of **Pastors & Ministry Leaders** from different denominations across all 50 states having the common ground of wanting to **Make America Great Again by Making America Godly Again**. [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16868043.9897.1.f71bc6728f1985ffc89047e1f0ef2be5) is NOT just limited to **Pastors/Ministry Leaders** but is for _every_ believer in America. There will be _monthly Prayer Calls_ starting in January that will host _prominent_ leaders within the America First movement who will give updates of what is taking place within our nation from their unique vantage point. I want to encourage you to visit [www.pastors4trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16868043.9898.1.05dd52514b5a3df6a771062eb2086e4e) today and register to join in on the Prayer Calls so you can be informed as well as a participant in praying for our country. **Dr. Billy Graham** once said, _"For America to get back on its' feet, the people of God must first get down on their knees and pray."_ Not only should you register to join the monthly Prayer Calls and receive updates from prominent America First leaders, but you should also send the [www.pastors4trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16868043.9899.1.c457739bab13c9202a281061d0103598) link to your Pastor/Ministry Leader and encourage him/her to join the coalition with many other Pastor/Ministry Leaders throughout the country. Every Pastor/Ministry Leader will remain confidential, and their identity will not be released to the public unless they are in the role of a State/Regional Director. Pastors/Ministry Leaders that join the coalition will receive opportunities to meet (in-person) many of the America First leaders through upcoming rallies and events as well as have their voice heard by giving input on what issues should be presented to **President Trump** by the [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16868043.9900.1.5188e356066a16620034a7692da4cba4) coalition. Please go visit [www.Pastors4Trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16868043.9901.1.1c173fa73cee7bdb07c549da440e4b07) today and be a part of the effort to **Make America Great Again by Making America Godly Again**.

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: How are your K-12 schools and universities doing?
body:
Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of Ameri
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zm8u2romcpis3tluoebq68uetgd40bk9ag0dqaig_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk4qj4ttkumqn4s9nmorb79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onie3jb1d5icsr72d1nmsrb8sj264onfd1gs5g64tdgc8o75d1jchpj2ptgmcq61puie1p68dhgm9j74t1hepge1d3563gbacb4spj6ccbimdie0sjkcor65cr0suobapbi46h22sh2s8i66pr6cjjm2o76chh2bs)
| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zdspp5vnmcqo68nrang77tlvug4dhg5tsksn7s88_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjjm2o76chh2bs)
---
| | | Fellow American, Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of American history and government--including an understanding of the purposes and principles of the Constitution? There is reason to be doubtful. There seems to be a decreasing sense of patriotism among young Americans, and an increasing attraction to socialism and other ideas destructive of liberty. And have you noticed all the disturbing incidents taking place on college campuses, with students resorting to intimidation, threats, and violence to silence speakers with whom they disagree? Hillsdale is planning to redouble its efforts for the future of liberty. We will respond to these disturbing trends by expanding our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--especially for younger Americans. And as we form our strategy we’d like to hear from you: [**Please take our brief education survey here »**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zm7vb8scuhm476h5t9iujuo18o3jhdt046jo7jf0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjjm2o76chh2bs) We have done too many of our young people a disservice by failing to provide them with knowledge of our nation’s great heritage of liberty. Even worse, many of our schools, corrupted by Left-wing bias, have pushed a false history of America as essentially flawed and unjust. This indoctrination will only continue once students return to campuses across the country. Hillsdale can remain independent and stay true to its mission because it refuses to accept one penny of taxpayer funding--even indirect aid like federal or state student grants and loans. This frees Hillsdale from burdensome and corrupting regulation, but it also means we are entirely dependent on the support of our friends nationwide. Will you help us understand how Americans look at education today so that we can plan our expanded outreach in the smartest way possible? [**Please take a few minutes to complete this survey and let us know your opinions on education today »**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zs5v0hnp6rj9h7c91csfncgjpjch7atpccl70hlg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjjm2o76chh2bs) I am deeply grateful for your friendship.
---

Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

subject: The funds seized from Putin’s oligarchs should help Ukraine fight for freedom.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57428551/387929435/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwY2VkNzk3NC04YTk2LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vambp_0bvCYAcLnPf8KuRdFPotd7ENkfqfg5OPtFMBo=)
Vladimir Putin and his thuggish band of oligarchs are responsible for the needless death, dislocation, and suffering of millions of Ukrainians. Their horrific war of aggression has destroyed communities, caused 18,000 civilian casualties, and displaced nearly 8,000,000 Ukrainian people from their homes. For nearly a year, the Biden Administration has been holding Russia accountable — and defunding the Russian war machine — by seizing the ill-gotten yachts, luxuries, properties, and investments of Putin’s inner circle. We’re working hard to help Ukrainians defend themselves from Russia’s illegal aggression, but Michael believes we must also do everything we can to help Ukrainians recover and rebuild from the war. **Michael committed himself to ensuring that income from seized Russian assets would be reinvested in the people of Ukraine.** Last March, he introduced the bipartisan _RELIEF for Ukraine Act_ to ensure the Department of Justice directs funds from Russian seizures directly to Ukrainian relief efforts. But in a closely divided Senate, it seems no bill is immune to political games and partisan gridlock. For months, the _RELIEF for Ukraine Act_ stalled as Michael worked tirelessly to get his bill onto the floor. At times, outside observers mused that yet another important bill would fall to the wayside in Washington, but Michael himself never faltered. Never stopped working. And finally, on the last day of voting in 2022, Michael’s plan to help Ukraine reached the Senate floor for a vote — and passed unanimously. **In a time of unspeakable hardship, Michael’s work — work that you made possible — will help Ukrainians rebuild and return home. That is what we can achieve when we act together.** [**So please, chip in $5 or $10 today to help Michael continue fighting for what’s right in Washington.
