name: Your America
subject: Watch the new free course now
body:
Our newest online course opens with the question, “What happened to my country?” [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7859%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=hIBzkOv6g%2fkoMdfmpKjfcw&sysid=1)

| | | This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c92950%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=h8yReXhpQZ%2bzakYDmLJgRQ&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Our newest online course opens with the question, “What happened to my country?”

It’s a question I’ve asked myself many times over the last few years as I’ve read the latest reports on radical gender ideology pushed in our elementary schools, speech squashed by the media and corporate class, basic rights left unprotected in many of our cities, and economic opportunity diminished for millions of Americans.

To understand the source of these radical changes that undermine the rights of American citizens, we’ve produced the new online course, **“The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism.”**
---
| | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c92951%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kaj9JaYkMdhjtvrRPRUN4w&sysid=1)
---
In this course, Dr. Kevin Slack, associate professor of politics at Hillsdale College, traces the transformation of the American left over the last 100 years. You’ll learn how post-sixties radicals rejected the midcentury liberalism of Franklin Roosevelt; you’ll discover the origins of modern gender ideology, identity politics, and today’s global elite; and, you’ll explore how these movements overtook America’s key institutions.

You can watch the trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/american-left-preregister/](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c92952%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dT7oNVhJ0sr6IWdQzeqCKg&sysid=1)**

I hope you’ll join us to better understand--and learn how to confront--the woke ideologies that dominate American politics today.
Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7859%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=hIBzkOv6g%2fkoMdfmpKjfcw&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7859%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=hIBzkOv6g%2fkoMdfmpKjfcw&sysid=1)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Wesley=20Hunt?=
subject: YOU'RE INVITED: Wesley Hunt Swearing-In Ceremony
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
The Hunt Family Looks Forward to Seeing You! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/cba49cf24b80/youre-invited-wesley-hunt-swearing-in-ceremony-5259875?e=6b59dbf13a)
---
| |
---
| | Friend,

I hope you can join Willie, Olivia, Victoria, Emily, and me at my Swearing-In ceremony this **Saturday, January 21st at 2:00 PM** in the main Chapel! The Swearing-In Ceremony will be presented by Judge Lincoln Goodwin with a special invocation given by Pastor Jarrett from Champion Forest Baptist Church!

Many of you have been with me for the past four years and I cannot thank you enough for your support. I cannot wait to be surrounded by family, friends, supporters, and constituents on January 21st. I look forward to seeing you then! Sincerely,
Wesley Hunt
---

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Is your alma mater staying true to their original mission?
body:
Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of Ameri
| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z1uvl0occ9qbv8rkq1utcuper5ua79g4d5oud2gg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjjm6or6c3h2bs)
---
| | | Fellow American, Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of American history and government--including an understanding of the purposes and principles of the Constitution? There is reason to be doubtful. There seems to be a decreasing sense of patriotism among young Americans, and an increasing attraction to socialism and other ideas destructive of liberty. And have you noticed all the disturbing incidents taking place on college campuses, with students resorting to intimidation, threats, and violence to silence speakers with whom they disagree? Hillsdale is planning to redouble its efforts for the future of liberty. We will respond to these disturbing trends by expanding our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--especially for younger Americans. And as we form our strategy we’d like to hear from you: [**Please take our brief education survey here »**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z9q9rn1dpkjcltk1kmbccjfhiok2pk2394pblrsg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjjm6or6c3h2bs) We have done too many of our young people a disservice by failing to provide them with knowledge of our nation’s great heritage of liberty. Even worse, many of our schools, corrupted by Left-wing bias, have pushed a false history of America as essentially flawed and unjust. This indoctrination will only continue once students return to campuses across the country. Hillsdale can remain independent and stay true to its mission because it refuses to accept one penny of taxpayer funding--even indirect aid like federal or state student grants and loans. This frees Hillsdale from burdensome and corrupting regulation, but it also means we are entirely dependent on the support of our friends nationwide. Will you help us understand how Americans look at education today so that we can plan our expanded outreach in the smartest way possible? [**Please take a few minutes to complete this survey and let us know your opinions on education today »**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zg88lucumdu4pb75gcbhaqar0los3vj2n6hsddho_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjjm6or6c3h2bs) I am deeply grateful for your friendship.
---

Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Pro Life Update, [please use this preferences page](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/prefs/9z2zrmtu84vujdbpecjnfio1gclngr9gl0nnec6lrj8).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: ICYMI News
subject: How are your K-12 schools and universities doing?
body:
Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of Ameri
| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z308tffskk5timl5fbmeh3664gmpqeg38vm63quo_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjjm1ob4c9h2bs)
---
| | | Fellow American, Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of American history and government--including an understanding of the purposes and principles of the Constitution? There is reason to be doubtful. There seems to be a decreasing sense of patriotism among young Americans, and an increasing attraction to socialism and other ideas destructive of liberty. And have you noticed all the disturbing incidents taking place on college campuses, with students resorting to intimidation, threats, and violence to silence speakers with whom they disagree? Hillsdale is planning to redouble its efforts for the future of liberty. We will respond to these disturbing trends by expanding our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--especially for younger Americans. And as we form our strategy we'd like to hear from you: [**Please take our brief education survey here » **](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z27o85b0jluf5v3b10qfjc9rk8s6lojptf2ef268_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjjm1ob4c9h2bs) We have done too many of our young people a disservice by failing to provide them with knowledge of our nation's great heritage of liberty. Even worse, many of our schools, corrupted by Left-wing bias, have pushed a false history of America as essentially flawed and unjust. This indoctrination will only continue once students return to campuses across the country. Hillsdale can remain independent and stay true to its mission because it refuses to accept one penny of taxpayer funding--even indirect aid like federal or state student grants and loans. name: Joe Kent
subject: I need your help.
body:
Dear Supporter,
Nobody was more disappointed than me in the outcome of our race - we came within less than a point of winning despite getting outspent 6 to 1 by my Democrat opponent.
That's one reason why I've gotten into the race for 2024 so early - to help make sure we raise the money necessary to get our message out and turn out our voters.
You can help us at the start of this journey by making a contribution today at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/zTdPnJvRKFaVpLYVHsRk3Q/tAGSEKntsD21NZ82mviWjA).
You can also opt to make it a reoccurring contribution by clicking the "Make this Monthly" button.
I'm grateful for all of the encouragement I've received since I've announced. More and more voters are waking up to the fact that my opponent is a Portland liberal walking in lockstep with Joe Biden and the Democrat minority in Congress.
With your contribution, we will be able to expose my Democrat opponent for who she is and flip this seat red. Please help out at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/zTdPnJvRKFaVpLYVHsRk3Q/tAGSEKntsD21NZ82mviWjA).
Thank you,
Joe Kent

PS - My district is the most likely in the country to flip red! Help make it happen by contributing at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/zTdPnJvRKFaVpLYVHsRk3Q/tAGSEKntsD21NZ82mviWjA).

Unsubscribe: https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/unsubscribe/o2MugVE0sjPAeG1zwzE3zPwB377NamVJrtTtZu9DI892k/Aq892bLK7NUcUtSXFAg4JQAA/tAGSEKntsD21NZ82mviWjA

I served as a Trump impeachment manager – even though I knew Republicans would smear me for it. I helped House Democrats pass the first meaningful gun safety legislation in 30 years – even though it made us a target of the corporate gun manufacturers. I stood with our caucus to call out corporate price-gouging – even though we knew that special interest groups would fight back. I know House Democrats will continue to find common ground when possible, fight extremism when necessary and always put People over Politics. = Now that MAGA extremists have thrown the Republican Party into disarray, this is our best shot to show just how strong Democrats are. = Keep the faith, Hakeem Hakeem Jeffries is the Democratic Leader of the U.S. House of Representatives. Dear friend,

**_I am very excited to announce that I will be running for the U.S. Senate in 2024 to represent the great State of Indiana._** In the Senate, I intend to protect your freedom, defend our conservative values, and put America first. As we begin this journey together, I want to share my story:

I grew up in a working-class household in Columbia City, Indiana. My father was a factory worker and my mother worked in a nursing home. We often lived paycheck to paycheck, and I was raised in a trailer park for many years.

[](http://links.thehousegop.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=c722c72269654f219df5bb87990231c2&_e=2PS3StRA3H4DUOZOX9mJNWcENaCO1WyoB2FYaMdQb_WKRlfqxodLh-9VWT5-J5NhFkBRKDwFHlUOTlMVQy0YSZgW9j_DPYD5L1KF0lToxgFDhcQFyY0UkTP7QKMDYF1L89PBHycWyBRsxDiY4MBlfKvt6Qhd_PgcwpxgJOAm7bAcJFp6npfGyjOmbKq-KlOfGpNSPeK9InxFXuiqP1N9MMUiaKoX0KpOagznru05NrZppg_8VFYGs-saZ6TRzyDg_kqksUhfZnO63aIap3tAmQkkZxumBmkUO2qAO_wvFF1sJUzA2PUGkoW1wy3sYwqsVOByiWKUKF0CL1HWaVar2JhRfRClWHi8fDpx3giXBArD2twV0oFcBDnw0IwnydlLDd8FZiuE5fJn7hr8ZJ7FmoDE2KnX6GCqXVHa-Yj7t9WvVsBdJY_osKj4CH-Yzp68bCCaP9G54-CWid7IxPp3gwVVtnoLnMvuo_xyUXKapWpIbSlPeIls3qZLuNUR8E6IL12b7EvE09HL6rTNSW_3G7FNpr_SwFcIagDqEBNyx8k%3D)
Growing up, my parents taught me the values of hard-work, personal responsibility, and service to our community. My father voted for Democrats much of his life, but now, like many Americans, recognizes that the Republican Party is the true party of the working class.

I was the first in my family to attend college. At Indiana University, I met my wonderful wife, Amanda, who has been the biggest blessing in my life. She keeps me grounded and ensures our family stays true to our conservative values every day.

Coming from a humble background, I felt a calling to give back to my community. As such, after serving on a county council, I became a member of the Indiana State Senate in 2010. During my time in office, I took a leave of absence while I was deployed to Afghanistan as a Navy Reserve Supply Corps Officer.

[](http://links.thehousegop.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=c722c72269654f219df5bb87990231c2&_e=2PS3StRA3H4DUOZOX9mJNWcENaCO1WyoB2FYaMdQb_WKRlfqxodLh-9VWT5-J5NhFkBRKDwFHlUOTlMVQy0YSZgW9j_DPYD5L1KF0lToxgFDhcQFyY0UkTP7QKMDYF1L89PBHycWyBRsxDiY4MBlfKvt6Qhd_PgcwpxgJOAm7bAcJFp6npfGyjOmbKq-KlOfGpNSPeK9InxFXuiqP1N9MMUiaKoX0KpOagznru05NrZppg_8VFYGs-saZ6TRzyDg_kqksUhfZnO63aIap3tAmQkkZxumBmkUO2qAO_wvFF1sJUzA2PUGkoW1wy3sYwqsVOByiWKUKF0CL1HWaVar2JhRfRClWHi8fDpx3giXBArD2twV0oFcBDnw0IwnydlLDd8FZiuE5fJn7hr8ZJ7Fmg8z5X4ky3RJ-RmddZ4PRXHXK-c_0BhIhB4Hlfaw3MmBQJqtWYdIDpi6xHEhwPNd5kq6gosAfP4tc6iwen04A-kEDqctTzfBjM_i7oh7pW5FDVO3dNeZXVJYOQ_lNdrwIrCAzX7bnXnaaE-qP4jz9Hw%3D)
Serving my country abroad reinforced my resolve to defend the freedoms and values that make America great. As an Afghanistan War veteran, I know what it means to fight for our country and our values.

[](http://links.thehousegop.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=c722c72269654f219df5bb87990231c2&_e=2PS3StRA3H4DUOZOX9mJNWcENaCO1WyoB2FYaMdQb_WKRlfqxodLh-9VWT5-J5NhFkBRKDwFHlUOTlMVQy0YSZgW9j_DPYD5L1KF0lToxgFDhcQFyY0UkTP7QKMDYF1L89PBHycWyBRsxDiY4MBlfKvt6Qhd_PgcwpxgJOAm7bAcJFp6npfGyjOmbKq-KlOfGpNSPeK9InxFXuiqP1N9MMUiaKoX0KpOagznru05NrZppg_8VFYGs-saZ6TRzyDg_kqksUhfZnO63aIap3tAmQkkZxumBmkUO2qAO_wvFF1sJUzA2PUGkoW1wy3sYwqsVOByiWKUKF0CL1HWaVar2JhRfRClWHi8fDpx3giXBArD2twV0oFcBDnw0IwnydlLDd8FZiuE5fJn7hr8ZJ7FmoGLiMQKYB2JNFia0S355qe0HiYFSkXI6yjE2__cHPpyJDltYZmUicdGxMnm_KvjFxloUQX8fO8kWcZVgAxA-Dazy3nxlIopDBQSMQvN8qTutzCh5tlClmSDys0dvTNlRYiwFEvdkYhOW8UFGqUFBWI%3D)
During my time in Afghanistan, my wife stepped up to fill in for me in the State Senate. I am blessed to have a family dedicated to serving the American people.

Amanda and I started a family back in 2009. We’ve been blessed with three beautiful daughters, Lillian, Elizabeth, and Joann, who inspire me each day. I am fighting for our country because I am fighting for their future. I want my daughters to grow up in a country where they are safe and can thrive.

[](http://links.thehousegop.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=c722c72269654f219df5bb87990231c2&_e=2PS3StRA3H4DUOZOX9mJNWcENaCO1WyoB2FYaMdQb_WKRlfqxodLh-9VWT5-J5NhFkBRKDwFHlUOTlMVQy0YSZgW9j_DPYD5L1KF0lToxgFDhcQFyY0UkTP7QKMDYF1L89PBHycWyBRsxDiY4MBlfKvt6Qhd_PgcwpxgJOAm7bAcJFp6npfGyjOmbKq-KlOfGpNSPeK9InxFXuiqP1N9MMUiaKoX0KpOagznru05NrZppg_8VFYGs-saZ6TRzyDg_kqksUhfZnO63aIap3tAmQkkZxumBmkUO2qAO_wvFF1sJUzA2PUGkoW1wy3sYwqsVOByiWKUKF0CL1HWaVar2JhRfRClWHi8fDpx3giXBArD2twV0oFcBDnw0IwnydlLDd8FZiuE5fJn7hr8ZJ7Fmk81IJcTdpLmHyGISmNi_Mn4s4hpMkIJ-l36rAh6n-cDbLImspcS9Av1OOk4iXJv_mrRUOWrCKcx142j3gqxOEqzl62HM9siOYxC15VJGYC9tX9cg4eT_4293L4DK7ge7pma01uR4lTe1EzjudWUHMI%3D)
Since 2016, I have chosen to continue my service career by representing Indiana’s 3rd district in the U.S. Congress. During my time in the House, I have been a consistent conservative voice dedicated to upholding and protecting the conservative American values that make our nation great. I was elected chair of the Republican Study Committee, the largest caucus of conservatives in the House of Representatives, and have collaborated with strong leaders, like President Trump, to put America first.

[](http://links.thehousegop.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=c722c72269654f219df5bb87990231c2&_e=2PS3StRA3H4DUOZOX9mJNWcENaCO1WyoB2FYaMdQb_WKRlfqxodLh-9VWT5-J5NhFkBRKDwFHlUOTlMVQy0YSZgW9j_DPYD5L1KF0lToxgFDhcQFyY0UkTP7QKMDYF1L89PBHycWyBRsxDiY4MBlfKvt6Qhd_PgcwpxgJOAm7bAcJFp6npfGyjOmbKq-KlOfGpNSPeK9InxFXuiqP1N9MMUiaKoX0KpOagznru05NrZppg_8VFYGs-saZ6TRzyDg_kqksUhfZnO63aIap3tAmQkkZxumBmkUO2qAO_wvFF1sJUzA2PUGkoW1wy3sYwqsVOByiWKUKF0CL1HWaVar2JhRfRClWHi8fDpx3giXBArD2twV0oFcBDnw0IwnydlLDd8FZiuE5fJn7hr8ZJ7FmrZM4bm9LKHSVoNg14uVkfWZ39U7H6ueTp2D2uwpcOJtev97BLYyFp7QSnblC5P7rVfXvUpOjKa7lT8J0eOFZ30lxn1eyM7VR230grdzghdTJHfbmRf8CYcd9sjC2TjK498GOzhHh--J0m9OYeqUTUA%3D)
As the next Senator of Indiana, I intend to continue defending hard-working Americans and refuse to let the radical Left crush our values and destroy our country. My congressional record of fighting for strong families, limited government, and tighter spending speaks for itself. We have a great country worth defending, and I intend to do just that.

As your next Senator, I will fight to balance the federal budget, protect our Southern border, stand up to China, and defend our children against the Left’s woke ideology. **But, I need support from strong, grassroots conservatives like YOU to ensure our movement makes it all the way to Washington.** [**_Will you join us in preserving the American Dream?_**](http://links.thehousegop.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=c722c72269654f219df5bb87990231c2&_e=2PS3StRA3H4DUOZOX9mJNWcENaCO1WyoB2FYaMdQb_WKRlfqxodLh-9VWT5-J5NhFkBRKDwFHlUOTlMVQy0YSZgW9j_DPYD5L1KF0lToxgFDhcQFyY0UkTP7QKMDYF1L89PBHycWyBRsxDiY4MBlfKvt6Qhd_PgcwpxgJOAm7bAcJFp6npfGyjOmbKq-KlOfGpNSPeK9InxFXuiqP1N9MMUiaKoX0KpOagznru05NrZppg_8VFYGs-saZ6TRzyDg_kqksUhfZnO63aIap3tAmQkkZxumBmkUO2qAO_wvFF1sJUzA2PUGkoW1wy3sYwqsVOByiWKUKF0CL1HWaVar2JhRfRClWHi8fDpx3giXBArD2twV0oFcBDnw0IwnydlLDd8FZiuE5fJn7hr8ZJ7FmqTzB65FJ3dg24Xqs97lIQfaRqDSDnE5J9ISRz-58-0ZL9X65X2bGbbF7VP4VD93rTncGMqtSYKKKTPVcCxpTgaqoPc2bHFk2pOuV9AFwHZuw36w4AhI4aPRxT41rrfAQeVD5yh3f5JxJpn4ybPOuZE%3D)

clean_body: Join me >> | Dear friend, I am very excited to announce that I will be running for the U.S. Senate in 2024 to represent the great State of Indiana. In the Senate, I intend to protect your freedom, defend our conservative values, and put America first. As we begin this journey together, I want to share my story: I grew up in a working-class household in Columbia City, Indiana. My father was a factory worker and my mother worked in a nursing home. We often lived paycheck to paycheck, and I was raised in a trailer park for many years. Growing up, my parents taught me the values of hard-work, personal responsibility, and service to our community. My father voted for Democrats much of his life, but now, like many Americans, recognizes that the Republican Party is the true party of the working class. I was the first in my family to attend college. At Indiana University, I met my wonderful wife, Amanda, who has been the biggest blessing in my life. She keeps me grounded and ensures our family stays true to our conservative values every day. Coming from a humble background, I felt a calling to give back to my community. As such, after serving on a county council, I became a member of the Indiana State Senate in 2010. During my time in office, I took a leave of absence while I was deployed to Afghanistan as a Navy Reserve Supply Corps Officer. Serving my country abroad reinforced my resolve to defend the freedoms and values that make America great. As an Afghanistan War veteran, I know what it means to fight for our country and our values. During my time in Afghanistan, my wife stepped up to fill in for me in the State Senate. I am blessed to have a family dedicated to serving the American people. Amanda and I started a family back in 2009. We’ve been blessed with three beautiful daughters, Lillian, Elizabeth, and Joann, who inspire me each day. I am fighting for our country because I am fighting for their future. I want my daughters to grow up in a country where they are safe and can thrive. Since 2016, I have chosen to continue my service career by representing Indiana’s 3rd district in the U.S. Congress. During my time in the House, I have been a consistent conservative voice dedicated to upholding and protecting the conservative American values that make our nation great. I was elected chair of the Republican Study Committee, the largest caucus of conservatives in the House of Representatives, and have collaborated with strong leaders, like President Trump, to put America first. As the next Senator of Indiana, I intend to continue defending hard-working Americans and refuse to let the radical Left crush our values and destroy our country. My congressional record of fighting for strong families, limited government, and tighter spending speaks for itself. We have a great country worth defending, and I intend to do just that. As your next Senator, I will fight to balance the federal budget, protect our Southern border, stand up to China, and defend our children against the Left’s woke ideology. But, I need support from strong, grassroots conservatives like YOU to ensure our movement makes it all the way to Washington. | Sincerely, | ---|--- Paid for by Banks for Senate Copyright (C) 2023 Banks for Senate, All rights reserved.

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: Explaining our campaign debt
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Hi – I’ll explain more below but our (victorious!) campaign has a little bit of debt to pay off. We made some great progress before the end of the year, and we’ve got just a little bit left to go. If you could give just $10 right now -- split with Serve America -- to help us pay it down so that I can continue focusing my energy on serving in the Senate, I’d be very grateful. Here’s the link: secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-hassan [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-hassan]
Look – the last few weeks of our campaign were a whirlwind. GOP spending against us skyrocketed, polls tightened, and pundits were doubting whether we could win.
My team put our heads down and focused on our final advertising investments to get us through the last few days of the campaign. We were making decisions with the information we had, hoping with all our might that the funding will come through.
Unfortunately, all of our funding didn’t come through and now my campaign has a bit of a hole to fill to get our last bills paid. We’ve made a ton of progress in closing the gap and since you’re one of my most important supporters, I’m hoping that I can count on you to get us over the top.
Will you please give $10 or as much as you can to help us retire our debt? Your donation will be split between my campaign and Serve America, and I’d be grateful for anything you can give. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-hassan]
I’m proud of you and our campaign team and the work we did together. Now, we just have to finish this thing off.
Thank you for your help.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-hassan [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-hassan]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-hassan]
https://www.facebook.com/sethmoulton [https://www.facebook.com/sethmoulton] https://twitter.com/sethmoulton [https://twitter.com/sethmoulton] https://www.instagram.com/sethmoulton/?hl=en [https://www.instagram.com/sethmoulton/?hl=en] https://www.linkedin.com/company/seth-moulton-for-america/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/seth-moulton-for-america/]

name: Jenna
subject: Just a quick question
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
|
---
|
| | Peter ,

My name is Jenna. I'm reaching out on behalf of Republican HQ with a quick question.

According to our records you are one of our most reliable Conservative supporters so I have to ask, do you plan on accepting Steve Scalise's invitation to join his _**[Majority Leader's Founding Circle?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62216485:64FuEKGaN:m:1:3334294963:C0689575FD13B4EEF60C70E11E3BB313:r "Majority Leader's Founding Circle?")**_ Almost every single Conservative we asked has accepted their invitation in a heartbeat... But I just checked our records and didn't see your name.

_**[Because of how much you've done for our movement, I'm personally extending your invitation for 1 FINAL HOUR. I can't go any longer than that, so please respond ASAP.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62216485:64FuEKGaN:m:1:3334294963:C0689575FD13B4EEF60C70E11E3BB313:r "Because of how much you’ve done for our movement, I’m personally extending your invitation for 1
FINAL HOUR. I can’t go any longer than that, so please respond ASAP.")**_

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Jenna, Membership Chair
Subject: You're Invited!

---
|
---
_Congratulations, Peter! You 're Invited to Join the..._

**MAJORITY LEADER 'S FOUNDING CIRCLE**

**Invitation for:_[dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62216485:64FuEKGaN:m:1:3334294963:C0689575FD13B4EEF60C70E11E3BB313:r "dpwillis67@gmail.com")_**
**Patriot ID:** 1928-129-AA1
**Deadline to Accept:**_1 Hour After Opening_
| | [ACCEPT EXCLUSIVE INVITATION](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62216485:64FuEKGaN:m:1:3334294963:C0689575FD13B4EEF60C70E11E3BB313:r "ACCEPT EXCLUSIVE INVITATION")
---

_*** Your custom, secure link expires 1 hour after you open this email. Please do not forward or share this link with anyone else - it is intended for you and you alone. As a top Patriot who has proved themself an integral part of our grassroots team, this limited offer is uniquely granted to you. ***_

The Majority Leader's Founding Circle is the premier digital membership for Majority Leader Steve Scalise's top grassroots Patriots. This is the FIRST time this invitation has been given to anyone and you are one of the lucky few to receive it.

**Only 435 patriots will be able to claim a spot on the inaugural roster. We 'd be honored to have you as one of them.**

---
| | | [ACCEPT EXCLUSIVE INVITATION](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62216485:64FuEKGaN:m:1:3334294963:C0689575FD13B4EEF60C70E11E3BB313:r "ACCEPT EXCLUSIVE INVITATION")
---

**YOUR CUSTOM LINK EXPIRES IN 1 HOUR**
This is meant to be a network of only the most dedicated Patriots. Through thick and thin, you've stood by our side and helped Republicans take back the House Majority.

_That 's why you're here, reading this very message._ You're the exact kind of Conservative fighter we need to put American families first and end Biden's radical agenda once and for all.

Are you willing to join the fight? Like we mentioned earlier, there is a limited number of spaces available. If you choose to decline, we understand. This fight won't be easy with Biden's White House, Schumer's Senate, and the Liberal Media coming after us at every turn.

But we need a full team. We can't win on our own. That's why we're giving you the right of first refusal. **This offer will expire 1 hour after you 've opened this email and after that, we will move on to the next Patriot on our list.**

---
| | | [ACCEPT EXCLUSIVE INVITATION](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62216485:64FuEKGaN:m:1:3334294963:C0689575FD13B4EEF60C70E11E3BB313:r "ACCEPT EXCLUSIVE INVITATION")
---

**YOUR CUSTOM LINK EXPIRES IN 1 HOUR**
Joining the Majority Leader's Founding Circle means stepping up for our shared Conservative values and laying the groundwork to secure the border, fight inflation, crack down on crime, defend our freedoms and so much more.

Taking back the House wasn't easy, but we're about to face an uphill battle that's infinitely steeper. The odds are stacked against us - making your support critical to the success of our Republican House Majority.

Thank you,

Jenna
Membership Chair
Majority Leader's Founding Circle

name: Charles Booker
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
2022 was an incredible year for Democrats, Peter.

We held the Senate, minimized losses in the House, and made inroads in
places we didn’t expect. In Kentucky, we over performed 2020 margins in
over half of all counties.

And through the highs and lows, we built a movement together. We engaged
young people and shared hope for progress with millions. We built lasting
infrastructure for the progressive movement and created new voters engaged
in the Democratic process.

Despite our loss on Election Day, we can be proud of what we accomplished
together. And I am excited to see what’s next for this team.

But right now, I have to ask again for your help. In order to close out
the campaign and move on to the next chapter of our work together, we have
some campaign debt to take care of. [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18865?t=1001&akid=2898%2E346206%2ECglUKq ]If you’re able, could you make a
contribution today to help us?

Our campaign was uncompromising. When we were making spending decisions in
the final days, that meant we prioritized communicating with as many
Kentucky voters as possible. We ran a bold campaign and we made bold
decisions. And unfortunately for us, that means we have a bit of a hole in
our budget and hope you can help us.

Thank you for anything you can do. I’m looking forward to what’s next.

Charles

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230117-2898-footer&t=1002&refcode2=2898_346206_CglUKq&akid=2898%2E346206%2ECglUKq

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=2898%2E346206%2ECglUKq

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

---

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ziqfj1okicbl1lckenni2lnv2vqqdj9hisdpuh8g_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjge4o32chh2bs) Dear Patriot,

[**Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, $250, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS and GET THEM JUSTICE.

**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z05mfnjbksnhl52dupbklmcq2d8774kcmr54ipuo_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjge4o32chh2bs) **The lawless January 6 Congressional Committee is trying to conceal its crimes against the Constitution and the American people.** Yahoo News reports:

“House Speaker Nancy Pelosi (D-San Francisco) already named the House Committee on House Administration the custodian of the records. Under current House rules, the committee is obligated to hand over the official records to the House clerk, who transmits them to the National Archives. _The rules also prevent the National Archives from releasing committee records for at least 30 years. Sensitive records, such as those from a major investigation, can be held up to 50 years before being made public.”_

**Yes, you read that right – the J6 Kangaroo Court is trying to cover up crucial information that affects you and me, our families, and our fellow Americans, for 30 to 50 YEARS!

** They want to bury:

• Videos from police body cameras,

• Videos from on-site security cameras,

• Videos from countless smart phones,

• Emails and texts from federal agencies and law enforcement,

• And so much more.

Why?

**Because they know that the patriots who protested that day outside the U.S. Capitol building were peaceful.

** They know that the U.S. Capitol Police were warned that Black Lives Matter terrorists would disguise themselves as Trump supporters and cause trouble.

They know that undercover police and federal agents were in the crowd and may have even provoked attacks on police and the Capitol building.

**They know their narrative that patriots took part in a bloody insurrection to overthrow the government is a lie.

** So, they’re trying to bury that evidence until everyone they’ve falsely accused, ruined, browbeat...and everyone who pushed the lying Biden narrative...has died from old age.

**This is an outrageous attack on our Constitution, our rights, and our freedoms – especially in light of the two years of abuse, torture, and injustice January 6 peaceful protesters have endured.

** That’s why I ask you to stand with me before it’s too late.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.

** I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

** I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!

** And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court.

I’m suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray.

[**Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.

**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zavfraukmmhkvglsubi6epckjha6ln7j6mdorfmo_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjge4o32chh2bs) Your best gift today will help me fight for these jailed patriots, bring them justice, and fight for the future of our Great Nation.

[**So please give what you can right away.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Patriot, it’s been two years since the fake insurrection on January 6...and the real reign of terror launched by Biden and his lawless FBI and DOJ on Trump supporters and peaceful protesters.**

| | Greetings, I have officially filed with the FEC to run for the honor of representing Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula in 2024. To succeed, fundraising starts now. We need to build a rural movement. We're saving every penny possible to compete against the Republican nominee in 2024. You are critical to Democratic success in Northern Michigan and the U.P. Over the next year, my team will build a donor-funded war chest to advance Democratic principles and assist quality candidates in Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula. We want you part of the movement to help rural America thrive. All residents in Michigan's First — Democrats, Independents, Republicans — need affordable healthcare, housing, education, and childcare. We also need infrastructure investment, job opportunities, and economic prosperity. The challenges our rural communities face are some of the most distinct in the Nation, and we need a Congressman eager to listen to constituents and solve real problems. Democrats have a lot of work to do to show fiercely independent rural voters how our policies benefit hardworking families. I want this campaign to be an example of how to 'run rural' in a divided Nation. My party must pay attention to districts like ours for long-term success, and our work begins now. For the benefit of everyone in Northern Michigan and the UP, we must put the needs of our country before party. To help lower costs and reduce economic burdens for all Americans, we must be the change. I will champion rural America and its needs. My campaign plans to develop a strong field-team throughout the 1st District to get all qualified candidates, at all levels of government, elected after the results of the primaries are determined. You can help us now accomplish big things in 2024.
---

name: Josh Shapiro
subject: The honor of a lifetime
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
This morning, I took the oath of office and was sworn in as Pennsylvania's 48th Governor.

Derek, This morning, I took the oath of office and was sworn in as Pennsylvania's 48th Governor. As I addressed the people of our Commonwealth, I talked about some of the stories I heard as I traveled across Pennsylvania these last two years. Stories of people who inspired me, who taught me. Stories that have driven me to serve. Stories from people like the grandmom in Lawrence County who told me not to let us go back to what it was like before Roe. Stories from people like Tim, who did backbreaking work on our roadways, just to have company executives steal his hard-earned benefits. I’m mindful of the fact that folks shared those stories — thousands of you, all across our Commonwealth — because you believe I can make a difference for you. Derek, I’m truly humbled that the people of Pennsylvania have entrusted me with that responsibility. Not just the responsibility to serve as your 48th Governor, but the responsibility to stand up for what’s right, to bring people together, and to get real things done. The people have given us a clear mandate. Not just by virtue of the historic number of votes for our campaign, but by the way we all came together — by what that number represents. Democrats, Republicans, Independents, rural, urban, and suburban voters from across the Commonwealth. You sent a clear message when you came together to resoundingly reject extremism. Together, hope defeated fear. Unity triumphed over division. We proved that we value our freedoms, and we’re willing to do the hard work necessary to protect our fundamental rights. And so, with my faith firmly rooted in we the people of Pennsylvania, with my heart open to others and my eyes fixed ahead, I am prepared to do my part to move our Commonwealth forward. Thank you for all the support you’ve provided along the way, my friend. Together, we’re going to build on this historic coalition and get big things done for Pennsylvania. With gratitude, Josh Shapiro
_Governor of Pennsylvania_

name: A Special Message From Col. Mike Waltz
subject: BRIEFING ENCLOSED: OPEN PRIVATELY!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Waltz for Congress
body:
| | | Peter,
---
It’s Col. Mike Waltz.

I have an URGENT briefing I need to share with you, Peter.

In the past two years, I’ve seen Joe Biden politicize our military and poison our troops with critical race theory and other woke lies.

_And while we’re trying to turn our soldiers into members of the woke mob, our enemies are growing stronger._

China’s President has made it clear that he’s ready to replace the United States as the world’s dominant superpower.

_And every day, he’s getting closer and closer to succeeding._
---
[**STOP COMMUNIST CHINA**](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=513a192b465d4cb1b4c5b92af9a74026&_e=hG0GWc4pNXQ7pYhk_POXiCWH4aVt9vj4DrhITopzz2whzdU9HOqQILnKvifvsb5Fb3NV20baLeOwLf3HRpvn-onDffIDf0W_lN5lWZfWGmLiM3yiChDN__T4P1LSufPvLcnb8N4g9Pi6nllL8METHyUh3QGvet-Bvk7cQxqX-10FHgbKs3yFfhYd7BJeeOfuB_hLctNp-1mZI_K1cDtWyGWsSQb_5cfRlkXQqKKZGQ21zPZku8kXYmoOpP3Zc5y1mWmEQrVFwcunD8KOQjB7iO455sZHj-DpYttO3U6Nzgv-x9lcVPLeKmdhN9yIrcviJw309Th6fiEieWyrCRoYLA%3D%3D)
---
Let me tell you just some of the troubling plans China’s President Xi has, Peter:
* He’s building a Navy even LARGER than ours with 425 ships by 2030.
* He’s dominating space with an unprecedented, unmanned mission to the moon.
* He’s deploying new J-20 stealth fighters ready to go to offense on the water in Asia.
* He’s directing troops and government officials to work overtime to modernize the military and their nuclear forces.

It’s worrying, Peter. And what is Joe Biden doing about it?

_**_ABSOLUTELY NOTHING!_**_

While our President tries to mold and poison our military’s minds, it’s up to House Republicans to stop him.

As a member of the House Armed Services Committee, I’m ready to focus on military readiness, deterring the enemy, and rooting out destructive woke propaganda.

_My Republicans colleagues and I are determined to ensure America’s war fighters are trained and equipped to protect and defend America, but if we’re going to save the military from Joe Biden and stop Communist China, we need every member of our team to step up._

**With so much on the line, my campaign can’t afford to fall behind - and that’s where I’m calling on you.**

clean_body: | | | Peter, It’s Col. Mike Waltz. I have an URGENT briefing I need to share with you, Peter. In the past two years, I’ve seen Joe Biden politicize our military and poison our troops with critical race theory and other woke lies. And while we’re trying to turn our soldiers into members of the woke mob, our enemies are growing stronger. China’s President has made it clear that he’s ready to replace the United States as the world’s dominant superpower. And every day, he’s getting closer and closer to succeeding. Let me tell you just some of the troubling plans China’s President Xi has, Peter: He’s building a Navy even LARGER than ours with 425 ships by 2030. He’s dominating space with an unprecedented, unmanned mission to the moon. He’s deploying new J-20 stealth fighters ready to go to offense on the water in Asia. He’s directing troops and government officials to work overtime to modernize the military and their nuclear forces. It’s worrying, Peter. And what is Joe Biden doing about it? ABSOLUTELY NOTHING! While our President tries to mold and poison our military’s minds, it’s up to House Republicans to stop him. As a member of the House Armed Services Committee, I’m ready to focus on military readiness, deterring the enemy, and rooting out destructive woke propaganda. My Republicans colleagues and I are determined to ensure America’s war fighters are trained and equipped to protect and defend America, but if we’re going to save the military from Joe Biden and stop Communist China, we need every member of our team to step up. With so much on the line, my campaign can’t afford to fall behind - and that’s where I’m calling on you. | | In Service, Col. Mike WaltzSpecial Forces Green Beret U.S. Congressman (R-FL) | | Paid for by Michael Waltz for Congress | | Michael Waltz is a member of the Army National Guard. body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57441121/387956551/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230117_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2E3Y2QzM2YtYTU5Ni1lZDExLTk5NGMtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=cKzGgiyFXhu1ckXzusN0hg632qPJIbFKn6YX9_eQgBw=)
---
Hey Peter, did you catch our founder, Katie Hill, on _MSNBC_ this weekend? [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57441122/387956552/-1914796982?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230117_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2E3Y2QzM2YtYTU5Ni1lZDExLTk5NGMtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=cKzGgiyFXhu1ckXzusN0hg632qPJIbFKn6YX9_eQgBw=) She talked to host Alex Witt about the absurdity of the GOP’s sham investigations, the far-right turn the party is taking, and what Democrats’ strategy should be to take back the House in 2024. **[_Katie has laid out the game plan, and now it’s our responsibility to get the job done. body:
We owe it to them to fight for their freedom.| | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=4e646739cbbe49369668278e2df37cdd&_e=0tlNF5eBaw05B73Up718RxNceSvpnOHn6RIftB8pL_N5u8wTIMYsFm3cc1ihMgDIvCGTNO__kNZbTc8OCJdHEefmkoCHQx6ETC6-4IZhAchopxfDZy7m1wL-X3m3-VBtegQJk5j7Qs-w61bAPHQv01mNuKiJdWr1P0FyqLgs7GN-OmXU5CABbFFaKV9Laz_wjGCQHRusmTxXMGW-8R6H9RoG_w6bP6ts_-vcG_TX3yQz2S5Pmx4FI1LziiYh368oXzU1iEpvDNuwEWjXDHfi94jgmYBWLyiBcGE73KjmLHDqU89ofNebpYY7qFCPrzC_slpAdruvYKUNDTnDtxuuOlEzG3NCg13iZMRvfVEr6a-ktKyC-tJLNRLKbKBFIpL0yApujCfo_0coYJaRDcKaonYo5q2iwGsLybgmPPg77sgf-0aOobLJJlq6pdHoBF5HhZoj2w4YrbtZ5se9K4rXXQ%3D%3D)
---
Peter, When American Heroes take the oath to protect and serve by enlisting in our armed forces, they are willing to make the ultimate sacrifice to defend freedom. For you. For me. _For every American._ These Warriors put on their uniforms every day – and they are willing to make the ultimate sacrifice in the name of freedom, liberty, and justice. Unfortunately, three of those very Heroes had the freedoms they worked so hard to protect ripped away from them. Chief Petty Officer Eric Gilmet and Gunnery Sergeants Danny Draher and Joshua Negron were falsely accused of a heinous crime. Their defense team was threatened. **And they’re facing up to 25 years in prison for a crime they didn’t commit. **
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=4e646739cbbe49369668278e2df37cdd&_e=0tlNF5eBaw05B73Up718RxNceSvpnOHn6RIftB8pL_N5u8wTIMYsFm3cc1ihMgDIvCGTNO__kNZbTc8OCJdHEefmkoCHQx6ETC6-4IZhAchopxfDZy7m1wL-X3m3-VBtegQJk5j7Qs-w61bAPHQv01mNuKiJdWr1P0FyqLgs7GN-OmXU5CABbFFaKV9Laz_wjGCQHRusmTxXMGW-8R6H9RoG_w6bP6ts_-vcG_TX3yQz2S5Pmx4FI1LziiYh368oXzU1iEpvDNuwEWjXDHfi94jgmYBWLyiBcGE73KjmLHA2dEO2P3Udtg-ZIJD0AMwodKINo-wpp5vsoX9Ci1LuThGQkPB7sjDEUQQcd8yD5J1Sk3fQhkTZGlDHtt0R8yEvLYK_mJAn0_2ZpFFCo-0tWJwBfkPoh1MyAnWGhHioncxb46-6axH8iPr08nr5-lHdjV0t3qBgM6TWKmbXAc8kHA%3D%3D)
---
What started as a regular night of celebration ended in a tragic death and three innocent Warriors facing life behind bars.
---
[**GET JUSTICE FOR THE MARSOC 3**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=4e646739cbbe49369668278e2df37cdd&_e=0tlNF5eBaw05B73Up718RxNceSvpnOHn6RIftB8pL_N5u8wTIMYsFm3cc1ihMgDIvCGTNO__kNZbTc8OCJdHEefmkoCHQx6ETC6-4IZhAchopxfDZy7m1wL-X3m3-VBtegQJk5j7Qs-w61bAPHQv01mNuKiJdWr1P0FyqLgs7GN-OmXU5CABbFFaKV9Laz_wjGCQHRusmTxXMGW-8R6H9RoG_w6bP6ts_-vcG_TX3yQz2S5Pmx4FI1LziiYh368oXzU1iEpvDNuwEWjXDHfi94jgmYBWLyiBcGE73KjmLHDEzInlKbgAT8aQDIpMnJ3XU4ukqYW3koXJ0MvYiUzPoSB8raQX7VoRnDSI_pHY05lWp73s-aHiLtWOw9wWLUbZz3bUf9npVJlatE0Za9-ge2YaWvqgO5GqXJbP2DBpdPEFvWduMve-DGNFpREpUAfSMGzZC-3kU1PAX5ntzK1wcA%3D%3D)
---
It all started at a bar when a civilian contractor, who had been fighting with other customers, began a fight with a group of elite Marines – the MARSOC 3. The contractor was escorted from the bar, and all was well until Gilmet, Draher, and Negron decided to go home for the evening. Upon leaving the bar, the three Marines were confronted by the contractor. Despite trying to avoid a confrontation, the contractor struck one of the Warriors twice in the face and was in the process of throwing a third punch. In defense of his Marine brother, one of the men struck the contractor – just once – and sent him to the ground. The Marines stayed with the man for _hours_ , even bringing him back to base for medical care throughout the night after his “friends” abandoned him. But, the contractor tragically passed due to complications from his intoxicated state. What followed was and still is one of the most unjust trials our military justice system has ever seen.
**The MARSOC 3 Raiders are still fighting against bias, unlawful command influence, and intense intimidation tactics.** [_**FIGHT FOR JUSTICE >>**_](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=4e646739cbbe49369668278e2df37cdd&_e=0tlNF5eBaw05B73Up718RxNceSvpnOHn6RIftB8pL_N5u8wTIMYsFm3cc1ihMgDIvCGTNO__kNZbTc8OCJdHEefmkoCHQx6ETC6-4IZhAchopxfDZy7m1wL-X3m3-VBtegQJk5j7Qs-w61bAPHQv01mNuKiJdWr1P0FyqLgs7GN-OmXU5CABbFFaKV9Laz_wjGCQHRusmTxXMGW-8R6H9RoG_w6bP6ts_-vcG_TX3yQz2S5Pmx4FI1LziiYh368oXzU1iEpvDNuwEWjXDHfi94jgmYBWLyiBcGE73KjmLHCJ9Bv00gDQAfGHPS5vryJzz4ijBgq-lKAbs2txwUQAOVDEbrxTU_bT6YqH2oOoLuYchUB559h4nyX_epKp9I2F7aAlzDDOAw8dqPTN7W-DqifWQjCmhTQzQ6H4sBeIJIp46fjcBO5Kw6eAiCqSzX1woQJUOvmH9KnHTygCCSvN8Q%3D%3D)

[**_Peter, we’re reaching out to freedom-loving Americans like you because we need YOUR help to defend the MARSOC 3._**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=4e646739cbbe49369668278e2df37cdd&_e=0tlNF5eBaw05B73Up718RxNceSvpnOHn6RIftB8pL_N5u8wTIMYsFm3cc1ihMgDIvCGTNO__kNZbTc8OCJdHEefmkoCHQx6ETC6-4IZhAchopxfDZy7m1wL-X3m3-VBtegQJk5j7Qs-w61bAPHQv01mNuKiJdWr1P0FyqLgs7GN-OmXU5CABbFFaKV9Laz_wjGCQHRusmTxXMGW-8R6H9RoG_w6bP6ts_-vcG_TX3yQz2S5Pmx4FI1LziiYh368oXzU1iEpvDNuwEWjXDHfi94jgmYBWLyiBcGE73KjmLHCn1ozQ6pfi_-wxne7mp4En9mxxUgUxjHpksmchHzo9-CPxuG5RFXFopI6XzHzdFzBvuyqIuY6rIqqoeISWMGklpRpCrm10wYfLe2WjlCIuqU9krZH5CFonHQ_VjzP3CZL2ZRUkUOKfE533qa_vxJXb5gHVOhVE1UWTVAHr-ZepGQ%3D%3D) United American Patriots is working to prove these Heroes are innocent, and we’re approaching a critical milestone. **After waiting for over three years and numerous motion hearings, a****January 17th****trial date is scheduled for Gunnery Sergeants Danny Draher and Joshua Negron.** This is where you come in, Peter. We’re counting on patriotic Americans like you to contribute to the UAP Warrior Fund to help these Heroes prepare for their trial.

clean_body: We owe it to them to fight for their freedom.| | | Peter, When American Heroes take the oath to protect and serve by enlisting in our armed forces, they are willing to make the ultimate sacrifice to defend freedom. For you. For me. For every American. These Warriors put on their uniforms every day – and they are willing to make the ultimate sacrifice in the name of freedom, liberty, and justice. Unfortunately, three of those very Heroes had the freedoms they worked so hard to protect ripped away from them. Chief Petty Officer Eric Gilmet and Gunnery Sergeants Danny Draher and Joshua Negron were falsely accused of a heinous crime. Their defense team was threatened. And they’re facing up to 25 years in prison for a crime they didn’t commit. What started as a regular night of celebration ended in a tragic death and three innocent Warriors facing life behind bars. It all started at a bar when a civilian contractor, who had been fighting with other customers, began a fight with a group of elite Marines – the MARSOC 3. The contractor was escorted from the bar, and all was well until Gilmet, Draher, and Negron decided to go home for the evening. Upon leaving the bar, the three Marines were confronted by the contractor. Despite trying to avoid a confrontation, the contractor struck one of the Warriors twice in the face and was in the process of throwing a third punch. In defense of his Marine brother, one of the men struck the contractor – just once – and sent him to the ground. The Marines stayed with the man for hours , even bringing him back to base for medical care throughout the night after his “friends” abandoned him. But, the contractor tragically passed due to complications from his intoxicated state. What followed was and still is one of the most unjust trials our military justice system has ever seen. The MARSOC 3 Raiders are still fighting against bias, unlawful command influence, and intense intimidation tactics. United American Patriots is working to prove these Heroes are innocent, and we’re approaching a critical milestone. After waiting for over three years and numerous motion hearings, aJanuary 17thtrial date is scheduled for Gunnery Sergeants Danny Draher and Joshua Negron. This is where you come in, Peter. We’re counting on patriotic Americans like you to contribute to the UAP Warrior Fund to help these Heroes prepare for their trial. Our Warrior Fund covers the fees and associated defense expenses so our Heroes can access the best attorneys, investigators, and media experts. And it’s CRITICAL for the days and weeks leading up to this long-awaited trial. Thank you for your help. Semper Fi’ David “Bull” Gurfein LtCol., USMCR (Ret.) CEO, United American Patriots | | | | | ---|--- UAP, Inc. is a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization. Donations are tax deductible. name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Smoky, back-room deals in Congress, now … with more actual smoke.
body:
More smoking in Congress?
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te0344ca2-6204-4e91-8352-95c239aeec4b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, _Are they really trying to make themselves extinct? Republicans, that is. Because if they aren't, it'd be hard to tell the difference. _ [I talked about this in my newest video at the Blue Amp Channel this week. Please go watch and in the comments let me know what you think!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7200881b-2846-42f1-846c-bf66a90bcb94/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) When I was a college student in Philly in the mid-90s, I'd go to this one Irish pub downtown. You'd have to navigate your way through a haze of smoke when you walked in, and for the rest of the night you'd smell like an ashtray (and if you didn't shower that night, everything you touched at home would too). [Well, that's a big part of what this video is about (Please Watch it!).](https://default.salsalabs.org/T05de3923-72bb-4b64-a405-024f27ba1afe/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Now you can also smell that way if you're a staffer, intern, constituent, media, personal security or anyone else unlucky enough to be stuck in a Republican House member's office for more than 10 minutes. And also perhaps die of an untreatable disease in the future. **_[Because in addition to idiotically getting rid of metal detectors to get to the House floor, once Republicans took over the House they added smoking in congressional offices to the inane rule changes they made](https://default.salsalabs.org/T18a56dce-add9-4d16-b039-bf22d07fcff0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) that resemble the decision making of an emotionally stunted six-year old._** _Let me be clear: If you're a smoker, that's your right! I'm not criticizing you in the slightest. We all get to make certain decisions for ourselves. But, we don't get to make those choices for other people. Just as I'll never accept Republicans deciding if my children should be safe from gunfire at school, sudden storms due to climate change or have access to a COVID vaccine. _ [But Republicans, due to their own emotional frailty and need to strike out at imaginary tormentors, think we should all have to suffer from their choices.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5dee4506-efcd-40ea-931f-1cdcc242b6ad/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [That's what this video is about.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdf030a1d-6588-49b2-bcf4-842718e7b969/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) And this mentality of theirs is so central to the problems we're having--ones they won't allow us to solve--in this country right now. It's childish. It's selfish. It's obscene I[ hope you'll watch the video and share it, as we continue to fight for our right to choose to lead a healthy, productive life.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T18088c15-b37a-4f5c-a3df-e8f865e5788d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thanks for reading and (hopefully) [watching](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td082feaa-150b-41d8-b7ce-eb531e533e1a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9).

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1231500c-c889-4678-b39e-b61719f79c8a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | | or

clean_body: SOON: Fed-surrection Exposed. --> | | | | == | Peter, | You and the Patriot 20 who held the line with me during the Speaker vote have helped deliver a CRUCIAL commitment from Kevin McCarthy... A pledge to release EVERY SECOND of the video security footage from January 6th that will EXONERATE OUR PATRIOTS! == == For too long under this Regime, Joe Biden and his henchmen have been trying to scare the entire country into thinking that MAGA was some kind of threat... They locked Trump supporters in solitary confinement over this. They wanted to take out our Movement FOR GOOD. And in the old GOP days, Peter, weak RINOs would have just rolled over and accepted the Left's narrative... Not anymore. You and the MAGA Movement stood with me and made sure our party fought on OFFENSE, demanding that the truth from the JAN 6 FED-SURRECTION BE REVEALED! | | == | Take a look: | == | Things are looking up for our patriots and our movement, Peter. But we're not out of the woods yet - the Democrats and Never Trump RINOs aren't going to let their Jan 6 "insurrection" lies be exposed without a fight! Because they know if this House of Cards falls down, the entire country will see them for the liars and propagandists that they are... The truth about the Russia Hoax has already been exposed. The double standard about their "Classified Documents" attack on Trump has already been revealed (my constituents care about inflation - not this BS!). So if their January 6th narrative falls apart, too?! These fraudsters will have NOTHING left! And that's why they won't just let us expose the Fed-surrection that easily, Peter - == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | Thanks for not backing down, | == | Matt Gaetz Republican, Florida's 1st District | | | | | | == | == == | Copyright (C) 2022 Friends of Matt Gaetz, All rights reserved. name: MarkKelly.com
subject: [Signature Needed] Add your name and support Mark Kelly >>
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
It would mean a lot.
#

Friends —
Thanks to the support of so many of you, Mark was finally sworn in to a full six-year term in the U.S. Senate.
In 2020, tens of thousands of folks signed on to say they were with Mark. Thousands more did the same in 2022. Their support was one of the reasons we were so successful, and we couldn’t be more thankful for everyone who stepped up.
But now, Mark needs our help on this new mission: _delivering for the people of Arizona and the United States in the Senate, and bringing science, data, and facts back to Congress._
**So today, we’re respectfully asking you to sign on and personally endorse Mark Kelly. We’d be honored if you would renew your support for our next mission ahead.**
[**Will you add your name to say you personally support Mark Kelly? It’s important for Mark to know that he can count on you to fight by his side.**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/endorse_mark_kelly_jan23_em_copy/?source=em230117-1-7&refcode2=4897.6688874.11DhHA&akid=4897%2E6688874%2E11DhHA)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/endorse_mark_kelly_jan23_em_copy/?source=em230117-1-7&refcode2=4897.6688874.11DhHA&akid=4897%2E6688874%2E11DhHA)**
Adding your name to support Mark is a simple and quick action, but it speaks volumes to what we are trying to do here:_support Mark in the Senate so he can keep delivering real results to improve people’s lives._
Because when you and thousands of others all step up and say you’re with Mark, you become part of our ongoing team.
Thank you in advance for adding your name, and for having Mark’s back.
Team Kelly

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=4897%2E6688874%2E11DhHA).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Andrew=20Roth?=
subject: Blasting in 2023!
body:
| | | |
---
| | | Friends,

**Whew! The past two weeks have been amazing!**

First, the House Freedom Caucus asserted its influence against the Establishment Uniparty in Washington, enabling them to get massive concessions from Speaker McCarthy that will directly benefit taxpayers and the American public.

Then, this past week, almost all 50 states gaveled into their 2023 legislative sessions. That means your 10 state freedom caucuses were arming up to do battle on your behalf. And the battle has officially begun.
Before we give you a quick roundup of what’s happening in the states, here are some of the Network’s media hits that got national attention:
* SFCN President Andy Roth was in studio with Glenn Beck. Glenn and Andy [shared](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=f9d1fbbfbf&e=64ecec6d03) their mutual disgust at the corruption that is happening at the state level.
* Andy also penned [an op-ed](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=7ad67b4ccb&e=64ecec6d03) in Townhall.com entitled, “The House Freedom Caucus Deserves Your Applause”.
* Andy was also on The Blaze’s Conservative Review podcast with Daniel Horowitz. They [discussed](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=544cd55d17&e=64ecec6d03) how to take the red states back from the RINOs.
* Lastly, Andy was a guest on the Family Research Council’s Washington Watch with former Congressman Jody Hice filling in for Tony Perkins. Here’s [a clip](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=9d7b66dc4e&e=64ecec6d03) of that interview.

**SOUTH CAROLINA** The speaker and majority leader of the state house are threatening to kick the 19 brave men and women in the South Carolina Freedom Caucus out of the House GOP caucus. What was their sin? They refused to sign a Stalinist “loyalty oath” meant to shut them down. From [FITS News](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=ef141eac24&e=64ecec6d03):

_This news outlet previously reported on some drama that went down during the House’s organizational session last month regarding a so-called “loyalty oath.” This oath – which is being pushed by new “Republican” majority leader Davey Hiott of Pickens County and S.C. speaker pro tempore Tommy Pope – would prohibit members from endorsing or campaigning on behalf of anyone challenging a GOP incumbent in next spring’s primary elections. It would also prohibit lawmakers from posting images of the House’s electronic voting board on their social media pages – and from discussing the “internal processes” behind House votes during public appearances. Basically it’s an incumbent protection ultimatum – accompanied by a muzzle._
House Freedom Caucus member, Rep. Ralph Norman, defended his friends in the SC Freedom Caucus in [a Facebook post](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=236b6e0178&e=64ecec6d03). He wrote, “Duly elected Republicans in the South Carolina House of Representatives are apparently being told by leadership to sign an oath. Among other things, this oath strictly prohibits public discussion of things heard or discussed during any Caucus meeting or event. Who on earth thought of that? And who among us thinks that’s a good idea? It’s not.”
Former Senator Jim DeMint [provided](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=1a5701c494&e=64ecec6d03) air support as well: “Instead of threatening the SC Freedom Caucus, our state’s Republican leadership should be following their lead.”
If you want to help pile on, please call SC House Majority Leader Davey Hiott and let him know how you feel! His office number is (803) 734-3138.

**ARIZONA** As Arizona Freedom Caucus member State Rep. Joseph Chaplick [said](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=20858dfd50&e=64ecec6d03), “[Democrat Governor] Katie Hobbs is already violating our state Constitution and it took her less than a day.”

The governor issued an executive order that would expand anti-discrimination protections for state employees and contractors. While this might sound good, this “woke” order could negatively affect faith-based organizations – like foster care agencies – that contract with the state. As Arizona Freedom Caucus Chairman and State Senator Jake Hoffman [said](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=0d392461b0&e=64ecec6d03), “If Katie Hobbs wants to legislate, she needs to get her butt out of the Governor’s Office and run for the legislature and come back and join us and do that job.”

Governor Hobbs also wants to defund Arizona’s new universal school choice program. AZFC member Alex Kolodin [tweeted](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=b286ad930c&e=64ecec6d03), “Katie Hobbs claims she wants an "Arizona for everyone". Her budget says that poor kids need to stay in their lane - not darken the door of ritzy private schools like the one she went to. Guess they're no one. Let's put a skinny budget that preserves school choice on her desk!

**IDAHO** IDFC member State Senator Chris Trakel recently spoke out against a local school board that is considering letting biological boys go into the girls’ locker room. His comments caught the national attention of Fox & Friends. Check out his interview [here](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=4bbd621d4b&e=64ecec6d03).

Also in Idaho, liberal Republican Governor Brad Little proposed this week to give meritless pay raises to government-run schoolteachers. He also proposed the creation of a new tuition subsidy for higher education...rather than push aggressively for school choice. The Idaho Freedom Caucus quickly put out a statement saying, “[T]he governor gives a nod to socialism by increasing the pay for all, regardless of how good or bad a teacher may be.”

On the higher education subsidy, the Idaho Freedom Caucus wrote, “This is something we expect from the Biden administration, not from ‘conservative’ Idaho. Welfare education is a tool of socialist countries, not a path to limited government and fiscal conservatism.”

Meanwhile...state senators in the Idaho Freedom Caucus recently [announced](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=fefc79d743&e=64ecec6d03) their education savings account bill at a well-attended school choice townhall meeting.

If the governor’s not going to lead, the Idaho Freedom Caucus will! **ILLINOIS** “We don’t trust you...I can tell you that we will not comply. And you’re not going to do a darn thing about it because the law, the Constitution, and the founding principles are on our side!”

ILFC member Blaine Wilhour, directing his comments to the Democrats, said those passionate words after the Left passed an unconstitutional assault weapons ban. His [floor speech](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=807fd3faf7&e=64ecec6d03) caught the attention of Tucker Carlson, who had him on his show last night. Watch it [here](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=d6da2e9fca&e=64ecec6d03).

ILFC Chairman Chris Miller also gave a floor speech thanking the House Freedom Caucus in DC for fighting McCarthy and getting meaningful reforms. Watch [here](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=9508b1b3e8&e=64ecec6d03).

**If you liked this email, please consider doing two things – forward this email to your friends and donate to the Network by clicking the link below.**

---
| [CLICK HERE TO DONATE](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=9c49c9e53e&e=64ecec6d03 "CLICK HERE TO DONATE")
---
| [ ](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=dcf73810d8&e=64ecec6d03)
---
| | |
---
| _Copyright © 2023 State Freedom Caucus Network, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
State Freedom Caucus Network300 Independence Ave SEWashington, DC 20003-1021
[Add us to your address book](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=7256df9da1)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/profile?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=7256df9da1&e=64ecec6d03&c=2906320bf7) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=7256df9da1&e=64ecec6d03&c=2906320bf7).
---

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: How We Win
body:
I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, How We Win -- just in time for Christmas! [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0472%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=iuQqtFvkUqB526259QVajA&sysid=1)
| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c656947%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Q%2fQDPyKPp3Jx10QaUn1QZw&sysid=1)
---
Fellow Patriot, I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, _How We Win!_ **While supplies last, you can get a copy of this brand-new book to give to a conservative friend or family member (or to add to your personal library) when you make a gift of _ANY AMOUNT_ to Turning Point USA.**
---
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c656947%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Q%2fQDPyKPp3Jx10QaUn1QZw&sysid=1)
---
[**Just click here to make your gift and claim your copy before it's gone!**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c656948%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fSh8mRlVzovLTiPUqSuAsw&sysid=1)
---
[Get my book](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c656949%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RDOfN4iuCnkh0ViBjkKepA&sysid=1)
---
Until now, Turning Point USA has been giving this book away as a thank-you gift for donations of $100 or more... **...but generous TPUSA supporters found the message of _How We Win_ to be so _URGENT_ and so _IMPORTANT_ that they're helping me get it into the hands of as many grassroots patriots as possible.** [**I hope you'll make your gift to Turning Point USA right now and claim your copy of _How We Win_ before it's gone. Let me tell you -- these books are flying out of our warehouse!**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c656940%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fBK2bkJmf1owfJVqdJTrFw&sysid=1) _How We Win_ is my prescription for a new conservative movement that will SAVE America once and for all. You see, after TEN YEARS at the helm of Turning Point USA... ... TEN YEARS criss-crossing the country... ... TEN YEARS engaging with the good, the bad, and the ugly on college campuses... ... I have come to the conclusion that the time has passed where conservatives can hope to simply persuade liberal radicals to come around to our way of thinking. That simply isn't going to happen. We must become a movement that's unafraid to stand up for what's right... a movement that's done pulling punches and will _FIGHT_ for the moral and philosophical foundations that have made our nation the greatest in the history of the world. **_How We Win_ is my handbook for how we can become that movement -- and how we can secure victories for American Greatness that will last for generations to come.** And this special book can be YOURS for a gift of ANY AMOUNT today! [**Please -- if you haven't claimed your copy already, click here to get it now.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c656941%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hl7sVD6nJ%2f6%2bufhWvirZ4Q&sysid=1)
---
[Get my book](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c656949%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RDOfN4iuCnkh0ViBjkKepA&sysid=1)
---
Even a gift of just $5 will help us ship the book to you and get this vitally important knowledge into the hands of patriots all across America. And best of all, when you make a generous gift today, you can rest assured that you're doing more than just getting a book. You're investing in the most powerful conservative youth organization in America. You see, with over 500,000 patriotic high school and college students on over 3,000 campuses nationwide, TPUSA isn't just _talking_ about saving America... **... we're _DOING IT!_** With the partnership of friends like you, we're helping high school and college students love America again. We’re helping to restore patriotism and love of country as a way of life for hundreds of thousands of young Americans every year and changing the trajectory of a generation. This is your invitation to participate in that nation-saving work, my friend. [**It all starts when you claim your copy of How We Win -- which can be YOURS for a gift of any amount today!**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c656942%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JFEm1L64mKxdej60%2fekeJw&sysid=1)
---
| | [Get my book ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c656943%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=02Se4XNSgaLWpjpd9tRUFw&sysid=1)
---
For America,
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA
---
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0472%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=iuQqtFvkUqB526259QVajA&sysid=1)_
