name: American Defense News
subject: Take the National Survey on Socialism
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?”
| | | This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ziooknm47dvit0hiflfonenlb0qnafm43qhohgl0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjie0p34c1h2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York_ magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a “Great Reset” of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ —Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty—author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as “‘capitalism with Chinese characteristics’—a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below.” Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for—and opposition to—socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ziekuptsk3f07rbi3m4lik9ft77b6gpmmopljlk8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjie0p34c1h2bs)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages.** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left’s “long march through the institutions”—including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory—which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race—are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale’s work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That’s why I need your thoughts quickly.** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism** in the next five days**,** your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z9cr6l0uhg0agaocch3auoepobckh60nkqosbkv0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjie0p34c1h2bs)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember—**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Defense News, [please use this preferences page](https://e.americandefensenews.com/prefs/9z2zbinfmkg7adidqf5k2fthjbag5n7a3iquh591un8).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zdn3gltqefe4erbc6tpsb7sov5p1a3nqfonaqceo_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7cpie9o34chg649fg)

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: A new conservative movement
body:
I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, How We Win!
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zv8dja8tbpuctires9m1kgf4n05g4fkafqk20p8o_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjge9or7clh2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot, I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, _How We Win!_ **While supplies last, you can get a copy of this brand-new book to give to a conservative friend or family member (or to add to your personal library) when you make a gift of _ANY AMOUNT_ to Turning Point USA.**
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zild8v2a7gaoed04jk1foom8dn58vrtrg2mqttj0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjge9or7clh2bs)
---
[**Just click here to make your gift and claim your copy before it's gone!**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdpidhe25u72ek1gcg7dp243sbs3jfep3m1n62ao_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjge9or7clh2bs)
---
[Get my book](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zcnr387aoqihvou5l5s7qbtt39od4j2471pid4so_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjge9or7clh2bs)
---
Until now, Turning Point USA has been giving this book away as a thank-you gift for donations of $100 or more... **...but generous TPUSA supporters found the message of _How We Win_ to be so _URGENT_ and so _IMPORTANT_ that they're helping me get it into the hands of as many grassroots patriots as possible.** [**I hope you'll make your gift to Turning Point USA right now and claim your copy of _How We Win_ before it's gone. Let me tell you -- these books are flying out of our warehouse!**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zagqabmppviplc44q2eiq8k9ve2bohcmv1u07370_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjge9or7clh2bs) _How We Win_ is my prescription for a new conservative movement that will SAVE America once and for all. You see, after TEN YEARS at the helm of Turning Point USA... ... TEN YEARS criss-crossing the country... ... TEN YEARS engaging with the good, the bad, and the ugly on college campuses... ... I have come to the conclusion that the time has passed where conservatives can hope to simply persuade liberal radicals to come around to our way of thinking. That simply isn't going to happen. We must become a movement that's unafraid to stand up for what's right... a movement that's done pulling punches and will _FIGHT_ for the moral and philosophical foundations that have made our nation the greatest in the history of the world. **_How We Win_ is my handbook for how we can become that movement -- and how we can secure victories for American Greatness that will last for generations to come.** And this special book can be YOURS for a gift of ANY AMOUNT today! [**Please -- if you haven't claimed your copy already, click here to get it now.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zos1tcb07qoo4r638e89kcruebmhalouetgs4jr8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjge9or7clh2bs)
---
[Get my book](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ztjfr766j8efvu76kqa959cdlbqv8119r1fkvqto_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjge9or7clh2bs)
---
Even a gift of just $5 will help us ship the book to you and get this vitally important knowledge into the hands of patriots all across America. And best of all, when you make a generous gift today, you can rest assured that you're doing more than just getting a book. You're investing in the most powerful conservative youth organization in America. You see, with over 500,000 patriotic high school and college students on over 3,000 campuses nationwide, TPUSA isn't just _talking_ about saving America... **... we're _DOING IT!_** With the partnership of friends like you, we're helping high school and college students love America again. We’re helping to restore patriotism and love of country as a way of life for hundreds of thousands of young Americans every year and changing the trajectory of a generation. This is your invitation to participate in that nation-saving work, my friend. [**It all starts when you claim your copy of How We Win -- which can be YOURS for a gift of any amount today!**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7o329uje7d78g6g781f8plk3mbtnk0pegqhv8h0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjge9or7clh2bs)
---
| | [Get my book ](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z69i9bumco4emut4so1fvmqh9pm3um9bab727k8o_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjge9or7clh2bs)
---
For America,
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA
---
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

625 First St #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Candace Owens
subject: You’re a weird person… Want to know why?
body:
Because you love our country, FIGHT for Faith, Family, and Freedom, and see through the lies of victimhood culture and the media
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z36tlsk4fn24ue0o5rlr6a3f2inhgj9i3ifr0t00_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjie0p34cph2bs)

Friend,

You are not normal.

Some would call you strange.

In fact, the media, our deranged culture, and our government may even consider you dangerous...

Why?

**Because you love our country, FIGHT for Faith, Family, and Freedom, and see through the lies of victimhood culture and the media. **

This makes you a weirdo in today's society.

Well, it makes me a weirdo too. A proud one.

However, I've been called much nastier than weirdo. I've been called racist, an "Uncle Tom," evil, a Nazi, Hitler, the Devil, and every name in the book. The media and unhinged social media activists have even attacked my children with nasty messages.

Why?

Because as a young black woman, the media DOES NOT want me to believe in Faith, Family, and Freedom. I'm not _" allowed"_ to speak out against what's happening in our public schools and how the media and the culture of victimhood are destroying the lives of minorities in our inner cities.

_Well, I refuse to let the fear of being a "weirdo" stop me from fighting for our country_.

**Which is why I am asking you to join me, and thousands of other "weirdos," to support the BLEXIT Foundation!**

The BLEXIT Foundation is my non-profit organization dedicated to uplifting and empowering minorities with our message of independence, entrepreneurship, and the importance of Faith, Family, and Freedom. The BLEXIT movement is fostering patriotism in Black America, and destroying the culture of victimhood the media is forcing upon young minorities.

[_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation reach our fundraising goal of $10,000 by making a donation of any amount! **_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztj31j5hqdklcgrvtlr8tfhcjbf6u08rktcsp9e0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjie0p34cph2bs)

[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z94jk27ch7chkb2ukcjd0m0ubknnq7aopv9rjejg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjie0p34cph2bs)

I know this is a long email... Please keep reading so I can tell you more about the BLEXIT movement, our 14,000 members, and something **BIG** at the end of this message.

The BLEXIT movement, our family of proud 'weirdos', has over 14,000 members, and 60,000 grassroots supporters with chapters in 43 states and D.C.

**The BLEXIT family is dedicated to changing the direction of our country and culture. **

Here is how the BLEXIT Foundation fights for Faith, Family, and Freedom:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT 's efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z66a2t8mq284b3nns222sdp6373p0k9nhb82nv00_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjie0p34cph2bs)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z490mevf2hrk5g7ki39ltishd2eld36quam4th9g_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjie0p34cph2bs)

* **Fostering Black Patriotism:** Critical Race Theory does not solve race relations in our country. Nor does teaching young people in urban communities to distrust or even hate police officers.

This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes fostering patriotism in urban communities will heal communities. We also believe teaching REAL American history will cultivate better-educated and more predictive citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation foster patriotism in Black America by donating here >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqie6ddmkblvv8s90i2tb2v28iuvmh5l52ggvgeg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjie0p34cph2bs)

* **Faith and Family:** Strong family bonds and a belief in our Savior, Jesus Christ, is our GREATEST defense against a sick culture, division, and the Woke agenda. We teach the importance of supporting families and how the nuclear family can heal urban communities.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation 's mission by helping us reach our $10,000 goal! You can make a donation of any amount by clicking here. **_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsaqf83l35agtafgn493jc60kbsfa871u40c8r7o_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjie0p34cph2bs)

Okay... I promised you something BIG at the end of this email.

**Do you want to know the ultimate goal of the public school system, the media, victimhood culture, and the Woke agenda? I can unmask their dirty secret right now ...**

_Here it is ... Their goal is destroying the nuclear famil_y.

It sounds so simple.

And it is.

Once these radicals separate fathers from their children, teach kids to reject family values, skip family dinners, and destroy the family unit... it's game over for the United States. In many ways, the family is our last defense against the Woke agenda, the media, public schools, and even our government.

It's no secret Black families are a primary target of the enemies of liberty.

They wish to remove fathers from Black families, shatter trust in the institution, and have young minorities turn to the government or false idols for solutions, rather than their family or God.

You and I CANNOT allow them to win this fight.

Please help the BLEXIT Foundation fight for our country, empower minority communities with our message, and win the hearts and minds of thousands.

As I said in the beginning of this email... You and I are weird.

We believe in Faith, Family, and Freedom. And we're willing to fight for it.

[_**I 'm asking you to be different today. Please consider making a gift of $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or ANY amount by clicking here. **_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zeqfet3njjd5fchtcodnonh67ui219u4qgn0khl0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjie0p34cph2bs)

Thank you for everything,

Candace Owens
President

name: Paul  Bud  Haedike, American Veterans Center
subject: I was at D-Day
body:
| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=acff036521d94378b295ee8f78e56904&_e=2cy_dE6KBmgrq0eXliSqGto14aeNkRx8g4cwaQVXOKNyMqjedMPCTzjPjIOctHhgCfrV1gYQ1hrPQLBj-fWor1rXhCgrIAa3JynjgvAiaV7tWfxav-l9B9BFpkp_31lbrHN7OzL4UzS7BovdVjjyi8mB236pSW0rN_vG1n3LV6xVXOtvh4yWkKXMKgtVBtxjZX4yAgGq5BC6DbeIr3-jE5RU3d0wWEveFTZuTeqdGlf9TayKZYo3P9lnxpuzZ3ERYMGswNf-DZJp7z9dqsuHjWw5iGXHhUJtsUbswwQn29g%3D)
---
Fellow American, My plane was shot down by the Germans in my first combat mission in World War II. Our rookie B-17 crew was in "Tail End Charlie," which is what we called the last plane in the formation to pass over the target. The Germans had zeroed in on us with 88 millimeter cannons -- which could fire five miles up -- and they hit our number one and number two engine. A B-17 is not made to stay up on two engines. But with skill, determination, and good fortune, we crash-landed in Belgium just over the Nazi lines. Five days later, we were rescued ... and I went on to fly 22 more missions.
---
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=acff036521d94378b295ee8f78e56904&_e=2cy_dE6KBmgrq0eXliSqGto14aeNkRx8g4cwaQVXOKNyMqjedMPCTzjPjIOctHhgCfrV1gYQ1hrPQLBj-fWor1rXhCgrIAa3JynjgvAiaV7tWfxav-l9B9BFpkp_31lbrHN7OzL4UzS7BovdVjjyi-XTnp11W80C0Qqqm958vdX6IvVyvalmuJ_l7IgnUBJ6iWKEG5h3zKBAqYdHxELM6zhi1zV3J1CSC9AYeyRHC-knplFcCwerKsqC5-y3SDbbbDUTQceFoaw-MiNYEHxLwJng371cOXVc7CYr3ONqFfc%3D)
---
_Above: The American Veterans Center recorded and released a 30-minute video documentary with me about my service in World War II._
---
**A few years ago, my friends at the American Veterans Center invited me to record a video documentary about my experience in World War II.** I was proud to share my story with the American Veterans Center (AVC), both to honor the memories of the brave men I served with and to pass on our hard-fought lessons to the next generation. Right now, the American Veterans Center is working around the clock to interview and record as many video documentaries as possible with World War II veterans like me. [**May I ask you to chip in $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more today to help fund the American Veterans Center** '**s critical video documentary project? As a non-profit, AVC depends on the contributions of patriotic Americans like you.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=acff036521d94378b295ee8f78e56904&_e=2cy_dE6KBmgrq0eXliSqGto14aeNkRx8g4cwaQVXOKNyMqjedMPCTzjPjIOctHhgCfrV1gYQ1hrPQLBj-fWor1rXhCgrIAa3JynjgvAiaV7tWfxav-l9B9BFpkp_31lbrHN7OzL4UzS7BovdVjjyix7jhSOOQf0xRfDs04SlovYmMScCMCa8H8ijOShr7_XeExUH6PybdK4pRwEavjsb3Nym9dVoP9QFLPYbAFNaqeH9W7of9aJQ84Ax4YwcTtdb5ru1FRssQygCI5F_TP98D6EcNLVt8Hg-xUzxbQwwZM4%3D)
---
[Help the American Veterans Center](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=acff036521d94378b295ee8f78e56904&_e=2cy_dE6KBmgrq0eXliSqGto14aeNkRx8g4cwaQVXOKNyMqjedMPCTzjPjIOctHhgCfrV1gYQ1hrPQLBj-fWor1rXhCgrIAa3JynjgvAiaV7tWfxav-l9B9BFpkp_31lbrHN7OzL4UzS7BovdVjjyi-lqij6w5pdSWfXYG5wdH-AsFDoO-3gvVPhjZIgRCAi639Cu-GhyfI4PGjFKuY7rDOOJIZe_6p6jUmHluqYOk5IbBf1zCLxdEycu2dWLMq_vyoMhVJOCfDg_1mP1J41tGbPuekPEvfJj72z64vGmyJo%3D)
---
When the American Veterans Center records video documentaries with veterans like me:
• The experienced AVC video team coordinates travel plans with the veteran and his or her family. Oftentimes, AVC will even send out their staff to veterans' homes - of course, at no cost to the veteran.

• AVC records a beautiful, professional-quality video documentary that lets veterans tell their own stories in their own words. A keepsake copy is also given to the veteran and their family to enjoy. • AVC makes available - for free! - these powerful video documentaries to be used as part of our shared American history. These videos reach millions on YouTube and have been used by the Library of Congress, presidential museums, and award-winning films. [**Can I count on you to help the American Veterans Center record even more video documentaries with your gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more today? Your gift is urgently needed for AVC to continue their efforts.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=acff036521d94378b295ee8f78e56904&_e=2cy_dE6KBmgrq0eXliSqGto14aeNkRx8g4cwaQVXOKNyMqjedMPCTzjPjIOctHhgCfrV1gYQ1hrPQLBj-fWor1rXhCgrIAa3JynjgvAiaV7tWfxav-l9B9BFpkp_31lbrHN7OzL4UzS7BovdVjjyi3Gw2UE1EwaAfrOIk9HcQFwMyEGhOeFcYLunS774Xd82uDQvcjrsovSKoCxgWHrOZ7vQwVbIK0Vy8x4um-an94rpmd0gTwWPqJhdt86zBGsD9h8PMjxc1XAgcNjm8_DEtrMorAYZp1SjO4IgwandWeg%3D)
---
[Help the American Veterans Center](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=acff036521d94378b295ee8f78e56904&_e=2cy_dE6KBmgrq0eXliSqGto14aeNkRx8g4cwaQVXOKNyMqjedMPCTzjPjIOctHhgCfrV1gYQ1hrPQLBj-fWor1rXhCgrIAa3JynjgvAiaV7tWfxav-l9B9BFpkp_31lbrHN7OzL4UzS7BovdVjjyi1aeA3UX-xW2zUcpWZBaii6bbNe-XI11tjUuuQkZ2YI5H3uTcHsqfjQzSJj6lgjTagqcoRmuFK8w9JfkL-iOASQuO6erUD7pLhAX9x7FVCYAzansZO7SEXRiLRBCV9DmveNx5sFojvs9rAwC5QEohQk%3D)
---
The history books will teach you the facts, but only the servicemen and women of World War II can tell you what it was really like. In the beginning of the war, they said if a guy flew six or eight missions, he was on borrowed time. There were many men who served with me who didn't come home. They didn't get to be husbands, didn't get to be dads, and none of them got to be grandfathers -- which you can't understand until you reach that point in your own life. _Thanks to the American Veterans Center, and generous Americans like you who made my video documentary possible, my story, and the story of the young men in the Eighth Air Force, has entered our shared American history._ [**To help preserve the legacy of more World War II veterans like me, please make your most generous gift to the American Veterans Center today.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=acff036521d94378b295ee8f78e56904&_e=2cy_dE6KBmgrq0eXliSqGto14aeNkRx8g4cwaQVXOKNyMqjedMPCTzjPjIOctHhgCfrV1gYQ1hrPQLBj-fWor1rXhCgrIAa3JynjgvAiaV7tWfxav-l9B9BFpkp_31lbrHN7OzL4UzS7BovdVjjyixNQpSWhfI4edwQYuu42DN3i-A7R1iNcRL7vAfV4XQTCPuoMbJ3AfWLhik-umZeIMB7QZaQOiDQnze1llD-xcog9_XLjeArIb0UpWlYL_YtfmLGBggKyxCS-2RTlBGwR2C3thXGZvmR8YgWDP6jhmyg%3D) I understand first-hand what good, important work the American Veterans Center does - and why their mission to record video documentaries with more veterans like me is so urgent. [**That** '**s why I** '**m asking for your support of the American Veterans Center today.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=acff036521d94378b295ee8f78e56904&_e=2cy_dE6KBmgrq0eXliSqGto14aeNkRx8g4cwaQVXOKNyMqjedMPCTzjPjIOctHhgCfrV1gYQ1hrPQLBj-fWor1rXhCgrIAa3JynjgvAiaV7tWfxav-l9B9BFpkp_31lbrHN7OzL4UzS7BovdVjjyiznEXqm2IgkkUDaBGyG0a_2rMVEXUCYOVj78C9awsctDE-cknu02poWnsh3fuLseLAOqylZdIEosMqzbrRGJ4EcBIR_Ga0FAUU9ZnIKHEiUk2yhMZQ5xGy5iMExs8QnbR_gxWUP4cGPAWYGRIuf8NOI%3D) Thank you,
---
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=acff036521d94378b295ee8f78e56904&_e=2cy_dE6KBmgrq0eXliSqGto14aeNkRx8g4cwaQVXOKNyMqjedMPCTzjPjIOctHhgCfrV1gYQ1hrPQLBj-fWor1rXhCgrIAa3JynjgvAiaV7tWfxav-l9B9BFpkp_31lbrHN7OzL4UzS7BovdVjjyi8sKQm7cOizMAGV906Jb9U6KSU-KbBpjQ0WKROe38HNyU90op6FKvp6GB4jDuNqTRkRduL-7yeNlxHen_WouEUGIfBJET5b0-1Fjt0j41J0obXZcnL4fLe0RYjX3fQNhXLuSud1iD01KYbSD-kaAxME%3D)
---
Paul "Bud" Haedike World War II Veteran For the American Veterans Center
---
[Support the American Veterans Center](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=acff036521d94378b295ee8f78e56904&_e=2cy_dE6KBmgrq0eXliSqGto14aeNkRx8g4cwaQVXOKNyMqjedMPCTzjPjIOctHhgCfrV1gYQ1hrPQLBj-fWor1rXhCgrIAa3JynjgvAiaV7tWfxav-l9B9BFpkp_31lbrHN7OzL4UzS7BovdVjjyiwmNaCxdeENs7lcRQq7qU_AkcUBsTAuiU73S8BIYrZVJKUNL5rZ6wphxy_Jo8gu_szrSmkSQoYVMCbvRvFja1E9ssg_6bPRzNswUomfr3XawBlsUDmgTAoG-Uw4zbcx4neq6WvjKobMmTJaZsMcF5P4%3D)
---

name: Candace Owens
subject: You’re a weird person… Want to know why?
body:
You are not normal. Some would call you strange.
[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2ztgh791j3prk7lpd5u17g9g6f38be4uive18e0eg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjie0oj0sth2bs)

Friend,

You are not normal.

Some would call you strange.

In fact, the media, our deranged culture, and our government may even consider you dangerous...

Why?

**Because you love our country, FIGHT for Faith, Family, and Freedom, and see through the lies of victimhood culture and the media. **

This makes you a weirdo in today's society.

Well, it makes me a weirdo too. A proud one.

However, I've been called much nastier than weirdo. I've been called racist, an "Uncle Tom," evil, a Nazi, Hitler, the Devil, and every name in the book. The media and unhinged social media activists have even attacked my children with nasty messages.

Why?

Because as a young black woman, the media DOES NOT want me to believe in Faith, Family, and Freedom. I'm not _" allowed"_ to speak out against what's happening in our public schools and how the media and the culture of victimhood are destroying the lives of minorities in our inner cities.

_Well, I refuse to let the fear of being a "weirdo" stop me from fighting for our country_.

**Which is why I am asking you to join me, and thousands of other "weirdos," to support the BLEXIT Foundation!**

The BLEXIT Foundation is my non-profit organization dedicated to uplifting and empowering minorities with our message of independence, entrepreneurship, and the importance of Faith, Family, and Freedom. The BLEXIT movement is fostering patriotism in Black America, and destroying the culture of victimhood the media is forcing upon young minorities.

[_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation reach our fundraising goal of $10,000 by making a donation of any amount! **_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zgsv2knpsfrcj354lmi34p9p11u9ledllv6jh9t0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjie0oj0sth2bs)

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z774f3t13g369q9neqruvjaid7q1d3hr9kht5ol0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjie0oj0sth2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zs614qhuu3vi4j4390fpi1jkoao973h30el90sro_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjie0oj0sth2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zeqgovivnjnnavi7ei7l8u3nom00pbpcj05tra2o_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjie0oj0sth2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zsb85kmd2l24d5hmhibm3qjaium1t2idvcfovii0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjie0oj0sth2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zice06snojb8ofkuva66sgp906s7i6bk6q6mn710_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjie0oj0sth2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zbneresdi6ufeorjk9bnjql6snhspreeois7u570_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjie0oj0sth2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z805hvucjrlr12jq0kh1d99ksl8hgtprur7njg98_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjie0oj0sth2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zfd13c8n49b1crm56n693ueevllhmlc9ol16fac8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjie0oj0sth2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z73hotuooes6bblanlbmlqp1o6cbjllbj1g938s0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjie0oj0sth2bs)

I know this is a long email... Please keep reading so I can tell you more about the BLEXIT movement, our 14,000 members, and something **BIG** at the end of this message.

The BLEXIT movement, our family of proud 'weirdos', has over 14,000 members, and 60,000 grassroots supporters with chapters in 43 states and D.C.

**The BLEXIT family is dedicated to changing the direction of our country and culture. **

Here is how the BLEXIT Foundation fights for Faith, Family, and Freedom:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT 's efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z8u7hs182lhshtr9shuf9skf1mak7q5ldfdt5go8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjie0oj0sth2bs)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z4vacdopbuog2ggbq75rkqegker915n3ana1gf30_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjie0oj0sth2bs)

* **Fostering Black Patriotism:** Critical Race Theory does not solve race relations in our country. Nor does teaching young people in urban communities to distrust or even hate police officers.

This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes fostering patriotism in urban communities will heal communities. We also believe teaching REAL American history will cultivate better-educated and more predictive citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation foster patriotism in Black America by donating here >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z55ok39n8vvmrhept9f6qkr5kv55f46ba4qacqtg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjie0oj0sth2bs)

* **Faith and Family:** Strong family bonds and a belief in our Savior, Jesus Christ, is our GREATEST defense against a sick culture, division, and the Woke agenda. We teach the importance of supporting families and how the nuclear family can heal urban communities.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation 's mission by helping us reach our $10,000 goal! You can make a donation of any amount by clicking here. **_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z7crdf2oajn5meo99tdm2g16hqhehbupve4613mg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjie0oj0sth2bs)

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z206f9pfbqgg7ae665mkomlg4ff1o3curhjd58vg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjie0oj0sth2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z8ogtmfm7r7e8va2j43vsjvs0dgcpfvracn8816g_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjie0oj0sth2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z4oeupv982171omf2e2e0vkntgasuv4rn3stm388_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjie0oj0sth2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2ztbqfgprgii039l0kpdrbm6ltk709db64paaekuo_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjie0oj0sth2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zcq5gj4aaavqr22mh6olgoirkurdndqk9cbhr778_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjie0oj0sth2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2ze7c2br97dita1ot63ibnr4snb4gng25eevvuvkg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjie0oj0sth2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z4aba1vnbfmqehln1jc9hgn5s64fvnilemf48n8o_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjie0oj0sth2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zr0ga5v6vmjcv5aq1st87i6t47sp66veo1j5pem8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjie0oj0sth2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zpat5qap5j5nnd9hbhv77r8jdk6vo4sudopfu6cg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjie0oj0sth2bs)

Okay... I promised you something BIG at the end of this email.

**Do you want to know the ultimate goal of the public school system, the media, victimhood culture, and the Woke agenda? I can unmask their dirty secret right now ...**

_Here it is ... Their goal is destroying the nuclear famil_y.

It sounds so simple.

And it is.

Once these radicals separate fathers from their children, teach kids to reject family values, skip family dinners, and destroy the family unit... it's game over for the United States. In many ways, the family is our last defense against the Woke agenda, the media, public schools, and even our government.

It's no secret Black families are a primary target of the enemies of liberty.

They wish to remove fathers from Black families, shatter trust in the institution, and have young minorities turn to the government or false idols for solutions, rather than their family or God.

You and I CANNOT allow them to win this fight.

Please help the BLEXIT Foundation fight for our country, empower minority communities with our message, and win the hearts and minds of thousands.

As I said in the beginning of this email... You and I are weird.

We believe in Faith, Family, and Freedom. And we're willing to fight for it.

[_**I 'm asking you to be different today. Please consider making a gift of $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or ANY amount by clicking here. **_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zouccd1g2ucufmskg7jfmgiiv5a7dl31tigln6do_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjie0oj0sth2bs)

Thank you for everything,

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation

By entering your information you consent to receiving emails, text messages and other marketing information from BLEXIT Foundation and other third party related groups. Unfortunately, we are not able to offer refunds on contributions._

subject: Biden is BUILDING A WALL!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
Friend, Biden is building a wall... around his beach house.

| |
---
| | | **Biden builds taxpayer-funded wall around Delaware beach house despite opposing border barriers**
**_FOX NEWS_**
Friend, Biden is building a wall... around his beach house.

That's right. After ushering in over 5 MILLION illegal immigrants in the past two years, Biden is building a _taxpayer-funded_ wall not at the southern border, but at his vacation home.

According to Fox News, the beach house border wall is expected to cost you a whopping $490,324 - money that could be spent building AN ACTUAL BORDER WALL!

House Republicans are going to hold Biden's feet to the fire. We _will_ secure our southern border, but need your help to do it. **[Can you pitch in just $5, $10, or $25 to help House Republicans secure the southern border?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkc0t3mqqi02pii8gdoljbl1ehcsm4h8kf4h3ec8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjie8oj4sdh2bs "Can you pitch in just $5, $10, or $25 to help House Republicans secure the southern border?")**

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: “What happened to my country?”
body:
It’s a question I’ve asked myself many times over the last few years as I’ve read the latest reports on radical gender ideology pushed in our elementary schools

| This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=750c83055a834965a3891188e025f4a0&_e=xNtofqcJQYuWozVkjRFTbpoJnMpOWiPhDTmlWxrPuP4CdEQYihH5KxXisMcxR5qVO03JYEi9yHXlunvKodUVSTZbdMOCyc10ZoqZhGIQTlCalHGc7faHKfMZR2tH9WYhCuFb9ofZZ0CD6X-Iu2gD891LxxB0aNJ6bQhhh6eN17Ratgkz42xiC7hX-909FZc5lr_AB7AacelS4g4kbC5rRMP_gGglJuHDxrhSCf5pTEy05MxZw9O3K5uZeo8Q5hm4pQt9tWSbE6swHBCONa4GW0dLBijareed6ZHsHIawQcN0abwEKz2GZ87IX4ovLZK9J-_53OEEl0i3QC83eGnAHNlUcMGsDyPbIQ32mXuDPPKNJuNH0rQBDe9jngeJVXrzSWv-JOXbaTvNFV0KBYUjNg%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Our newest online course opens with the question, "What happened to my country?"

It's a question I've asked myself many times over the last few years as I've read the latest reports on radical gender ideology pushed in our elementary schools, speech squashed by the media and corporate class, basic rights left unprotected in many of our cities, and economic opportunity diminished for millions of Americans.

To understand the source of these radical changes that undermine the rights of American citizens, we've produced the new online course, **" The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism."**
---
| | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=750c83055a834965a3891188e025f4a0&_e=xNtofqcJQYuWozVkjRFTbpoJnMpOWiPhDTmlWxrPuP4CdEQYihH5KxXisMcxR5qVO03JYEi9yHXlunvKodUVSTZbdMOCyc10ZoqZhGIQTlCalHGc7faHKfMZR2tH9WYhCuFb9ofZZ0CD6X-Iu2gD891LxxB0aNJ6bQhhh6eN17Ratgkz42xiC7hX-909FZc5lr_AB7AacelS4g4kbC5rRMP_gGglJuHDxrhSCf5pTEy05MxZw9O3K5uZeo8Q5hm4-foJh7tWEebOXj-EUrZZVgysif-VC-6b3f--L5cQw4jYxfkcFrKV7wDFFx2KVg0PpnrMjunOt_af2oNcZqX5gr1JFwgDgIEXvkUTKQikwi2bsToYqcsaus0p2K2sGH8iV-u7y-nDbyGyN-KYEw0-Tg%3D%3D)
---
In this course, Dr. Kevin Slack, associate professor of politics at Hillsdale College, traces the transformation of the American left over the last 100 years. You'll learn how post-sixties radicals rejected the midcentury liberalism of Franklin Roosevelt; you'll discover the origins of modern gender ideology, identity politics, and today's global elite; and, you'll explore how these movements overtook America's key institutions.

You can watch the trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/american-left-preregister/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=750c83055a834965a3891188e025f4a0&_e=xNtofqcJQYuWozVkjRFTbpoJnMpOWiPhDTmlWxrPuP4CdEQYihH5KxXisMcxR5qVO03JYEi9yHXlunvKodUVSTZbdMOCyc10ZoqZhGIQTlCalHGc7faHKfMZR2tH9WYhCuFb9ofZZ0CD6X-Iu2gD891LxxB0aNJ6bQhhh6eN17Ratgkz42xiC7hX-909FZc5lr_AB7AacelS4g4kbC5rRMP_gGglJuHDxrhSCf5pTEy05MxZw9O3K5uZeo8Q5hm4z-qnJe0QwnIoL71c_3aUSsl0bNzrynt2-E4i-ko1RlEJ_iSj8yBMMHZCDbakNn_xCHDEQWcuMEIf0Osf-XWXqXTV_Ac99QtB_-EgH2GXsCIJRF-YbhTYWVGIdfVbGdrLWdqwOxum2wujS-H_o1IK6Q%3D%3D)**

I hope you'll join us to better understand--and learn how to confront--the woke ideologies that dominate American politics today.
Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

Sent to Freedom Nation Today subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Your thoughts on education in America
body:
Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of American history and government—including an understanding of the purposes and principles of the Constitution?
| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c99d64d769a8426ab382777ce91543a2&_e=dULfbvPquJYoZo5kyhb-nr0PwASlZ-TNWDlijqwoXC0OCRQC0TvP-w1nI6pd6PO3rM7yMd44kYo_u15lFh9E7S5nvzSMlD7_JIGtyzA6oUQ-OR_lcM4trgfr4yYomhxl-2hXTjjiFuOPTRB0egdIDev4837RS_oVttRSNTgsFy3H2i7p3vHtoTaoHjzP-9dPe9KXA2OHmR2SBDptLM-h_Avl-GbNY2hUf6UcOjiWPT8-prXyrtNI5DWPlJCRNCaQdyRrmLQJidaz-sHKxKB86DjLim1j423vnP1rjlYvjIfy3UDLwgJkAQyGpHefcb62DrQt9sO_59HmFFZuDqaISyxXBUp5GjGxPPl1CX4Rt5oZdLIesw0YR9WgbtFjuFSX)
---
| | | Fellow American, Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of American history and government--including an understanding of the purposes and principles of the Constitution? There is reason to be doubtful. There seems to be a decreasing sense of patriotism among young Americans, and an increasing attraction to socialism and other ideas destructive of liberty. And have you noticed all the disturbing incidents taking place on college campuses, with students resorting to intimidation, threats, and violence to silence speakers with whom they disagree? Hillsdale is planning to redouble its efforts for the future of liberty. We will respond to these disturbing trends by expanding our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--especially for younger Americans. And as we form our strategy we'd like to hear from you: [**Please take our brief education survey here » **](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c99d64d769a8426ab382777ce91543a2&_e=dULfbvPquJYoZo5kyhb-nr0PwASlZ-TNWDlijqwoXC0OCRQC0TvP-w1nI6pd6PO3rM7yMd44kYo_u15lFh9E7S5nvzSMlD7_JIGtyzA6oUQ-OR_lcM4trgfr4yYomhxl-2hXTjjiFuOPTRB0egdIDev4837RS_oVttRSNTgsFy3H2i7p3vHtoTaoHjzP-9dPe9KXA2OHmR2SBDptLM-h_Avl-GbNY2hUf6UcOjiWPT91mkLJXvUbhWG-JPlzisOFMBDUNZxZ93rwiFQr7v2kqTwgD5esSKZxOVFnBneo8uxSzi8-9d4KcSQDFlGvlh96mzOiOvb10CTG4CLa-iTLDikqVNR2gaCSWuEBwhzIJC-CPqKOCBPabJuFOn1tNJGl) We have done too many of our young people a disservice by failing to provide them with knowledge of our nation's great heritage of liberty. Even worse, many of our schools, corrupted by Left-wing bias, have pushed a false history of America as essentially flawed and unjust. This indoctrination will only continue once students return to campuses across the country. Hillsdale can remain independent and stay true to its mission because it refuses to accept one penny of taxpayer funding--even indirect aid like federal or state student grants and loans. This frees Hillsdale from burdensome and corrupting regulation, but it also means we are entirely dependent on the support of our friends nationwide. Will you help us understand how Americans look at education today so that we can plan our expanded outreach in the smartest way possible? [**Please take a few minutes to complete this survey and let us know your opinions on education today » **](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c99d64d769a8426ab382777ce91543a2&_e=dULfbvPquJYoZo5kyhb-nr0PwASlZ-TNWDlijqwoXC0OCRQC0TvP-w1nI6pd6PO3rM7yMd44kYo_u15lFh9E7S5nvzSMlD7_JIGtyzA6oUQ-OR_lcM4trgfr4yYomhxl-2hXTjjiFuOPTRB0egdIDev4837RS_oVttRSNTgsFy3H2i7p3vHtoTaoHjzP-9dPe9KXA2OHmR2SBDptLM-h_Avl-GbNY2hUf6UcOjiWPT_LibeM84xEzRQPsvvWjSzBZFgt_O_-lXhgwS13dzMIBBPkTijF2umoGh04rxIkSuqnkFx-QOYzxi5GlUq2iM1Y5BUAvU9BmFp05tbsG3gyflSh3zpGKBbw_4L4EEzCo9jOsCspGRLMUrMbGld78t3Z) I am deeply grateful for your friendship.
---
Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Sent to Defend the Constitution subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314
[**unsubscribe**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=c99d64d769a8426ab382777ce91543a2&_t=dMIT3DtnjBbf5o-Z7bZP-UgRaHTD8nCw9pEwbtdNYnSTrKsV65kUQII-Ap0VM-qj6MMjLJ_g11I11UjCbnaM1zIDenkUzUVTyGJCBSp2BZncuHGv3y9K-KWJBNxCjSeTqxNDSCtDigFIik0v3_X3Yi_vVmQ-KmRTeS59ZebNWoU%3D)

There is reason to be doubtful. There seems to be a decreasing sense of patriotism among young Americans, and an increasing attraction to socialism and other ideas destructive of liberty. And have you noticed all the disturbing incidents taking place on college campuses, with students resorting to intimidation, threats, and violence to silence speakers with whom they disagree? name: Paul "Bud" Haedike, American Veterans Center
subject: D-Day from a paratrooper who was there
body:
My plane was shot down by the Germans in my first combat mission in World War II.
| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmdpeqn7f2h4m9n7ulcanquv0e7mfh4st9r48j40_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjie8p30slh2bs)
---
Fellow American, My plane was shot down by the Germans in my first combat mission in World War II. Our rookie B-17 crew was in "Tail End Charlie," which is what we called the last plane in the formation to pass over the target. The Germans had zeroed in on us with 88 millimeter cannons -- which could fire five miles up -- and they hit our number one and number two engine. A B-17 is not made to stay up on two engines. But with skill, determination, and good fortune, we crash-landed in Belgium just over the Nazi lines. Five days later, we were rescued ... and I went on to fly 22 more missions.
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2h242of122f8hlq7q62ni7ue6ekoqvkr7ufesho_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjie8p30slh2bs)
---
_Above: The American Veterans Center recorded and released a 30-minute video documentary with me about my service in World War II._
---
**A few years ago, my friends at the American Veterans Center invited me to record a video documentary about my experience in World War II.** I was proud to share my story with the American Veterans Center (AVC), both to honor the memories of the brave men I served with and to pass on our hard-fought lessons to the next generation. Right now, the American Veterans Center is working around the clock to interview and record as many video documentaries as possible with World War II veterans like me. [**May I ask you to chip in $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more today to help fund the American Veterans Center** ’**s critical video documentary project? As a non-profit, AVC depends on the contributions of patriotic Americans like you.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6oa5ru93831ncrogqvvt2l3d0qanat59hcavb70_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjie8p30slh2bs)
---
[Help the American Veterans Center](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znf2rmav3olcapreqtltju8i69dikk91a4urdvdo_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjie8p30slh2bs)
---
When the American Veterans Center records video documentaries with veterans like me:
• The experienced AVC video team coordinates travel plans with the veteran and his or her family. Oftentimes, AVC will even send out their staff to veterans’ homes – of course, at no cost to the veteran.

• AVC records a beautiful, professional-quality video documentary that lets veterans tell their own stories in their own words. A keepsake copy is also given to the veteran and their family to enjoy. • AVC makes available – for free! – these powerful video documentaries to be used as part of our shared American history. These videos reach millions on YouTube and have been used by the Library of Congress, presidential museums, and award-winning films. [**Can I count on you to help the American Veterans Center record even more video documentaries with your gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more today? Your gift is urgently needed for AVC to continue their efforts.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zol1jprl3fnm927hb7ro8tpifaughq3e6j69di10_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjie8p30slh2bs)
---
[Help the American Veterans Center](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zs79tdilbe025bdsakfdh2ks2lb1ncnl5dg9qf98_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjie8p30slh2bs)
---
The history books will teach you the facts, but only the servicemen and women of World War II can tell you what it was really like. In the beginning of the war, they said if a guy flew six or eight missions, he was on borrowed time. There were many men who served with me who didn't come home. They didn't get to be husbands, didn't get to be dads, and none of them got to be grandfathers -- which you can't understand until you reach that point in your own life. _Thanks to the American Veterans Center, and generous Americans like you who made my video documentary possible, my story, and the story of the young men in the Eighth Air Force, has entered our shared American history._ [**To help preserve the legacy of more World War II veterans like me, please make your most generous gift to the American Veterans Center today.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z72sutea3n7ubi4svvmpli6sqks3lc42u63j8p1g_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjie8p30slh2bs) I understand first-hand what good, important work the American Veterans Center does – and why their mission to record video documentaries with more veterans like me is so urgent. [**That** ’**s why I** ’**m asking for your support of the American Veterans Center today.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkg9mmqflv3p0eqqu6f00mkauac4j73hccv85ju0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjie8p30slh2bs) Thank you,
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpulv0jdq9lcr2sga06muut5aab8tsmq51j6l94g_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjie8p30slh2bs)
---
Paul "Bud" Haedike World War II Veteran For the American Veterans Center
---
[Support the American Veterans Center](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3k05sp9vc7c6c3dmuil2s78e491b6u1ofo2t5gg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjie8p30slh2bs)
---
|
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. © American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201
---

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: A new conservative movement
body:
I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, How We Win!
| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zal9fs1ah88s1kc9pvlem5ad7bdcemkk3vt6g280_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjie8p74c1h2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot, I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, _How We Win!_ **While supplies last, you can get a copy of this brand-new book to give to a conservative friend or family member (or to add to your personal library) when you make a gift of _ANY AMOUNT_ to Turning Point USA.**
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbqbs5o3013f9bqqj66vvlq1vn07obbve8jl24lo_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjie8p74c1h2bs)
---
[**Just click here to make your gift and claim your copy before it's gone!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3crqi9tfjji76gpt52la25su1gnjuqlsgvekgt0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjie8p74c1h2bs)
---
[Get my book](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfglfc3aoh4c4cds9fvpvksiu1sm9a53g6i38bo8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjie8p74c1h2bs)
---
Until now, Turning Point USA has been giving this book away as a thank-you gift for donations of $100 or more... **...but generous TPUSA supporters found the message of _How We Win_ to be so _URGENT_ and so _IMPORTANT_ that they're helping me get it into the hands of as many grassroots patriots as possible.** [**I hope you'll make your gift to Turning Point USA right now and claim your copy of _How We Win_ before it's gone. Let me tell you -- these books are flying out of our warehouse!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zam0kc6v50t9jpf90ssq7e3g42b9scddnhmn807o_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjie8p74c1h2bs) _How We Win_ is my prescription for a new conservative movement that will SAVE America once and for all. You see, after TEN YEARS at the helm of Turning Point USA... ... TEN YEARS criss-crossing the country... ... TEN YEARS engaging with the good, the bad, and the ugly on college campuses... ... I have come to the conclusion that the time has passed where conservatives can hope to simply persuade liberal radicals to come around to our way of thinking. That simply isn't going to happen. We must become a movement that's unafraid to stand up for what's right... a movement that's done pulling punches and will _FIGHT_ for the moral and philosophical foundations that have made our nation the greatest in the history of the world. **_How We Win_ is my handbook for how we can become that movement -- and how we can secure victories for American Greatness that will last for generations to come.** And this special book can be YOURS for a gift of ANY AMOUNT today! name: Giffords
subject: New CDC data shows the devastating toll of gun violence
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Friends -
Last week, the CDC released staggering new data revealing that 48,830 people were killed by guns in 2021—an eight percent increase over the already historically high level of gun deaths in 2020.
These victims were parents, grandparents, children, friends, and neighbors. Lives stolen far too soon by preventable gun violence.
Gun violence continues to be the NUMBER ONE cause of death for American children. One in every 14 children under age 18 that died in 2021 were killed by guns. Gun violence also continues to have a disproportionate impact on people of color. In 2021, Black Americans were 13 times more likely to be killed in a gun homicide than white Americans.
We know that these numbers may be difficult to process. You may feel discouraged. You may wonder where we go from here. But this data shows that we cannot give up. The fight to make our communities safer from gun violence is one worth fighting.
We must keep the pressure on our elected officials and demand that they have the courage to act. It is long past time for them to prioritize gun safety and enact comprehensive solutions to end the gun violence epidemic in our country.
We can only make progress if we keep moving forward together. So thank you for standing with us. All of us here at Giffords will not rest until a future free from gun violence is a reality.
\- The team at Giffords

* * *

**Giffords works to reduce gun violence by advocating for commonsense solutions that will save lives, empowering voters with information, and supporting candidates who will fight for safer gun laws. Make a donation to Giffords PAC today to support our lifesaving work.**
**[CONTRIBUTE TODAY](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jan23.1ic_u0&refcode=em230117-1-15&t=1&akid=4051%2E3935704%2E5DV-tx)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=4051%2E3935704%2E5DV-tx) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: American Veterans Center
subject: Help preserve this veteran's story before his 100th birthday
body:
I have an urgent request -- and since I know you care about our nation's heroes, I wanted to reach out to you right away.
| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zdkenu6odnf0qhgjmlio9he4def918i0522sskh8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjie4o35c5h2bs)
---
Fellow American, I have an urgent request -- and since I know you care about our nation's heroes, I wanted to reach out to you right away. Jack Nakamura, a World War II veteran of the legendary 442nd Regimental Combat Team, wants to share his story with the American Veterans Center so we can preserve his legacy for the next generation. **_To film, produce, and release a documentary with this World War II hero, the American Veterans Center must urgently raise $1,583._** Will you make a gift to this emergency fundraising campaign right now? >>**[_https://secure.anedot.com/american-veterans-center_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zrcp50uua50a5pla46adk1k7lo75jkkphrmufmco_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjie4o35c5h2bs)** Jack, who will celebrate his 100th birthday in February, is one of the last surviving members of the all-Japanese-American 442nd Regimental Combat Team. In October 1944, the 442nd saved more than 200 American soldiers of the "Lost Battalion" that had been cut off from Allied communications and surrounded by Nazis in the mountains of eastern France. **Today, Jack is one of the few remaining American heroes who can tell this story from first-hand experience --_and I don't want to miss the opportunity to preserve his lessons and experience._** Fellow American, because you're a strong supporter of America's veterans, I'm hoping that I can count on your help for this emergency request before the holiday season. I hope to be in touch soon with updates about our interview with Jack -- because _YOUR_ support is what makes it possible. \-- James Roberts, American Veterans Center
---
[**Support the American Veterans Center**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zo11mcposkj96f3mof2foak25pve97dejok2t860_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjie4o35c5h2bs)
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. © American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201
---

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: Are you concerned about Biden’s open border extremism?
body:
Because I know your time is valuable, and because this issue is vital to national security, I’ll get straight to the point:

| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zo1te0q9qk7cuthccf8g8ub638v22uf4l0jqlq9o_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjie8p73chh2bs)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative,

Because I know your time is valuable, and because this issue is vital to national security, I'll get straight to the point:

I'm writing today to invite you to join other conservatives who are pressuring lawmakers to end Biden's open border extremism by completing a simple 1-minute survey using the link below:

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z1llluuiiiclond8h9os8faq6hctldb7cf545p20_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjie8p73chh2bs)**

It's critical that proactive citizens like you respond to this national poll because despite legacy media's deafening silence on the issue, **this crisis has now reached historic proportions with more than 2 million reported encounters between Border Patrol and illegal immigrants in 2022.**

This is more encounters than ever before in our nation's history--_more than double that of any year during President Donald Trump 's term._

So when people ask me what I think of Biden's immigration policy, I reply: _what immigration policy?_

Beginning the day he took office, Biden's "policies" have created one of the worst humanitarian crises our nation has ever seen.

And now, untold scores of narcotics, violent criminals, and human traffickers are being allowed to flood into American communities, practically unabated, _every single day._

Decades of success advancing conservative policies have taught us that lawmakers in Washington tend to be more responsive when they know that voters are paying attention.

**Will you help us pressure lawmakers to address this urgent matter of national security by completing a brief 1-minute survey on Immigration Reform using the link below?**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zjcn41jgfpmsir0l0evar4gda2djmj0qj18rdq1g_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjie8p73chh2bs)**

**Armed with your response, we will work on your behalf to turn up the pressure on lawmakers and compel them to act now.**

Let elected officials know loud and clear that **you _demand_ an end to Biden's open border extremism by completing this quick 1-minute survey using the link below:**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zukj70l5eoevs0ptt01ibeioqgeaefskim2hd41o_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjie8p73chh2bs)**

Thank you,

Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development

**P.S.** We must take action now--this issue cannot wait. [**Thank you for joining the fight by completing the 1-minute survey linked here. >>**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z5d1s10rnjbronkd3j7id2h0ts27rg0aqsspfffo_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjie8p73chh2bs)
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

subject: Tell Democrats: No deals with Republican extremists on the debt ceiling
body:
| | | | |
---
| | | [Tell Democrats: No deals with Republican extremists on the debt ceiling >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0fa676fe-5eb3-4ba6-ac63-f2d1bae26b43/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5235dda9-89e9-4a77-8fc6-ac4388adee9f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Republican extremists are refusing to raise the debt ceiling, and threatening default and economic catastrophe unless their demands are met. [**And Democrats should tell them to go to hell.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T267f0f86-a23b-453f-876f-05761c0e7954/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) The debt limit authorizes borrowing for debt already incurred. **Refusing to raise it doesn't mean you're cutting spending, it means you're not paying the bills you already owe**. And if we don't raise it, it will send the US into default, dramatically raise the interest rates the government needs to pay on debt, and almost certainly send the economy into a deep recession. **But Republican extremists in the House don't care, and they are willing to drive America off a cliff to appease their base.** If we give in to these extremists now, and give them things they could never get via a Congressional vote, we will be **handing over control of the country forevermore, and letting these lunatics cause incalculable damage.** We don't need to deal with these extremists. **There are 18 Republican House members in districts that Biden won, and they are vulnerable in 2024.** We only need 5 of them to vote with Democrats to raise the debt ceiling to make it happen. This can be done, given enough pressure. [**So tell Democrats: No deals with Republican extremists on the debt ceiling.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta5e55745-3410-4625-851d-87e1767a5a77/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

subject: All on the line for the 2nd Amendment
body:
| | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=eb54860cb38d4040bd619f6fb1200c65&_e=c73migYNUNmBBp6JaCbmrKprYIWhRtyMuRNeJjaG0Z9SQdaz8PDw_vlxAHQ45kdPlMLxrOLlw6kE_fDqQl9LqiRTeHH_VHhk-fCDtceBbBd97h3SJvgJY784A_in9fUQLFYGJDdhXkk4bVoMfFWQfkfJSjUDlQmkMgTc-NFygApu61LcP4-xnXoA3IWW4mM71vAcbaL13_YmLemCnP2zCaUPduWOKlE5S8fqKb-lb8Zxn5HVRF1WatQTpnxKU_Js1qUPSSII6OL94MZmSza6IvDKqAN866kE96Y1KNlAFJVWD8Brex4Y7U67_1mhOdHl)
---
Friend, With a new year comes new attacks on the Second Amendment -- and you can't count on any political party to defend your freedom and natural rights. _In 2022, supposedly "pro-gun" politicians sold you out to pass the first new federal gun control in nearly two decades._ Now, as President Biden ramps up his calls for a new federal "assault weapon" ban, we at FPC Action Foundation expect an AVALANCHE of anti-gun bills to be introduced in Congress -- targeting everything from standard-capacity magazines to dictating how and where you're allowed to store your firearms. The landscape in D.C. -- coupled with upcoming deadlines in some of FPC Action Foundation's most important ongoing pro-Second-Amendment legal cases -- means that 2023 is already shaping up to be a critical year for gun rights. [**Please make your most generous tax-deductible gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more right now to help strengthen FPC Action Foundation's Second Amendment Legal Defense Fund for the fights ahead.**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=eb54860cb38d4040bd619f6fb1200c65&_e=c73migYNUNmBBp6JaCbmrKprYIWhRtyMuRNeJjaG0Z9SQdaz8PDw_vlxAHQ45kdPlMLxrOLlw6kE_fDqQl9LqiRTeHH_VHhk-fCDtceBbBd97h3SJvgJY784A_in9fUQLFYGJDdhXkk4bVoMfFWQfs2XDYRCSrU3qWYQSHNOuAOo32YEnVUeS-ZlZuNCIdxr-fL-aezBiR9L00CUVAlYH5NLdpC26epnqWTk9E01G9_u_mfkMcEYUe9mNz9a-hy90Zh4ABknsYOzlykC9FUvIvkh2j7ocobTMV4CC9Hhs3dpHtCIA2dxoAQ1DxiWt2fV)

---
FPC Action Foundation is a 501(c)3 nonprofit organization focused on protecting the right to keep and bear arms and your constitutionally protected rights! Legal briefs authored by our attorneys have been cited by the U.S. Supreme Court, including in the majority opinion in _NYSRPA v. Bruen_ when the court rejected tiered scrutiny and required lower courts to apply the text of the Constitution, informed by history, in future Second Amendment cases. **In a knock-down, drag-out legal battle with a government hell-bent on destroying freedom, gun owners can count on FPC Action Foundation to bring a FIGHT.**
---
[Support FPCAF's Second Amendment Legal Defense Fund](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=eb54860cb38d4040bd619f6fb1200c65&_e=c73migYNUNmBBp6JaCbmrKprYIWhRtyMuRNeJjaG0Z9SQdaz8PDw_vlxAHQ45kdPlMLxrOLlw6kE_fDqQl9LqiRTeHH_VHhk-fCDtceBbBd97h3SJvgJY784A_in9fUQLFYGJDdhXkk4bVoMfFWQfnTqQOoKyuDNZqyZGEP_y97AoqNRII3ObgEPttOuk0kkBWfCr1kr-dnfV3BCdt0OX26FZ73UYn0zgGYZeJw6JEGgRbV5VKfUR2o0sui_NK4HrpgveqNGL816CY5NhJASbWCs0a-qnwhkmQxL82s4lspWRZ5b0GwVhDB4o7vWuGIS)
---
The Second Amendment is a bulwark against tyranny, and we cannot just stand by and let well-funded interests run roughshod over our rights. Now more than ever we must stand together to defend freedom through our legal system. As a fellow patriot and freedom fighter, we hope we can count on your help to protect and expand human freedom through FPC Action Foundation's critical legal work. [**Please, Friend, make your most generous gift right now to help strengthen our Second Amendment Legal Defense Fund for the fights ahead.**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=eb54860cb38d4040bd619f6fb1200c65&_e=c73migYNUNmBBp6JaCbmrKprYIWhRtyMuRNeJjaG0Z9SQdaz8PDw_vlxAHQ45kdPlMLxrOLlw6kE_fDqQl9LqiRTeHH_VHhk-fCDtceBbBd97h3SJvgJY784A_in9fUQLFYGJDdhXkk4bVoMfFWQfgEhaeo_wghorMt-pNYuArTA9LPL3nRZJdMLF-7Dss9tvOhJm9ADV4JSZreFwhKqo6ZdkJSWzJQNM0wjeDLlwfn_6ZUMQqfujYTRf2Z2Vmz-O2h8isTc_nnUpKscMZOmk143RlvRr4QdhjE6k3aXRdVByD5vBg23mM0jsvXtVR_y) Stay free,

It’s been a busy two weeks.
#
Peter,
We’re only two weeks into 2023 and there’s already a lot to recap.
In Washington D.C., Kevin McCarthy let MAGA extremists take over. Then, House Republicans hit the ground running, immediately voting to protect wealthy tax cheats.
But it’s not all bad news: the start of 2023 also means the start of historic drug price reductions, climate change investments, and new green jobs thanks to the Inflation Reduction Act.
And thanks to supporters like you, we can stop the GOP’s terrible policy agenda in the Senate.
**[Republicans are showing us that they’re the same party they’ve always been. With a MAGA dominated House, it’s important we do everything we can to protect our Democratic Senate majority. name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: “What happened to my country?”
body:
It’s a question I’ve asked myself many times over the last few years as I’ve read the latest reports on radical gender ideology pushed in our elementa

| This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a4d740867bf94e3a8f5630d069bf42bc&_e=R1iZkdsHRe4WoLsgcDYU-Ad-ujaVzJucjNL9UnuuCBd8o-z2AMpHYZOgKAIgDxQLlZgfHJ-Aca2U0EU5PkeVo4uUzRzZBI8Z2mdxga4watdLfEkGk8bk9vysZu2dAfyhnSsqvtELe-C0JuPznB_ODI-9fCP2yhJXEXnEsrEXkEtLlB-l_Dp80lsI6fHofNFWSBrPip0uwyiKQEyHrQwqutd6UcGZ9Bvvea0c8-YP46XrRKXJXlXf0m_XnYeoiTZYoBX5fgK9Xv8X6SXwbp6yPvlQJbrVoD4Fr7wM4e20uy2YkLsB1UpquFbCHo1mMxZFkvu-uAdTQbvgUIoEmQOtLI2AoOcEcyzU0TBP7oohs0xLcWuMiiMieYtX5Zc5tQ6r1OOqKmYZErEX1E-WpWUolw%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Our newest online course opens with the question, "What happened to my country?"

It's a question I've asked myself many times over the last few years as I've read the latest reports on radical gender ideology pushed in our elementary schools, speech squashed by the media and corporate class, basic rights left unprotected in many of our cities, and economic opportunity diminished for millions of Americans.

To understand the source of these radical changes that undermine the rights of American citizens, we've produced the new online course, **" The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism."**
---
| | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a4d740867bf94e3a8f5630d069bf42bc&_e=R1iZkdsHRe4WoLsgcDYU-Ad-ujaVzJucjNL9UnuuCBd8o-z2AMpHYZOgKAIgDxQLlZgfHJ-Aca2U0EU5PkeVo4uUzRzZBI8Z2mdxga4watdLfEkGk8bk9vysZu2dAfyhnSsqvtELe-C0JuPznB_ODI-9fCP2yhJXEXnEsrEXkEtLlB-l_Dp80lsI6fHofNFWSBrPip0uwyiKQEyHrQwqutd6UcGZ9Bvvea0c8-YP46XrRKXJXlXf0m_XnYeoiTZY6kTCWCdKvH0lyLDLjG6I4r80j_8sAEcWCe89FgGk4lCA0dshCpND-Qo4iwDm7GX2-JHm1lwDDDFlqNMCPMCGwpnYlZ57PYf3xBhz1SJwBmC9mjsRHhWrkbkqqKflNY4lAhhxEhrhWIQlEV3niqUDFA%3D%3D)
---
In this course, Dr. Kevin Slack, associate professor of politics at Hillsdale College, traces the transformation of the American left over the last 100 years. You'll learn how post-sixties radicals rejected the midcentury liberalism of Franklin Roosevelt; you'll discover the origins of modern gender ideology, identity politics, and today's global elite; and, you'll explore how these movements overtook America's key institutions.

You can watch the trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/american-left-preregister/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a4d740867bf94e3a8f5630d069bf42bc&_e=R1iZkdsHRe4WoLsgcDYU-Ad-ujaVzJucjNL9UnuuCBd8o-z2AMpHYZOgKAIgDxQLlZgfHJ-Aca2U0EU5PkeVo4uUzRzZBI8Z2mdxga4watdLfEkGk8bk9vysZu2dAfyhnSsqvtELe-C0JuPznB_ODI-9fCP2yhJXEXnEsrEXkEtLlB-l_Dp80lsI6fHofNFWSBrPip0uwyiKQEyHrQwqutd6UcGZ9Bvvea0c8-YP46XrRKXJXlXf0m_XnYeoiTZY_w01ic8hcBxHpWrKFNPadPAkwtzj9HvhFnogImpmOPmly16Sxx5baujI5zFjyrYltBODFbo61ZKKAl5bAUgoXrTw8RgFcjzHFC8yRiKpLez_wk32nIgU9GBjPILXZKxMZubsDt6KDD9G0Rzi14Elug%3D%3D)**

I hope you'll join us to better understand--and learn how to confront--the woke ideologies that dominate American politics today.
Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

Sent to Reclaiming American Freedom subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

body:
I came to Congress to advocate for West Michiganders, not play politics.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57443790/387968143/205369934?refcode=BLU-HSC-20230117-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjNiNmY5Zi1iNjk2LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cDoYPA7EjY70vHOpvg3iQAjQTfNqzlmty9k0WCty_0M=)

| Team –

Where I come from, first impressions matter. **And so far, the first impressions we’ve seen from the Republican House majority have been disappointing.**

First, their infighting delayed the start of our session by several days – days that could have been spent passing legislation to safeguard reproductive rights, combat climate change, and fix our broken immigration system.

Then, when they finally elected a Speaker, the first bill they voted to pass was one that would take back millions of dollars in IRS funding, making it easier for corporations and the ultra-wealthy to avoid paying their fair share of taxes. **I came to Congress to advocate for West Michiganders, not play politics.[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57443791/387968144/205369934?refcode=BLU-HSC-20230117-1-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjNiNmY5Zi1iNjk2LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cDoYPA7EjY70vHOpvg3iQAjQTfNqzlmty9k0WCty_0M=)_[If you’re able, I hope you’ll consider making a contribution of $10 today to show you have my back.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57443792/387968145/205369934?refcode=BLU-HSC-20230117-1-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjNiNmY5Zi1iNjk2LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cDoYPA7EjY70vHOpvg3iQAjQTfNqzlmty9k0WCty_0M=)_**

| | | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=a951bbe1ed&e=fdefed58de)
---
Hello Peter,
I didn’t expect to be doing this so early but I can’t really wait any longer.Maxwell Frost won Florida’s 10th District in 2022 and everyone said they’d give him a a chance because he’s the first “Gen Z” member of Congress.Cool, that’s nice. I said I’d give him a chance too, even though I knew what was coming.Then, he voted against the Born Alive Act. That’s when I said I was done giving him the chance.That’s why today, I’m announcing a 2024 run to represent Florida’s 10th District.
| [BE THE FIRST TO SUPPORT WILLIE’S 2024 RUN!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=e21008a5ef&e=fdefed58de)
---
Florida is a red state now and there really are no more “hard” Blue districts.Our 10th District is one of the last districts represented by a Democat, but Maxwell Frost is quite vulnerable.People thought he would be different because he was young, but his youth doesn’t change much. He voted against the **Born Alive Act** , which is a simple bill that says if an aborted baby somehow survives, you must give it medical care.Maxwell and the majority of his Democrat colleagues voted that the baby should just be left to die. That’s insane and that’s beyond the moral compass that I can subscribe to.**So, he’s got to go... and I’m the only candidate who can send him packing in 2024. I’m starting early because I need to raise the funds to be able to mount a full-scale defeat.**
| [PITCH IN NOW SO WE CAN ACTUALLY WIN IN 2024!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=ef11d8a6b2&e=fdefed58de)
---
I am an entrepreneur and spiritual leader. In addition to being a ordained pastor, I am a community advocate and Founder/President of “House of Timothy” which is a nonprofit organization based in Orlando, Florida for young men between the ages of 18 and 25, seeking a second chance at life in a community environment.In 2017 I received an Honorary Doctorate in the Humanities from Rehoboth International Bible College in recognition of his community development work over the course of more than 10 years. In 2019 I was awarded a PhD in Religious Studies through Encouraging Faith Theological University.

I am the author of The Fruits of Leadership, which focuses on developing leaders from all walks of life. I am the overseer of New Creation Assembly of Churches, the Lead Pastor of Gravity Church, based out of Orlando.

I’ve been a conservative since he was 14 years old and believe strongly in 2A rights, the abolition of abortion, election integrity, and true fiscal responsibility in government.I am also Chairman of the Orange County Republican Liberty Caucus, Regional Director Central Florida Republican Liberty Caucus, President of Turning Point Faith of Greater Orlando, Founder/President of House of Timothy, Inc., and Founder of Orlando Under 40.I’m known in my community and I’m not running for the first time. I always say that running for office before is the necessary experience to do it again and win. **It’s hard to win your first race, but when you know what to do and what not to do, you can CERTAINLY win on the next try!**[**That is why I’m starting early. I know it takes an incredible grassroots fundraising effort to pull off a victory. Can I count on you to be the FIRST donor to my 2024 effort?**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=67d2faee8d&e=fdefed58de)

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4b55d7c4494e488f8c54226d019b8644&_e=zMtH97o7azoD_6RXDAKc_8Kawa5po8pKzqOdFfUIp4dlXsz1Y-zBIimJzGCeQE3uM-gJYq5kT00QSxLUb-J9oBaRSW1Xt7p3ewch8Ni9ey3fKy0PjPvxta99mWs57yaebEDgFaio_qaZBoCLrc3h5X4O0NyCW2axtESdqg91fMqQWysmImPOGahciSaOUS12hPVhydMz05ZH2veR30brgMHgd4MNZJUxjEZjklWbn64OiWcDIijNunOZAtyvHFzfKgamzPJOmTQSBKYM66kB8fanUb2aZSrOMAiatNDL5NTZkXuvbwontQTTO5w1Rz9YjEvpTZX7v2RwIzFBRX0WA5Scx9070OuvUjvR4dqVSBE%3D) Dear Patriot,

[**Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, $250, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS and GET THEM JUSTICE.

**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4b55d7c4494e488f8c54226d019b8644&_e=zMtH97o7azoD_6RXDAKc_8Kawa5po8pKzqOdFfUIp4dlXsz1Y-zBIimJzGCeQE3uM-gJYq5kT00QSxLUb-J9oBaRSW1Xt7p3ewch8Ni9ey3fKy0PjPvxta99mWs57yaebEDgFaio_qaZBoCLrc3h5X4O0NyCW2axtESdqg91fMqQWysmImPOGahciSaOUS12hPVhydMz05ZH2veR30brgISjwAWk1NbGt0Kus9PgrcUxIZZBgyg8OEvT6H7zWu9r5DCmcea0yijzxpkF_arz3uyMeug9X_q-g_uppw9fEA0qGXAsM5YV7O2I8MQcIPkw3z9q3zaM5gTZF7oOrIhMAVX447ck3PZqzAxB2KA39Tc%3D) **The lawless January 6 Congressional Committee is trying to conceal its crimes against the Constitution and the American people.** Yahoo News reports:

"House Speaker Nancy Pelosi (D-San Francisco) already named the House Committee on House Administration the custodian of the records. Under current House rules, the committee is obligated to hand over the official records to the House clerk, who transmits them to the National Archives. _The rules also prevent the National Archives from releasing committee records for at least 30 years. Sensitive records, such as those from a major investigation, can be held up to 50 years before being made public. "_

**Yes, you read that right - the J6 Kangaroo Court is trying to cover up crucial information that affects you and me, our families, and our fellow Americans, for 30 to 50 YEARS!

** They want to bury:

• Videos from police body cameras,

• Videos from on-site security cameras,

• Videos from countless smart phones,

• Emails and texts from federal agencies and law enforcement,

• And so much more.

Why?

**Because they know that the patriots who protested that day outside the U.S. Capitol building were peaceful.

** They know that the U.S. Capitol Police were warned that Black Lives Matter terrorists would disguise themselves as Trump supporters and cause trouble.

They know that undercover police and federal agents were in the crowd and may have even provoked attacks on police and the Capitol building.

**They know their narrative that patriots took part in a bloody insurrection to overthrow the government is a lie.

** So, they're trying to bury that evidence until everyone they've falsely accused, ruined, browbeat...and everyone who pushed the lying Biden narrative...has died from old age.

**This is an outrageous attack on our Constitution, our rights, and our freedoms - especially in light of the two years of abuse, torture, and injustice January 6 peaceful protesters have endured.

** That's why I ask you to stand with me before it's too late.

**I 'm Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.

** I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years.

You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I 'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

** I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!

** And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten criminal regime in court.

This month marks the 50th anniversary of _Roe v. Wade_ \-- **and the first since the far-right Supreme Court overturned it.**

The very moment _Roe_ was wiped off the books, **Republicans started banning abortion in states across the country.** But this fight's not over. Justice Sotomayor says that at times like this, we need to channel our anger into action -- and she's RIGHT.

It’s _never_ been more important to stand with the millions of Americans whose rights are now threatened.

In honor of this anniversary, we’ve launched a MASSIVE petition to PROVE that Americans support reproductive rights -- **_but we’re 35 signatures short in Pennsylvania,_ so please do your part right now:**

**[Sign our Democratic petition now to show that you stand for reproductive rights >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/11619?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230117-RoevWadeAlert-RoeAnniversary50-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230117-RoevWadeAlert-RoeAnniversary50-Pros-sl1&akid=9496%2E9716520%2E8rZEdU)**
