I know it would mean a lot to Nikki to see the names of her friends and biggest supporters wishing her a happy birthday. As you know, Nikki is committed to standing up for our shared American values. I can’t think of a better way to surprise her and kick off 2023 on a positive note than reading the well-wishes from Stand For America PAC members. If you can take the time, please leave a note for her along with your name. I know it will mean a lot. Thanks for all you do! Best, Michael | | | Nikki Haley here. I want to make sure you have a signed copy of my new book. There are only a few signed copies left. It’s called “If You Want Something Done...” and it profiles bold, courageous women and the lessons they teach us about making a difference, overcoming adversity, and sticking to principle. | | Copyright © 2023 Stand For America PAC, All rights reserved. www.standforamericapac.com Contributions are not tax-deductible. Stand For America PAC does not accept contributions from foreign nationals. Our mailing address is: 611 Pennsylvania Avenue, SE #146 Washington, DC 20003 Want to change how you receive these emails? . Do you want to stay up-to-date with what Stand For America PAC is doing? *By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided from each of Stand For America PAC, Stand For America, and Ambassador Haley (28786) directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. Texts may be sent via an automated telephone dialing system. Consent not required to contribute. Message frequency varies. Message and data rates may apply. and apply. You can opt out at any time. Text STOP to end. Text HELP for help.

name: House Update (via the NDRC)
subject: the Republican meltdown leaves us with two options
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, Kelly Burton, President
body:
|
---

Team, because our grassroots movement helped secure the fairest congressional maps in 40 years, Republicans only won the slimmest of majorities in the House of Representatives.

As a result, the Republican Party is in chaos. They could barely muster enough votes to _elect a Speaker_ , much less anything else!

**The NDRC’s fight for fair maps blocked the GOP from winning a large enough majority to advance their extreme agenda of banning abortion, attacking voting rights, and undermining our democracy. This total Republican meltdown leaves us with two options:** **Option 1:**

We can declare “mission accomplished,” and hope that Republicans continue destroying themselves from the inside.

**Option 2:**

We can take advantage of this moment, strengthen our grassroots movement while the GOP crumbles, and continue fighting for fair elections so we can take back the House and other important state legislative bodies in 2024. [**_We know that our work is far from over, team, so we’re taking Option 2. If you’re still with us, we hope you’ll rush an urgent donation to help the NDRC show that our movement to create a strong democracy is more united than ever and ready to win._**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57436258/387936267/-276754120?amount=30&refcode=20230117.1r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU2YTA1OGMwLTkwOTYtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=C6BcDc8HB23X6LFLtRLN5jLbN_NEFJNK52EoeIvEMYM=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Friend, she might not realize it yet, but the little girl in this photo is learning from her grandmother that her voice matters — and that her advocacy can make a difference.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57444513/387971116/-2054302023?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3895-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjU2OWE1OS1iYjk2LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fj_UHuEKX1iBICMvJR-u5y-wCmxSmyBXYO2IPfb9aNU=)
In a world full of people telling young girls to be quiet and wait their turn, seeing my grandmother be a fiery and outspoken advocate for women changed everything for me. She is who inspired me to be bold and raise my voice.

That’s the reason I ran for office: to be a voice for those who don’t have one and to take on the toughest fights in Washington and stand up for what’s right.

Today, we have lots of tough fights ahead in the Senate: for reproductive freedom, voting rights, climate action, affordable health care, national paid leave and access to child care. I will be fearless in the fight to get the job done — just like my grandmother taught me.

But I need _your_ help, friend. With so much at stake, Democrats are hanging onto our Senate majority by a thread. Mitch McConnell only needs to flip two seats to retake control — and after New York Republicans secured historic victories across the state during the midterm elections, the GOP is targeting me for defeat.
**I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs. My fight is fueled by you and for you. But that means I can’t take on the GOP’s megadonor machine and keep this seat blue without your grassroots support.

[_So please, will you donate $5 or more right now to help me defeat the GOP in New York, defend our narrow Democratic majority and continue fearlessly fighting for you in the Senate?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57444514/387971117/-2054302023?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3895-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjU2OWE1OS1iYjk2LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fj_UHuEKX1iBICMvJR-u5y-wCmxSmyBXYO2IPfb9aNU=)**

name: Katie Porter
subject: Our first week!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Skipping the BS and explaining why we’ve emailed you.
Derek, our Senate campaign is officially one week old! I know you’ve heard from me and my team a lot this past week, about goals and deadlines and how we could use your support. **I’m never one to BS, so let me tell you why this first week is so critical to the long term success of this campaign.**
* Reporting a strong early number signals the strength of our movement to pundits, outside groups, and other potential candidates. It can convince super PACs that might want to spend against me to just stay out of this one.
* Practically, having the resources we need early on enables us to reach voters and build a winning campaign.

I’m running because Californians deserve a Senator who will stand up to powerful special interests and lower costs for families, protect our environment, and clean up corruption. And I’m proud to be running this campaign the right way: without accepting a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil, Big Pharma, or Wall Street Banks.
On Saturday we set a goal of bringing in 20,000 new unique donations to our campaign. **We’re about 95% of the way to that goal, and if you are able to help kickstart our campaign, I would be so appreciative to have you on the team. You can make a donation with this link:**
**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230117-1?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.katieporter.com/go/15645?refcode=EMAF17_1_PLA_20230117_V1_F&t=1&akid=16029%2E3422442%2Esx2XvX)**
I’m so excited to earn the support of Californians from across the state. Thank YOU for making that possible!
Katie Porter

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=2&akid=16029%2E3422442%2Esx2XvX)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=16029%2E3422442%2Esx2XvX)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

clean_body: We're collecting vital data for our outreach efforts | | We have important elections in 2023 and 2024, so we are reaching out to a few of our subscribers and we wanted to reach out to you specifically, Derek. We haven't heard from you yet and we want to hear your answer! ARE YOU REGISTERED TO VOTE AT YOUR CURRENT ADDRESS? Missing Response from Derek | Deadline Midnight | We at the Young Democrats care about what is getting Democrats to go and vote in the midterms. We are working hard over here to turn out as many people as we can and your input is vital. We won't publish your answers. We will use it to inform our messaging strategy. Right now, reproductive rights, environmental justice, and our democracy are all on the line in this election. That's why it's incredibly important for us all to fight back and get as many people as we can to get out and vote. | The Young Democrats of America (YDA) is the official youth wing of the Democratic Party of the United States and the oldest partisan youth organization in the country. To help us mobilize the next generation of Democrats, | | | | | ---|---|--- | | Sent via . name: Outreach Team - An America United
subject: RE: Governor Hogan's Farewell
body:
| | | It was a bittersweet farewell, friend.
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=fd3b182f4532431fb29243cec05c7da7&_e=9H5kj3H3Ub_K9AJu8eF7Uls3xDgENoXvigryMxYPbxINLvGr6Y67WoF8XEaqWLThdpwa2yebhLLuNwGfXOM9otBOGMq7krs7tAb0OkEPpzlWcuyFqTnZd7FVUfkK9E1tvI8ZnwUzp566Se8-hR9vSGvdDvSNJWVFbsCIZmMlBAXIdpMhgHQOYRWVcwwY8Dflhk2k_yRi6yLwhskHrXezvNYgNAUCfOc9G0ZJf9W1hzHTaO2UESJ5bFkqwkg3cKUdeb8VYjIwMMDte6E62ZMiJg%3D%3D)
---
| | Governor Larry Hogan gave his farewell address to Maryland last week and in it, showed his deep love, admiration, and commitment to the people he served. As a Republican Governor in a deep-blue state, Governor Hogan said he's proud of his accomplishments and the bipartisan work done during his time in office like the $4 billion in tax, toll, and fee relief for small businesses, families, and senior citizens. He also helped usher through meaningful legislation to rebuild Maryland's aging infrastructure, navigated the state through the Covid-19 pandemic, kept law and order during the Baltimore riots in 2015, and showed the country how to get things done by working together and focusing on the issues that matter. _**"I vowed that day that the politics that have divided our nation need not divide our state. I'm proud to say that we kept that promise. Together, we lived up to Maryland's heritage as a state of middle temperament." **_ Governor Hogan never strayed from his promise to work to unite the leadership in Maryland and ensure that the government work _**FOR**_ the people... and he, along with _**An America United**_ , will continue to fight for a better way forward across the country. [_**But we need you on board if we hope to continue this important work. Please contribute $8 for 8 years of successful, common sense leadership and help An America United and Larry Hogan work to get things done.**_](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=fd3b182f4532431fb29243cec05c7da7&_e=9H5kj3H3Ub_K9AJu8eF7Uls3xDgENoXvigryMxYPbxINLvGr6Y67WoF8XEaqWLThdpwa2yebhLLuNwGfXOM9otBOGMq7krs7tAb0OkEPpzlWcuyFqTnZd7FVUfkK9E1t_GRNmaYbsefBBw2wMn7emlb5VA-Y9Qxg01YACwLkgTaaqKhnyNH9glt0p6AYR5BYADRSwOL7RPJbqbfnuVPhoA5fRBJPrTn2zhtDIdoQOJUPdRtiyZeghuT2tRQuuy9RKQGkq8jhWGcQIzrdYXCdyA%3D%3D) Thank you, _**Team An America United**_

clean_body: | | | It was a bittersweet farewell, friend. | | Governor Larry Hogan gave his farewell address to Maryland last week and in it, showed his deep love, admiration, and commitment to the people he served. As a Republican Governor in a deep-blue state, Governor Hogan said he's proud of his accomplishments and the bipartisan work done during his time in office like the $4 billion in tax, toll, and fee relief for small businesses, families, and senior citizens. He also helped usher through meaningful legislation to rebuild Maryland's aging infrastructure, navigated the state through the Covid-19 pandemic, kept law and order during the Baltimore riots in 2015, and showed the country how to get things done by working together and focusing on the issues that matter. "I vowed that day that the politics that have divided our nation need not divide our state. I'm proud to say that we kept that promise. Together, we lived up to Maryland's heritage as a state of middle temperament." Governor Hogan never strayed from his promise to work to unite the leadership in Maryland and ensure that the government work FOR the people... and he, along with An America United , will continue to fight for a better way forward across the country. Thank you, Team An America United | | | | - | | Join An America United on social media! | | ---|--- | Contributions to An America United are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | |

name: Rep. Dana Criswell
subject: Freedom Caucus Spreading the Conservative Word
body:

| | |
---
| The Mississippi Freedom Caucus has been busy this week spreading conservative philosophy. On Monday, State Freedom Caucus Network director Steven Utroska discussed the goals of the Mississippi Freedom Caucus with Fred Jackson on American Family Radio's [At the Core](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/0YE_BtaEkKBd3HAOXCK9Nw). This nationally syndicated show highlighted the conservative efforts of the Mississippi Freedom Caucus and the work of the State Freedom Caucus Network.

|

subject: ALERT: Conservative news you can't miss
body:
Megadonor Richard Uihlein backs Harmeet Dhillon for top spot at RNC, meanwhile IL GOP Chair Tracy scrambles to put together postage policy committee.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/3ad35afc176b/alert-conservative-news-you-cant-miss?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=277de2f4ac-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_17_05_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-277de2f4ac-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Richard Uihlein Backs Harmeet Dhillon for RNC Chair, Says GOP Needs New Leader to Fight "Radical Left" (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/richard-uihlein-backs-harmeet-dhillon-for-rnc-chair-says-gop-needs-new-leader-to-fight-radical-left.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=277de2f4ac-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_17_05_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-277de2f4ac-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
Conservative megadonor and billionaire Richard Uihlein, is weighing in on the race for the next chair of the Republican National Committee (RNC), and it’s not Ronna Romney McDaniel who’s earned his support.

His choice to lead the national Republican party? Respected First Amendment and election law attorney
Harmeet Dhillon (https://fedsoc.org/contributors/harmeet-dhillon?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=277de2f4ac-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_17_05_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-277de2f4ac-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) .
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/richard-uihlein-backs-harmeet-dhillon-for-rnc-chair-says-gop-needs-new-leader-to-fight-radical-left.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=277de2f4ac-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_17_05_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-277de2f4ac-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Embattled RNC Chair Ronna Romney-McDaniel (left), with her uncle, Sen. Mitt Romney (R-Utah). (Photo: Nick Hagen for The Washington Post via Getty; Tom Williams/CQ-Roll Call, Inc. via Getty)

============================================================

Ronna McDaniel, the niece of Republican Sen. Mitt Romney, for years, went by Ronna Romney, until 2017, when President Trump asked her to drop her famous last name after her uncle Mitt grew critical of Trump during his presidency.

Romney-McDaniel has come under intense pressure over the last few months after a string of high profile midterm election losses, and the failure of the RNC to wage a substantive battle against widespread voter fraud in key battleground states across the country.

After the 2020 presidential election, Romney-McDaniel wanted the party to steer clear of election fraud issues, arguing in private that it was not an issue they could raise money on.

Romney-McDaniel even
** distanced herself from Trump (https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/politics-news/rnc-chair-defends-mail-voting-even-trump-trashes-rcna60405?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=277de2f4ac-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_17_05_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-277de2f4ac-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
leading up to the midterm election, stating that Republicans need to take advantage of mail-in voting – despite Trump posting on ** TruthSocial (https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/posts/109427728913270492?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=277de2f4ac-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_17_05_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-277de2f4ac-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
, “YOU CAN NEVER HAVE FAIR & FREE ELECTIONS WITH MAIL-IN BALLOTS – NEVER, NEVER, NEVER.”

Romney-McDaniel has also come under fire for a report that showed the RNC
** spending millions of dollars (https://redstate.com/jenvanlaar/2022/12/14/exclusive-analysis-of-rnc-spending-since-2017-shows-millions-were-spent-on-private-jets-limousines-luxury-retreats-broadway-shows-and-more-n673852?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=277de2f4ac-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_17_05_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-277de2f4ac-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
on private jets, limousines, luxury retreats and Broadway shows since her election as RNC chair in 2017.

Financial records also showed $100,000 for hair and makeup, and dry cleaning services – for Romney-McDaniel’s media appearances.

It’s no wonder Romney-McDaniel doesn’t want to leave – the RNC credit card has become her own personal piggy bank; she flies on private jets; and she stays at only the most luxurious of hotels when traveling.

Dhillon, a diehard Trump-supporter, hasn’t held back when it comes to criticizing Romney-McDaniel’s leadership,
** saying (https://www.foxnews.com/politics/ronna-mcdaniels-challenger-rnc-chair-says-after-losses-like-midterms-leaders-typically-move-on?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=277de2f4ac-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_17_05_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-277de2f4ac-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
,

“You’re the head of an organization and the job of the organization is to elect Republicans and you don’t elect Republicans...normally people do step down and move on.”

It’s no surprise that in early December, embattled IL GOP chair Don Tracy ** endorsed (https://townhall.com/tipsheet/spencerbrown/2022/12/06/107-republican-national-committee-members-endorse-ronna-mcdaniel-for-reelection-n2616783?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=277de2f4ac-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_17_05_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-277de2f4ac-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
embattled RNC chair Ronna Romney McDaniel for re-election. Illinois RNC national committeemen Richard Porter and Demetra DeMonte also endorsed Romney-McDaniel.

But on Friday, Uihlein offered his official endorsement, saying,

“The course of history has brought us to a crossroads – either we will embrace a new vision and plan for victory for the future of the Republican Party, or we will remain idle and allow complacency to guide us....the Republican Party needs new leadership..it’s time for a leader willing and equipped to prevail in the fight against the radical left. That leader is Harmeet Dhillon.”
** (https://twitter.com/pnjaban/status/1613989383522390016?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=277de2f4ac-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_17_05_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-277de2f4ac-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
This past election, Uihlein donated over $50 million to support Illinois grassroots Republican Darren Bailey’s campaign for governor – directing $10 million to Bailey and $42 million to a pro-Bailey PAC.

In 2018,
** Uihlein bankrolled Jeanne Ives’ race (https://www.nbcchicago.com/news/local/dick-uihlein-illinois-governor-primary-ives-rauner/139996/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=277de2f4ac-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_17_05_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-277de2f4ac-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
to defeat incumbent establishment Gov. Bruce Rauner, R – donating $2.5 million.

Since the massive and widespread midterm election losses in Illinois, this publication has argued for the removal of IL GOP chairman Don Tracy.

And this publication agrees with Mr. Uihlein that it’s time for new leadership at the RNC – but it’s also time for new leadership here at home, too.

As the
** Chicago Tribune Editorial Board (https://www.chicagotribune.com/opinion/editorials/ct-editorial-illinois-republican-drubbing-midterm-elections-trump-20221111-zo4qahohojcydftvpwrhkmlkme-story.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=277de2f4ac-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_17_05_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-277de2f4ac-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
pointed out in a Nov. 11 editorial,

“Republicans lost every state constitutional office – governor, attorney general, secretary of state, comptroller and treasurer – and 14 of 17 congressional seats. In the General Assembly, not only did the GOP fail to gain any ground on Democrats’ supermajority, Democrats notched a record number of seats in the Illinois House. And in the Illinois Supreme Court, where Republicans had an opportunity to gain two seats...they came up short. Democrats now have a comfortable 5-2 edge in the state’s high court.”

And yet, Tracy remains, despite a party in chaos; an
** imminent audit (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/illinois-review-its-time-for-the-u-s-postal-service-to-audit-the-il-gop-again.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=277de2f4ac-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_17_05_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-277de2f4ac-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
of the GOP postage discount, which was used on ** mailers (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/il-gop-weaponized-postage-discount-to-attack-conservative-candidates-during-primary.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=277de2f4ac-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_17_05_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-277de2f4ac-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
to target and attack conservative grassroots candidates during the Primary; senior GOP officials ** endorsing (https://www.politico.com/f/?id=0000017e-6d5c-dbc8-a1ff-7d7dbf990000&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=277de2f4ac-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_17_05_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-277de2f4ac-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
Democrat Richard Irvin in the governor’s race; a GOP House Minority leader ** voting with Democrats (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/breaking-il-house-gop-leader-jim-durkin-votes-with-democrats-to-ban-assault-weapons.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=277de2f4ac-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_17_05_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-277de2f4ac-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
to ban assault weapons; Republican legislators accepting significant campaign contributions from the most ** far-left teachers union (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/breaking-powerful-teachers-union-that-supported-mandates-helped-write-sex-education-standards-donated-to-illinois-republicans.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=277de2f4ac-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_17_05_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-277de2f4ac-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
in the state during the pandemic; and the GOP endorsing, paying for, and mailing a ** pro-choice mailer (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/il-gop-violates-party-platform-pays-for-and-endorses-pro-choice-mailer-during-2022-midterm-election.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=277de2f4ac-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_17_05_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-277de2f4ac-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
just weeks before the midterm election – a direct violation of the Republican Party of Illinois Platform.

And that’s not all – there’s more. But you get the point.

They say that the definition of insanity is doing the same thing over and over again, and each time, expecting a different result. And that perfectly describes the leadership of Romney-McDaniel and her best friend Tracy.

But until we get them out of the way, Republicans at the national and state level will continue to lose – and that, we can’t afford – even with a billionaire like Mr. Uihlein.
** (https://twitter.com/pnjaban/status/1615208158431154178?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=277de2f4ac-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_17_05_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-277de2f4ac-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

** IL GOP Creates New Postage Discount Policy Committee, After Illinois Review Exposes Corruption and Abuse (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/il-gop-creates-new-postage-discount-policy-committee-after-illinois-review-exposes-corruption-and-abuse.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=277de2f4ac-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_17_05_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-277de2f4ac-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

Just weeks after Illinois Review published articles exposing deliberate and ** widespread abuse (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/il-gop-weaponized-postage-discount-to-attack-conservative-candidates-during-primary.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=277de2f4ac-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_17_05_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-277de2f4ac-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
of the IL GOP postage discount during the Primary, embattled IL GOP chairman Don Tracy has tasked State Central Committee members to create a new committee to review and create postage discount policies regarding candidate mail in primary elections.
** (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/il-gop-creates-new-postage-discount-policy-committee-after-illinois-review-exposes-corruption-and-abuse.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=277de2f4ac-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_17_05_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-277de2f4ac-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
Richard Irvin, Aurora's mayor and a Republican candidate for Illinois governor, at his Aurora headquarters on June 28, 2022. (Photo: Armando L. Sanchez / Chicago Tribune)
In July, during a meeting with conservative leaders, Tracy deflected any responsibility after admitting that the Richard Irvin for governor campaign received the ** IL GOP postage discount (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/exclusive-audio-don-tracy-admits-irvin-campaign-used-il-gop-postage-discount-during-primary.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=277de2f4ac-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_17_05_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-277de2f4ac-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
in the primary – a perk not afforded to any other campaign for governor.

Initially, the IL GOP’s strategy was to
** blame former House GOP Minority (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/sources-il-gop-blames-jim-durkin-for-postage-discount-abuse-as-gop-faces-potential-postal-audit.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=277de2f4ac-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_17_05_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-277de2f4ac-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
Leader Jim Durkin, an ally and best friend to Tracy. The strategy then shifted to blaming IL GOP General Counsel John Fogarty, who reviews and approves mailers – but interestingly enough, Fogarty also served as the Irvin for governor campaign attorney at the same time he represented the IL GOP. And finally, the position of the IL GOP after pointing fingers at everyone was to call Illinois Review “** liars (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/il-gop-attacks-illinois-review-over-postage-discount-says-gop-strictly-neutral-during-governor-primary.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=277de2f4ac-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_17_05_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-277de2f4ac-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
” and “bloggers.”

The IL GOP is now demanding that Illinois Review play the audio – a move that will expose our sources and discourage the hundreds of conservatives across the state that frequently share information with us in confidence.

The IL GOP can’t even win an election, including Irvin’s, and now they think they can win an argument with Illinois Review despite a pile of evidence and audio.

There are critical municipal and school board races coming up, yet the IL GOP remains focused exclusively on attacking a conservative grassroots publication that’s exposing their corruption and their total disregard for the conservative base of the party.

And while the IL GOP is publicly calling for Illinois Review to play the audio, they are secretly denying access to their financial records and postage receipts – even after neutral third parties have requested to review the information with staff present at an office of their choosing.

But the creation of a new postage discount policy review committee is an interesting one – and an admission of guilt. And while an
** audit (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/illinois-review-its-time-for-the-u-s-postal-service-to-audit-the-il-gop-again.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=277de2f4ac-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_17_05_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-277de2f4ac-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
of the use of the postage discount by the Inspector General of the US Postal Service is imminent, not having policies in place, or blatantly ignoring them will not go over well when postal officials are going through their records.
** (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/il-gop-creates-new-postage-discount-policy-committee-after-illinois-review-exposes-corruption-and-abuse.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=277de2f4ac-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_17_05_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-277de2f4ac-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
An exclusive document obtained by Illinois Review indicating the creation of a new Candidate Mail Review Committee.

So the creation of a new committee will certainly be a talking point when Tracy and others meet with the team of auditors. But it won’t save them from the fines and possible suspension of the postage discount.

In the past, the IL GOP used the postage discount for positive mail pieces, but under Tracy’s leadership, the discount was ** weaponized (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/il-gop-weaponized-postage-discount-to-attack-conservative-candidates-during-primary.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=277de2f4ac-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_17_05_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-277de2f4ac-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
to target conservative grassroots primary candidates.

And while Tracy deflects the blame for overseeing widespread and humiliating losses during the November election, the US Postal Service will be looking for the one ultimately in charge of the postal discount – and that’s Don Tracy.

In a document obtained exclusively by Illinois Review, the Candidate Mail Review Committee will be chaired by SSC member Mark Shaw. Committee members include:
** Jeanne Ives (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/exclusive-audio-don-tracy-admits-irvin-campaign-used-il-gop-postage-discount-during-primary.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=277de2f4ac-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_17_05_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-277de2f4ac-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
, Bob Grogan, Mark Hosty, Jennifer Neubauer, Laura Pollastrini, Rhonda Belford, Larry Smith, and John Fogarty (lawyer to the IL GOP and the Irvin campaign during the primary).

The purpose of the committee is to “review the State Party’s policies regarding candidate mail in primary elections and the standard process and procedures for candidate mail.”

Other IL GOP SSC committee’s include:
-Finance Committee chaired by ** Vince Kolber (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/inside-the-il-gops-obsession-with-money-and-protecting-chairman-don-tracy.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=277de2f4ac-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_17_05_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-277de2f4ac-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
, a resident and voter in both Illinois and Wisconsin
-Election Integrity Committee chaired by Mark Hosty
-Ballot Chase Committee chaired by TBD
-PC & Candidate Training Committee chaired by Mark Shaw
-Local Party Capacity Building Committee chaired by Larry Smith
-University Town Committee chaired by TBD
-Minority Outreach Committee chaired by Jay Reyes
-Endorsement Policy Committee chaired by TBD

Please continue to follow Illinois Review for more updates as they become available.
** (https://youtu.be/Zfvn4mHGKpI?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=277de2f4ac-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_17_05_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-277de2f4ac-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
Publisher Scott Kaspar discusses with our Editor-in-Chief Mark Vargas the parallels of RNC Chair Ronna Romney-McDaniel and IL GOP Don Tracy and why, for the best interests of our Party, both need to go.
To learn more about Illinois Review, visit ** www.illinoisreview.com (https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=277de2f4ac-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_17_05_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-277de2f4ac-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
** Twitter (http://www.twitter.com/illinoisreview?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=277de2f4ac-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_17_05_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-277de2f4ac-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
** Facebook (http://www.facebook.com/illinois.review?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=277de2f4ac-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_17_05_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-277de2f4ac-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
** Website (https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=277de2f4ac-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_17_05_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-277de2f4ac-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
** Email (mailto:articles@illinoisreview.com)

name: Ron Wyden
subject: Why Republicans really want to defund the IRS
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57445808/387988266/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZGI4MzgzYy1jODk2LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wlgjTzAe6EEWWQhqqClLKJxzIxOf6ieEuGsAly4F1D0=&emci=7dc008fa-9d96-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=1db8383c-c896-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=9818364)
---

| | Five years of Donald Trump's tax returns filled nearly 6,000 pages. But the IRS could only afford to assign _one_ agent to audit them. This isn't an accident. **Republicans in Congress have spent decades chipping away at the IRS budget to the point that it is so stretched for resources it cannot serve the American people or go after wealthy tax cheats.** Republicans are doing everything in their power to keep it that way. Just days ago, as we headed back to D.C. for a new Congress, House Republicans' very first vote was on legislation to further defund the IRS and protect rich tax cheats. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57445809/387988267/-2044921950?refcode=2023-01-17-irs&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=1db8383c-c896-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZGI4MzgzYy1jODk2LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wlgjTzAe6EEWWQhqqClLKJxzIxOf6ieEuGsAly4F1D0=) A decade of Republican tax cuts made it virtually impossible for the agency to crack down on tax dodgers and big corporations. Democrats worked hard this summer to pass the Inflation Reduction Act and give the IRS the funding to go after wealthy tax cheats and big corporations while improving service for everyday Americans. But just hours after taking power back in the House, **Republicans showed the American people what's really at the top of their to-do list: helping their deep-pocketed friends and donors stay wealthy while the other 99% of Americans pay their fair share.** Thanks to this grassroots movement, Democrats expanded our majority in the Senate, and this bill will go nowhere. **But** **this gives us a taste of what's to come if Republicans manage to expand their power. Democrats are going to keep working hard to create an economy that works for everyone, not just the top tax brackets.**[**We can't do it without your help. Will you join our movement with a donation of $3?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57445810/387988268/-2044921950?refcode=2023-01-17-irs&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=1db8383c-c896-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZGI4MzgzYy1jODk2LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wlgjTzAe6EEWWQhqqClLKJxzIxOf6ieEuGsAly4F1D0=) **If the wealthy paid their fair share (or even what they legally owe), we could easily fund Social Security, Medicare, affordable housing, and create safer schools and communities**. But Republicans have no interest in that. They only care about grabbing their dwindling power and keeping their big donors happy. And make no mistake; Senate Republicans would pass this bill if they held the reins. We must continue to build up our movement and be ready to defend our majority again. We'll continue to work toward legislation for working families, not the wealthy few. Together we can create an America that works for everyone. _Ron_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | body:
Who will stand up to the FBI’s political bias, corruption, and lies if we don’t?| | | Peter,

Peter, After years of burying evidence and dodging accountability... The FBI’s political bias, corruption, and lies are FINALLY being exposed by Twitter CEO Elon Musk –– giving us undeniable evidence and a “smoking gun” proving the FBI purposely:
* **CENSORED the New York Post’s Hunter Biden laptop story**
* **BLOCKED investigative journalists from uncovering the truth**
* **SILENCED critics on Twitter and other platforms**

---
| | [](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=6e42a651e2b84e5dbf5aae0c93a8b250&_e=YmC31_kViDL_e-0nGvG0HegFUgh8voAkarNHFjbQ46GLcpIOisWvQlC-XRIpUlMaS3fDEvuWtPRR--_LcOontMWcR9DX1kIBiYhEAkge5W3jWLi9-YaUgCh_uVK8ImXm3vuKYAUQbZvpcMfeaHuvZOIZj49RdbmQW7tUp77yIGUYNNrq5HE0kYOl45OY9UZIepwOkpSFIJ796MW6ejFeWz4pYsb_3SRsj4XlZaxXccT4rZf53OU2yfIgJHYRL6s0dVjqlYEG8G3lxYNvwiatR7ZqRrzv3Nfbf2kf37m-cceOttgBauwaGFe508g5HbGZ8MoHbL0jOA-xxas_xz-qeOxudztOxkgGE7037pz55V4z_J2utEbD-b6nuHRZMOdn_EWNYKQDksHYbSPCBBf7AgIisFhUCf-9QhmtgICVxIeWkvRZw7u8fhFkpoD0Gl8DfxNSs3rMHhDWo0dJ2CTjnDAScSKhE0jdHWZy96rQD0s%3D)

This fight won’t be easy, but _nothing_ worth fighting for _is_. [**Will you stand with me AGAINST the corrupt, biased bureaucrats running the FBI by adding your name to demand a FULL investigation? >>>**](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=6e42a651e2b84e5dbf5aae0c93a8b250&_e=YmC31_kViDL_e-0nGvG0HegFUgh8voAkarNHFjbQ46GLcpIOisWvQlC-XRIpUlMaS3fDEvuWtPRR--_LcOontMWcR9DX1kIBiYhEAkge5W3jWLi9-YaUgCh_uVK8ImXm3vuKYAUQbZvpcMfeaHuvZOIZj49RdbmQW7tUp77yIGUYNNrq5HE0kYOl45OY9UZIepwOkpSFIJ796MW6ejFeWz4pYsb_3SRsj4XlZaxXccT4rZf53OU2yfIgJHYRL6s0dVjqlYEG8G3lxYNvwiatR7ZqRrzv3Nfbf2kf37m-cceOttgBauwaGFe508g5HbGZ8MoHbL0jOA-xxas_xz-qeMDD4eim1KJU8H1VHMK4R9pC1RHyrWYtM8q3Jo5o7eq_EUAnizFuI7egXvHzqW4cbuT4gZ-MLzKq_4u9BagrQjlAHRVMcpaxizFLQ9MgLJpK9m8jhFI9hUc7zFC_rVagIeXjf4xG4-sLamZhO8CrzYU%3D)

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: 2022 recap
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
2022 was an absolutely huge year
| | |
---
2022 was an absolutely huge year:

We took a major step in combating climate change with a bill that works toward neutralizing greenhouse gas emissions.

We capped the amount seniors will have to pay for insulin and took steps towards lowering the cost of prescription drugs.

We cracked down on large corporations that currently get away with paying little or no federal income tax.

Unfortunately, Republicans took back the House which means that continuing to make progress will be that much harder in 2023. I’ll be blunt: I need you in the fight.

**[It looks like you haven’t made a donation yet this year, and I’m hoping I can count on you to support our campaign before January runs out. $3 or more would go a long way – every little bit adds up. name: Replace Sinema
subject: Guess where Sinema is today...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Change for Arizona 2024 PAC
body:
| |
---
Peter, Where’s Kyrsten Sinema today... Is she in Arizona? In Washington? Nope! She’s in Switzerland, of course. At the famous Davos World Economic Forum, where billionaires and Wall Street execs can sidle up to global leaders and hang out with celebrities in the elitist, most rarefied of settings. As far away from her constituents as possible, and in the lap of luxury. Just as Sinema likes it. Sinema loves spending time with her Wall Street allies–you know, the same ones who have lobbied for many of the special tax breaks and loopholes for corporations and billionaires that Sinema has championed in exchange for tens of thousands of dollars in contributions? Sinema has proven time and again she’s more interested in prioritizing Wall Street interests than her own constituents' needs. That’s why we’re going to replace her in 2024. [**If you can, make a contribution to help us make sure a Democrat can defeat her in a three-way race>>**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ5XI6YHChR2bS-m44B_fczDt7reu3J81usVcir34OKK_ZDtQxDX6ImzhnG764yBg0kQYfD_A1ZW3_qVyMt31D6FJS3uS7DSxY7dbmdy5bNJrVw_tuVvuggll5P-jbKb2sU8WQktRLHPG-sm4rsfJOBAeI6Xs3xXdT9IOUUCrh9jAMhb9FwhBd04nlykU7Ez6X_EwBKg-JKgFPcaIsbDvhtyQLL2xSDAqu1dOlreKC6EWaR2Ik17yIzl1qIvBmxz_cbqQakH-25I_iFXXpdICjh2hcL4RDIwyF0GPOmVz3hA/3sx/ZkWtDFP_TGeAzS8u5789bQ/h0/wJdJuOxCcU1-aoMQe30rKvWMDq5cfXSaq6nfe4BRpUQ) Here’s a few pieces of news already coming out of Sinema’s trip to Davos:
* **Jamie Dimon, CEO of JP Morgan Chase, is at the summit**. Of course, Sinema’s former Legislative Director left Sinema’s office to lobby for JP Morgan on “bills in which Sinema has played a major role,” including specifically on matters related to corporate taxes.

* On the first day of the summit, Sinema already had a “private ritzy” lunch with multiple CEOs who lobbied to keep corporate taxes low, including **Antonio Neri of Hewlett Packard.****
**
* Sinema was spotted speaking with **former Trump Administration official** — and Wall Street dude — **Anthony Scaramucci** about cryptocurrency.

Many of the CEOs Sinema is seeing this week, including Dimon and Neri, are part of a shady group called The Business Roundtable that explicitly opposed President Biden's proposals to make corporations pay their fair share of taxes. Of course, Sinema helped them out and in return, they funded a shady dark money group that ran ads for months on behalf of Sinema. Sinema clearly prefers hobnobbing with the rich and famous over being a Senator. We think she should take that up full time. [**Chip in now if you agree Sinema would make a better Wall Street lobbyist than a Senator >>**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ5XI6YHChR2bS-m44B_fczDt7reu3J81usVcir34OKEr8Jmj3XeucqsWv3dERuxnWRwBntjLRqwBpaOjYBopQ260I-CnP_r9-4PCoxe1Gear0lQkAuaRU2-Y3InkWTDdV8Iqkw-gcyOEQsSjxsM-HwDp9HNJMmqAnA8h8CS3o9V4_wgIbAi7ozJEEbeLnPQuk2ZCs5nE4DMfeUXUHSlDbonFvH8cx70fgOU02WdWE22qDI_i8t7RdsqQ3IppczkJgm7fKVWcqZFN-mfSMcwextU43ZJfksUiZtrnEExFy1A/3sx/ZkWtDFP_TGeAzS8u5789bQ/h1/fijyIS16j3Q0G_tWD0FqC3Edddu-Ze1ESNaO3euYHdQ) [CHIP IN](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ5XI6YHChR2bS-m44B_fczDt7reu3J81usVcir34OKFuyBbgOdjzD0-mJTsgVx_baamfOrip_6oqh94_NPvuaT5uCWJwuvepe3prhMDTRtGoKKwfG0T9qB8lP5rC48s4cezQnw3uVFNc21s4RigLV8TBFvn-uyO93t3kZbxeN3k5oTIBGACOiCtruCdrx8KdVSCqMjF1b4tO5_tpf2Ggqn7hSTlmdewtTDouztVcXiVlz3W3GYySk2SIavDKN2ncgvlLXAcz4-f47F4h3axxDxIyQEknLuv1zBPBsOjXEfw/3sx/ZkWtDFP_TGeAzS8u5789bQ/h2/UWHEAIBHqfPcir6uwFjK9ZP6Y3NA_u8KX-ACEpE5REI) Thanks for helping to hold Sinema accountable, -Replace Sinema Project & Change for Arizona 2024

name: =?utf-8?Q?Illinois=20Review?=
subject: BREAKING: DeVore Sues Pritzker Over Assault Weapons Ban *EXCLUSIVE*
body:
This morning, former Illinois Republican nominee for Attorney General Thomas DeVore filed a lawsuit against Gov. JB Pritzker's Assault Weapons Ban.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/15d700797007/breaking-devore-sues-pritzker-over-assault-weapons-ban-exclusive?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=597178e3d0-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_17_07_42&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-597178e3d0-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Breaking: Former IL AG Candidate Tom DeVore Files Lawsuit Against Pritzker's Assault Weapons Ban, Seeks Immediate Restraining Order (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/breaking-former-il-ag-candidate-tom-devore-files-lawsuit-against-pritzkers-assault-weapons-ban-seeks-immediate-restraining-order.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=597178e3d0-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_17_07_42&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-597178e3d0-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

On Tuesday morning, former Illinois Republican nominee for Attorney General Thomas DeVore filed a lawsuit in Effingham County against Gov. JB Pritzker, State Senate President Don Harmon, D, Illinois House Speaker Christopher Welch, D, and Attorney General Kwame Raoul, D, in response to the assault weapons ban that Pritzker signed into law (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/pritzker-signs-assault-weapons-ban-warns-conservatives-there-will-be-consequences-for-breaking-the-law.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=597178e3d0-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_17_07_42&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-597178e3d0-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) last week.

============================================================
** (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/breaking-former-il-ag-candidate-tom-devore-files-lawsuit-against-pritzkers-assault-weapons-ban-seeks-immediate-restraining-order.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=597178e3d0-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_17_07_42&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-597178e3d0-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
Illinois Republican Attorney General candidate Thomas DeVore speaks during a press conference at the Chicago FOP headquarters on August 8, 2022.

After the ceremony, Pritzker spoke to the press, where he had a stern warning for conservatives across the state: there will be consequences for not following the law.

Since then, Pritzker has threatened to
** fire police (https://www.mystateline.com/news/pritzker-threatens-to-fire-police-for-not-enforcing-illinois-gun-ban/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=597178e3d0-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_17_07_42&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-597178e3d0-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
for not enforcing, what many are calling, an unconstitutional gun ban.

The Illinois State Rifle Association – an organization that Democratic legislators did not consult with when drafting the bill, didn’t mix words either, sending out a simple statement earlier in the day that
** said (https://archive.aweber.com/newsletter/awlist4894361/MTczMTczMjQ=/anti-2a-bill-on-the-way-to-the-governor-s-desk.htm?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=597178e3d0-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_17_07_42&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-597178e3d0-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
,

“Challenge accepted. The Illinois State Rifle Association will see the State of Illinois in court.”

In a press release shared exclusively with Illinois Review, DeVore said in announcing the filing of the lawsuit,

“No longer can the citizens sit idly by while bureaucrats destroy the very foundational fabric of our great Republic. It’s an honor of my lifetime to play a role in representing the People against tyranny. Whether it be with the Illinois Supreme Court or the United States Supreme Court, we will continue to seek redress at every available turn until such time as the foundational principles which make this country great are restored to the People.”
** (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/breaking-former-il-ag-candidate-tom-devore-files-lawsuit-against-pritzkers-assault-weapons-ban-seeks-immediate-restraining-order.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=597178e3d0-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_17_07_42&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-597178e3d0-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

An emergency hearing is scheduled for 11:00 am CST tomorrow in Effingham County where DeVore will be seeking a temporary restraining order to restore the constitutional right to bear arms while this matter proceeds through the courts. Links of the documents filed, and shared exclusively with Illinois Review, are included below.
* A ** copy (https://drive.google.com/file/d/1KLcWfHKjqFtNnCv61Yd-a91rjSIys8Cf/view?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=597178e3d0-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_17_07_42&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-597178e3d0-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
of the Complaint For Declaratory Judgement.
* A ** copy (https://drive.google.com/file/d/1KNKpjVZ0XatMkTWcT01RrYhx6_rLKybf/view?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=597178e3d0-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_17_07_42&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-597178e3d0-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
of the Motion for Preliminary Injunction.
* A ** copy (https://drive.google.com/file/d/1KTinPEotRvg7SxwmHGwOv9z2jJfYsy4i/view?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=597178e3d0-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_17_07_42&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-597178e3d0-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
of the Motion for Temporary Restraining Order.

Please continue to follow Illinois Review and ** DeVore Law Offices (https://devorelawoffices.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=597178e3d0-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_17_07_42&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-597178e3d0-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
for more updates as they become available.

name: Team Veronica
subject: Democrats are fighting for you. Republicans are fighting each other.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VERONICA ESCOBAR FOR CONGRESS
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP01/1/61645/images/VE_Logo_Web.png]
Friend — after days of chaos, the House has finally started our urgent work for the American people.

That's because it took Republicans 15 votes to elect a Speaker. While Democrats are fighting for you, they're busy fighting each other.

We can't say we're surprised, friend. The modern GOP is all about creating drama and media attention for themselves. After all, this is the party whose #1 priority for years was repealing the Affordable Care Act and stripping healthcare from tens of millions of Americans. Now they're turning to stripping seniors of social security benefits and lining up extreme members for committee chairs. They'll stop at nothing to undo our progress.

Republicans can pull all of the partisan stunts they want, friend. Nothing will stop Veronica from fighting for El Pasoans.

If you can, please chip in to support her work » [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ve_email?refcode2=534c2717-a796-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&refcode=230117_team_disarray_l1]

contribute [secure.actblue.com/donate/ve_email?refcode2=534c2717-a796-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&refcode=230117_team_disarray_b1]

Can’t contribute? Reply back with a note of encouragement for Veronica and we’ll pass it along!

Thank you for being part of this movement, friend.

— Team Veronica
Veronica Escobar made history as one of the first Texas Latinas elected to serve in Congress. She's an outspoken advocate for El Paso's progressive values in Washington. That's put a target on her back from Trump supporters who are preparing to spend millions to end her leadership. Can we count on you to stand with Veronica?
Contribute Now → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ve_email?refcode=emailfooter&refcode2=534c2717-a796-ed11-994c-00224832eb73]
Volunteer → [https://secure.ngpvan.com/roi8SJcqOEKOx12ydAHRpg2]
PAID FOR BY VERONICA ESCOBAR FOR CONGRESS
Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/eaGgxqxLfEqdtb8Wp4hmVA2?unsubscribedata=5RRGLn2bf8AP7GgaSQvDNCpUXjp8xqp8Rsu8ueeEmbnwaJWwLmGRKzhelHY88vfjPYWIX61YjsCDuB6iGmMMNmVl2Oy3gTfiFT4El8J2%2FjyHr9DVWKlQkaSp32CrxZpyF3LY4pjHuydFxxWbN%2FPD5sDtGMbjNKEynpgzDKqQCTpAOd9NY%2BJcwDzWeFflxoOO5TYiQX6d4vq1RsAu1jF6wz1Ri6tuET9OG3gE4H8NqnZoiZekhM25hoWNgZ0xDI57C2qgIp4czllQLch9XkNBNo%2BsLp9rRYJrmJ4UeAxGILG5UTrbFPA5nHaa0M8u3JM8RZlZRNRWei8CYsFErceqi%2FpPrb%2FJ4c8mR%2FS%2BKVN6nwTjrPWuuOGWF2cYGxNPNsyHxeoMBdt%2B7zU1lefapdneOkUJoB8FnNCN%2BpKg2AXPC0R3O3cfepuzK0Xb7GS45KGW] . subject: Sheriff Gator DeLoach Endorses Judson Sapp
body:
Judson Sapp for State Representative | | | [ ](https://judsonsapp.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=786f9905f43902655e694a1cd&id=d74c1ff62d&e=dc147d445f)
---
| _**Husband. Father. ****Conservative Businessman.
Proud Floridian.**_
---
| |
---
|
“I am proud to endorse Judson Sapp for State Representative. Judson is a native of Northeast Florida, he runs a successful business, helps local charities, and is raising a family here. Judson Sapp is a staunch supporter of law enforcement and understand the needs of our community. I look forward to working with Judson as our next State Representative to preserve the Florida we all know and love.”
_**-Sheriff Gator DeLoach**_

name: Jim Jordan
subject: I need your immediate input
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress

Fellow Conservative,

With our new majority, House Republicans will have the opportunity to show the American people a better vision for our great country that includes:

* ...a vibrant and growing private sector economy,
* ...able-bodied people working,
* ...more domestic energy production and lower gas prices,
* ...a smaller and more accountable federal government, and
* ...restored respect around the world from allies and enemies alike!

Yes, we will still have big spenders in the White House and in charge of the U.S. Senate, but I intend to help lead the charge in the House in changing the direction of our country.

I’m sure you remember from civics class that the House of Representatives holds the federal purse strings. Republicans pledge to take measures to stop the wasteful spending that sparked the inflation crisis. **Our top priority must be to reverse the failed liberal agenda of sending government checks to able-bodied people for not working**.

Republicans will pave the way for renewed domestic energy production, even a return to energy independence, marking a sharp turn from the failed Biden/Pelosi policies.

**Perhaps most importantly,** we will bring much-needed accountability to bureaucrats like Fauci, Mayorkas, and the whole cast of characters behind the waste, fraud and corruption of the Biden Administration. **I am so energized to embark on this bold mission!**

As we continue to find our footing, **[I wanted hear what YOU think the priorities for this Congress should be.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=dca027c2f29c454ca77230f8cdf3d901&_e=lQUv883K4hQMaH4GFuzT1AxVFpmDjh8_M374ZDpVoW3J7oqUqGjv4VAMijr0rPgTOKpisCQlxZ6PV3zM2Ia2yIHI09198RXDJxSBFDySXRsHqFzbdsI8Hli2GV3XKytSgYITDmf-UF1oTYc3mprgljEaW6rFjZyK6p1NMZCDVkQxQ19GRsy9mmuAdnaDqYKhjEwtqo02daGh8NNPTLe_dHKcok8cow7pobMO-iT2O0gGXBf33aLcV6o5Mp3iHNpRoAJaDj3V9wZNdbKwDXwJ40W-cM2H38hZh7pWuzSN9eEf2yE7xU6TGlOFs_h2bXFXmFc6Eq5PWOUHBFvJL9jNWuEyr9gwqaJqcas835EGozZjJXDzps5zBadn8Te9CPhVjzhVm_ogWw87J0trXTQCCSKRtbEi8rslE11rcMx8KYYo-wfdaTGuEHS_9gKlAAbPMdy6ogoK5XsXHz8RXquDfw%3D%3D)** There is no doubt in my mind that every good policy we propose will come under relentless attack by Democrats and the mainstream media, so I want to be sure that as we move forward, we are doing right by trusted patriots such as yourself.

Would you mind taking a moment to**[complete the survey linked below](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=dca027c2f29c454ca77230f8cdf3d901&_e=lQUv883K4hQMaH4GFuzT1AxVFpmDjh8_M374ZDpVoW3J7oqUqGjv4VAMijr0rPgTOKpisCQlxZ6PV3zM2Ia2yIHI09198RXDJxSBFDySXRsHqFzbdsI8Hli2GV3XKytSgYITDmf-UF1oTYc3mprgljEaW6rFjZyK6p1NMZCDVkQxQ19GRsy9mmuAdnaDqYKhjEwtqo02daGh8NNPTLe_dHKcok8cow7pobMO-iT2O0gGXBf33aLcV6o5Mp3iHNpRoAJaDj3V9wZNdbKwDXwJ40W-cM2H38hZh7pWuzSN9eEf2yE7xU6TGlOFs_h2bXFXh5pLUvutupv023V18TjREzdQKZvuBz_Pshk_fIeucvOCLA1P8-pRPm6kkD-gZSPR0AaWrd2Nw23XxUR2Bex78KUZLKI2bbe3LBxWA9CEnXjBjErwD7KMkgb_i1OgXfC-HjaitgaynhA_53UJZG53hQ%3D%3D)** and letting me know what you think about our 2023 Congressional Priorities?

P.S. Democrats have done immense damage to this country in the past 24 months, and we are going to be working tirelessly to clean up their mess. Our job is clear, and our vision is strong, but we want to make sure we know YOUR priorities by taking our **[2023 Congressional Survey today.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=dca027c2f29c454ca77230f8cdf3d901&_e=lQUv883K4hQMaH4GFuzT1AxVFpmDjh8_M374ZDpVoW3J7oqUqGjv4VAMijr0rPgTOKpisCQlxZ6PV3zM2Ia2yIHI09198RXDJxSBFDySXRsHqFzbdsI8Hli2GV3XKytSgYITDmf-UF1oTYc3mprgljEaW6rFjZyK6p1NMZCDVkQxQ19GRsy9mmuAdnaDqYKhjEwtqo02daGh8NNPTLe_dHKcok8cow7pobMO-iT2O0gGXBf33aLcV6o5Mp3iHNpRoAJaDj3V9wZNdbKwDXwJ40W-cM2H38hZh7pWuzSN9eEf2yE7xU6TGlOFs_h2bXFXVSAKmxYjTQKq9sBe4ozCCX5hhkqtSuZ898mzNZF5wVxrahNWNwQ2-CH0cunros_k4hFEJSWUdm7jREL8BZpCIHiXL09pacnmU-T6Obs5f3gpmJ0IXY2-XjtoyW621oJP3zlsi-c91Eao-NZKStI46A%3D%3D)**

**About Jim Jordan:** | Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

name: Full Mag News
subject: What do you think about higher education today?
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.
| | |
---
| This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=abd854b67acc45d0912f3f10c56b6a46&_e=jgCcuz_Z6r3mIQdxxTRl5p5zBy4Kfze9YLhtYbHGN1UwLNQB3mqD-aDxNhRW9BnRZbJYHTx5UjZgU4LD4OzAS30WmUR_Z6SEHUWfxB3Bm6Rvz46CoknKnSCPMTZQYSs2b_vn9ELpNUOdCHUONh1PqelubFm_vZPZ66n6sfqA-mCz-TE_6N_snyqfZsvKdCLYaFcY1ZBUgZZSpXf4Bq5b9_CIIH9E-u--lugdTPeGti-Uhk44h-mZfOrtgZUI2GZTfwyGXS4EThtKy0tPfS3SZlzfIqFFJ2YsbFYbI04-MnbKH2QNNcS4gNpGRHzA1cEF7O9gM9hcCSJGnJLRYr9-c1ywl1THcNjjDRBQLmulMrLW-zMeak0w-TehVR44ntkP)
---
| | | Fellow American, Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of American history and government--including an understanding of the purposes and principles of the Constitution? There is reason to be doubtful. There seems to be a decreasing sense of patriotism among young Americans, and an increasing attraction to socialism and other ideas destructive of liberty. And have you noticed all the disturbing incidents taking place on college campuses, with students resorting to intimidation, threats, and violence to silence speakers with whom they disagree? Hillsdale is planning to redouble its efforts for the future of liberty. We will respond to these disturbing trends by expanding our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--especially for younger Americans. And as we form our strategy we'd like to hear from you: [**Please take our brief education survey here » **](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=abd854b67acc45d0912f3f10c56b6a46&_e=jgCcuz_Z6r3mIQdxxTRl5p5zBy4Kfze9YLhtYbHGN1UwLNQB3mqD-aDxNhRW9BnRZbJYHTx5UjZgU4LD4OzAS30WmUR_Z6SEHUWfxB3Bm6Rvz46CoknKnSCPMTZQYSs2b_vn9ELpNUOdCHUONh1PqelubFm_vZPZ66n6sfqA-mCz-TE_6N_snyqfZsvKdCLYaFcY1ZBUgZZSpXf4Bq5b9_CIIH9E-u--lugdTPeGti97q-JInhuyXikpjMfEm3Z5v3IgxU8POC3rIy0XmKMvRgppAlk2cXYqEPGLCMRLux9AklVS33_EUv2cyoRDrSMOLMdhODuFdBFGNaxUcJkkXccF1xDh3Yq_dSAJmUbyNUBIjit4p00kKUMY-FpRXCUP) We have done too many of our young people a disservice by failing to provide them with knowledge of our nation's great heritage of liberty. Even worse, many of our schools, corrupted by Left-wing bias, have pushed a false history of America as essentially flawed and unjust. This indoctrination will only continue once students return to campuses across the country. Hillsdale can remain independent and stay true to its mission because it refuses to accept one penny of taxpayer funding--even indirect aid like federal or state student grants and loans. This frees Hillsdale from burdensome and corrupting regulation, but it also means we are entirely dependent on the support of our friends nationwide. Will you help us understand how Americans look at education today so that we can plan our expanded outreach in the smartest way possible? [**Please take a few minutes to complete this survey and let us know your opinions on education today » **](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=abd854b67acc45d0912f3f10c56b6a46&_e=jgCcuz_Z6r3mIQdxxTRl5p5zBy4Kfze9YLhtYbHGN1UwLNQB3mqD-aDxNhRW9BnRZbJYHTx5UjZgU4LD4OzAS30WmUR_Z6SEHUWfxB3Bm6Rvz46CoknKnSCPMTZQYSs2b_vn9ELpNUOdCHUONh1PqelubFm_vZPZ66n6sfqA-mCz-TE_6N_snyqfZsvKdCLYaFcY1ZBUgZZSpXf4Bq5b9_CIIH9E-u--lugdTPeGti-e1xwIyjLFsEyOTBck2ZxDTjiWgBIaZjdkMAac_tj2VWVJXvZlB-F67bsHNSIeBTN7n6e0h6-ulsEfcqjrnwlwZFid4y3-HySi6Rj36hAw9f1BEWUFPtNU8XCg4s74ixvCKundiWitO6pkIVU_AigE) I am deeply grateful for your friendship.
---
Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Sent to Full Mag News subscribers.

subject: apologies

body:
|

| | Hi, Susie Lee here. Sorry for the late email but I wanted to reach out before our mid-month goal deadline in a few hours. **We’re just a little over $600 away from reaching our goal and your support couldn’t come at a more urgent time.** House Republicans are planning their attack on the rights and institutions we care most about. Reproductive rights, LGBTQ+ protections, safeguards against climate change, and Social Security and Medicare. On top of this, the 2024 campaign cycle will soon enter full swing, meaning we have to be prepared for whichever candidate the far-right GOP runs against me. We cannot let this seat flip red after all the work we’ve accomplished together. **So, I’m asking you to please chip in to help me take on the House Republican Majority and keep this seat away from GOP hands in 2024. I’ve pasted your link to donate below.** [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/susie_jan_midmonth**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57446771/388006791/-1708679174?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_230117_FR_MM3_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZmI5NGI2MS1kNDk2LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kJaGbJ22RP7mD-tltKdcK8PL89QMRzHZOcjDPO21Ofs=) Thank you so much for your support. clean_body: | | | Hi, Susie Lee here. Sorry for the late email but I wanted to reach out before our mid-month goal deadline in a few hours. We’re just a little over $600 away from reaching our goal and your support couldn’t come at a more urgent time. House Republicans are planning their attack on the rights and institutions we care most about. Reproductive rights, LGBTQ+ protections, safeguards against climate change, and Social Security and Medicare. On top of this, the 2024 campaign cycle will soon enter full swing, meaning we have to be prepared for whichever candidate the far-right GOP runs against me. We cannot let this seat flip red after all the work we’ve accomplished together. So, I’m asking you to please chip in to help me take on the House Republican Majority and keep this seat away from GOP hands in 2024. Fellow Patriot, I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, _How We Win!_ **While supplies last, you can get a copy of this brand-new book to give to a conservative friend or family member (or to add to your personal library) when you make a gift of _ANY AMOUNT_ to Turning Point USA.**

[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e1e5123219684db5af492ab97527eaef&_e=aQwFSRCUdZT4LjfuJzRtCjRNZ9k7IdobR89y3ssJLy3cloQPlGfkp9wZG1xfhpq4o4p96HiMcsCMFQGAEs7O7tYJ33-v7i_VwzP4GnHH84Wc5yWVhu8Eerhvpy023SbZUBrQ4jPgmh_rT03MJbWhF49pFIRMPERQzlFTuevNxj2A8YD8qcRD8WSqpwmMZWq9dwn6FmvdFWM5PdgbXFFIM1kIqTPUc7se1TZGehgBJ9F9xUZHzRUbTMny6IexoC9w1VINjZ69alzxPHN_nwp9KWD95hf0pHMdvVaXTbj5i0M%3D)

[Get my book](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e1e5123219684db5af492ab97527eaef&_e=aQwFSRCUdZT4LjfuJzRtCjRNZ9k7IdobR89y3ssJLy3cloQPlGfkp9wZG1xfhpq4o4p96HiMcsCMFQGAEs7O7tYJ33-v7i_VwzP4GnHH84Wc5yWVhu8Eerhvpy023SbZUBrQ4jPgmh_rT03MJbWhF67wnU2e_LBSoUActwXcpdvejYuCbRB6v-Oh2WE14MEzbEhwTCP4O0EAXTVOMa9rLmP_mwx5-wjZieVFaCbwgG2VTu9BXAFLcTs2Y1ZFJf4GlECOcFm2WYgI0DnF0k0NqiZG5L7sHLSexQ9NUNSBehM%3D)
---
Until now, Turning Point USA has been giving this book away as a thank-you gift for donations of $100 or more... **...but generous TPUSA supporters found the message of _How We Win_ to be so _URGENT_ and so _IMPORTANT_ that they're helping me get it into the hands of as many grassroots patriots as possible.** [**I hope you'll make your gift to Turning Point USA right now and claim your copy of _How We Win_ before it's gone. Let me tell you -- these books are flying out of our warehouse!**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e1e5123219684db5af492ab97527eaef&_e=aQwFSRCUdZT4LjfuJzRtCjRNZ9k7IdobR89y3ssJLy3cloQPlGfkp9wZG1xfhpq4o4p96HiMcsCMFQGAEs7O7tYJ33-v7i_VwzP4GnHH84Wc5yWVhu8Eerhvpy023SbZUBrQ4jPgmh_rT03MJbWhF6teUcpKi93UwpYdfalNnk9UY7WjivxcYIC2JG9AKOlmVm1yyizZqjW5mL9ikFXglpgYgdg1ZtbjX3YRbr0N864exEWvN-MO7kXgfW8lKKdCfpOwFL0_pQv8vM6Z8CzfY72I3qH16lSaAl2Gfzbv6Hs%3D) _How We Win_ is my prescription for a new conservative movement that will SAVE America once and for all. You see, after TEN YEARS at the helm of Turning Point USA... ... TEN YEARS criss-crossing the country... ... TEN YEARS engaging with the good, the bad, and the ugly on college campuses... ... I have come to the conclusion that the time has passed where conservatives can hope to simply persuade liberal radicals to come around to our way of thinking. That simply isn't going to happen. We must become a movement that's unafraid to stand up for what's right... a movement that's done pulling punches and will _FIGHT_ for the moral and philosophical foundations that have made our nation the greatest in the history of the world. **_How We Win_ is my handbook for how we can become that movement -- and how we can secure victories for American Greatness that will last for generations to come.** And this special book can be YOURS for a gift of ANY AMOUNT today! [**Please -- if you haven't claimed your copy already, click here to get it now.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e1e5123219684db5af492ab97527eaef&_e=aQwFSRCUdZT4LjfuJzRtCjRNZ9k7IdobR89y3ssJLy3cloQPlGfkp9wZG1xfhpq4o4p96HiMcsCMFQGAEs7O7tYJ33-v7i_VwzP4GnHH84Wc5yWVhu8Eerhvpy023SbZUBrQ4jPgmh_rT03MJbWhF_bVu79XE83XVlKiPchT1jjvrsBJ584c6poVW18K93WZu9tIT5phSOF4N2Py-5zRzTxcdjy49MsjQ5o8Hy4xXJ2tDDvt-YEqRVCEdqFjIdL9puXdlr6XAWnUSBhZUPooWUJcwXN90OIsv_sGNrgU6Fc%3D)
---
[Get my book](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e1e5123219684db5af492ab97527eaef&_e=aQwFSRCUdZT4LjfuJzRtCjRNZ9k7IdobR89y3ssJLy3cloQPlGfkp9wZG1xfhpq4o4p96HiMcsCMFQGAEs7O7tYJ33-v7i_VwzP4GnHH84Wc5yWVhu8Eerhvpy023SbZUBrQ4jPgmh_rT03MJbWhF8nOzgl_A4k8EuN96xGckL6g-qlNc-DXXO9MkUHEiTEnkIZfZFZMGzfmTdKUsApB95dnogH-f8Jg--oWCIs-qeY2iULrcsFrg4pmHRO7-6kzwI_-Ila18hx3R_CadCvj2MScBKKbrAburUUbwNPNYsw%3D)
---
Even a gift of just $5 will help us ship the book to you and get this vitally important knowledge into the hands of patriots all across America. And best of all, when you make a generous gift today, you can rest assured that you're doing more than just getting a book. You're investing in the most powerful conservative youth organization in America. You see, with over 500,000 patriotic high school and college students on over 3,000 campuses nationwide, TPUSA isn't just _talking_ about saving America... **... we're _DOING IT!_** With the partnership of friends like you, we're helping high school and college students love America again. We're helping to restore patriotism and love of country as a way of life for hundreds of thousands of young Americans every year and changing the trajectory of a generation. This is your invitation to participate in that nation-saving work, my friend. [**It all starts when you claim your copy of How We Win -- which can be YOURS for a gift of any amount today!**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e1e5123219684db5af492ab97527eaef&_e=aQwFSRCUdZT4LjfuJzRtCjRNZ9k7IdobR89y3ssJLy3cloQPlGfkp9wZG1xfhpq4o4p96HiMcsCMFQGAEs7O7tYJ33-v7i_VwzP4GnHH84Wc5yWVhu8Eerhvpy023SbZUBrQ4jPgmh_rT03MJbWhF0ClVt4kTX1NsnX1E8EfeSsnu6A2g98YDIr4PnnoLdNzWLoC6OdheImA3kZqkFlRMQxPsoTHeBOleAiBljwlYa548YS_8m6s0V7hv2RJ96hh5klJuNtTpGAIi6qmTsv2oMPgxgUR1uAu-8Jdi4OnWMo%3D)

subject: With not much time left, can you help us tell this WWII hero's story?
body:
| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=ffc4b952bf7b4fcda15556ba415ec30e&_e=w0hxKBRKdlyGTLatGKEDtZ7fU5wsXBZGRRt_GrPJ1cJiaVouwOHMSToCsvr8-M3SwIXeIdppUAth8Dz5jMFMzZLpKvh72k0gMy3HtjoCPSmmQI4N-9awi8pAAaGcS8P-9Qn3UFFZ5UxyITytjN_7f6HySAWoTqIYtwaxyX54NDh2dadGBSZ-4_-LrAsHK0SJUHAEIVpLiiPUIKaR5_rt-vxL09Br4O72kHoosG2d8UM-9nZbTRiUO0XF28XlMjDi48aJFCEzLFCakekt9LCwGP3t2_rEUW1F48tSf-N9Ykc%3D)
---
Fellow American, I have an urgent request -- and since I know you care about our nation's heroes, I wanted to reach out to you right away. Jack Nakamura, a World War II veteran of the legendary 442nd Regimental Combat Team, wants to share his story with the American Veterans Center so we can preserve his legacy for the next generation. **_To film, produce, and release a documentary with this World War II hero, the American Veterans Center must urgently raise $1,583._** Will you make a gift to this emergency fundraising campaign right now? >> **[_https://secure.anedot.com/american-veterans-center_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=ffc4b952bf7b4fcda15556ba415ec30e&_e=w0hxKBRKdlyGTLatGKEDtZ7fU5wsXBZGRRt_GrPJ1cJiaVouwOHMSToCsvr8-M3SwIXeIdppUAth8Dz5jMFMzZLpKvh72k0gMy3HtjoCPSmmQI4N-9awi8pAAaGcS8P-9Qn3UFFZ5UxyITytjN_7fzTqd8ixKUeAlkv7F06PNklr-8Iudrl0w64b5Z-Tdrz4v61SPQkiTTQNXUfDL-ViYqZRLlkhiA-HrEmotg0pxsYp13FKn22cXe83jxj_Q7OE9Ap8uElBdsS2EqB1BUYegorA5Ui5kxSFODWrnvQppp4%3D)** Jack, who will celebrate his 100th birthday in February, is one of the last surviving members of the all-Japanese-American 442nd Regimental Combat Team. In October 1944, the 442nd saved more than 200 American soldiers of the "Lost Battalion" that had been cut off from Allied communications and surrounded by Nazis in the mountains of eastern France. **Today, Jack is one of the few remaining American heroes who can tell this story from first-hand experience --_and I don't want to miss the opportunity to preserve his lessons and experience._** Fellow American, because you're a strong supporter of America's veterans, I'm hoping that I can count on your help for this emergency request before the holiday season. I hope to be in touch soon with updates about our interview with Jack -- because _YOUR_ support is what makes it possible. \-- James Roberts, American Veterans Center
---
[**Support the American Veterans Center**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=ffc4b952bf7b4fcda15556ba415ec30e&_e=w0hxKBRKdlyGTLatGKEDtZ7fU5wsXBZGRRt_GrPJ1cJiaVouwOHMSToCsvr8-M3SwIXeIdppUAth8Dz5jMFMzZLpKvh72k0gMy3HtjoCPSmmQI4N-9awi8pAAaGcS8P-9Qn3UFFZ5UxyITytjN_7f6BcTNiTzghFlMHDBky6Ja5JVSre_q5-vpYDMFbqnfdv7Gc3tA7IXpJMutIJqzILGKT-k9Hp9U9-MbvtFxlTmb6us-QbwFFyIfUHmchlLnat1oi7i1c6HDotofR9RfJHiFG-z_2VY59UQ5Py3-oy4N8%3D)
---

body:
| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=82f8891383ad4ff9955aaed1b46b03a1&_e=zzwSDRoR_H0O7LCYVQSqgpUt8E0ybvH3e_mvWhv_umlwqhE-vmAE-ukYIps7SBZvVPol94QsYUM70nVYMOZIG5QvNjvkaJy0d8P2SwQTvnWxriYNLRG6hmHGwv-luUdBcO-vQwAkdVKseem8dY5Ki83BdKd7JVC98EohD3d7fSSSN2IoDA1StcV_OmAI7TeEVPZduyBluuqUhTXmBJh4kCgQ-AuVFjfVMQwxlO7iGGPT6xwlaKcJTOSJXFA12Df8YLAH4c3jOJBj4dRV8iZCTlxYprFPkY2NZ3PluRA3AMU%3D)
---

Peter, We’re just one week into the 118th Congress, and it’s been jarring to see how quickly the Republican majority has started to push its extreme right-wing agenda. They’re making no secret of what their priorities are. Already, they’ve formally launched an effort to outlaw abortion nationwide with no exceptions, established a so-called “Select Committee on the Weaponization of the Federal Government” to attack law enforcement agencies that won’t do their bidding, and they introduced a bill that would help tax cheats avoid paying their share. To say I disagree with these policies would be an understatement, Peter. House Republicans grip onto their slim majority as captives of the far-right fringe. **To combat this dangerous agenda, I will continue to do everything I can to _protect_ reproductive freedom, _support_ our law enforcement officers, and hold tax fraudsters _accountable_. ** In the meantime, we need to walk and chew gum at the same time by ensuring we hold onto this seat next election cycle. After winning by a razor-thin margin this past November, we can count on Republicans to throw all they have to flip this seat red. **[With that in mind, can you make a contribution to make sure we kick off our re-election campaign with the strong start it needs? Even just $5 will go a long way in combating the far-right agenda the House GOP is so determined to enact.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w5gOujJU4G2FQlGZnk4uqAhEqs6AkSYBRHgC_6K6_YCaIebun2I9sc7drpA-qJmpF2otwmdVemucy6YDoK6Q-ywvfY55LaIJACBAlnRjPWZXaZGCNtT_vpWewCPQPxn1vpVkcS4bBUfWyF2cEwGUWMsWefS5FDrNXuErcFqJriSUnJ7e_B4gnf3XAhaRZwfVP8GL_6e9c11Nku6iYx6nYKuKINFoIaLN94eVp7lDAnZ4ZT9RUkJyDREXdyo39H1MeDzENaW4yNM3PmFqtuF5PPIrOgyblIMltxzvYkscHvvS8icAPxZn9_RdN_0_7mezdBxqDRxMyZgEmjXb9Wv3f7csH_rFmtjDZheHCLCFICOnSVUX0Xjnn2u11WidLafcmU3J9h3opIMW22z_oP9Mwv/3sx/J7pLGrmwT1ub4wyYQsVUuw/h1/zv1HY6hZg-JwBaj8f-lS3pn-sxSFtttJ1W4pvb-2Omk)** As always, I appreciate your time and support. – Eric
