name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: JD in the New York Times
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

For six years, Justice Democrats has been on the frontlines of the
movement to elect new leaders, transform the Democratic Party, and deliver
meaningful policies that uplift our people and planet. And we have a
winning strategy — it’s how we helped get AOC, Jamaal Bowman, Cori Bush,
and Summer Lee to Congress.

Under the new Democratic leadership, the balance of power is shifting, and
progressives have more numbers and more influence than ever before in
recent history. The Squad represents millions of Americans who expect the
Democratic Party to put people over profit and fight for us.

But our movement isn’t going anywhere, and our movement won’t be
sidelined.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/125400?refcode=em20230117-27098&t=1001&akid=27098%2E1203867%2EvnoBIy ]We work year-round to recruit, train, and elect the future Justice
Democrats who bring the fight to Congress. The stronger our operations,
the better our chances, and the more power we can build from inside the
Democratic Party — can you rush a $3 donation today to
support us?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/125400?refcode=em20230117-27098&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=27098%2E1203867%2EvnoBIy ]Contribute $3

What we do at JD isn’t like any other progressive political organization —
our work has real life impacts with every candidate we help elect to
Congress. Just see what the New York Times said about us:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/125400?refcode=em20230117-27098&t=1021&akid=27098%2E1203867%2EvnoBIy ][IMG]

New York Times: “...if Mr. Jeffries is lucky enough to sit in the
majority, he’ll have to start counting votes. One of the overlooked
stories of the 2022 midterms was how many leftist or Squad-friendly
candidates won elections. The old Justice Democrats strategy of contesting
safe-blue seats is beginning to bear considerable fruit.”

It’s no secret that progressives are building power in Congress with every
cycle. But it’s not enough to get our candidates in the door. We have to
make sure they have a seat at the table where it counts, and there’s power
in numbers.

Our work is paying off — our candidates have become a bloc that the most
powerful Democrats in the party can no longer ignore. But that doesn’t
mean it’s going to be easy for us, or our candidates.

We have what it takes to go up against the establishment and win — and the
establishment works relentlessly to take our candidates down. As the last
line of defense for our candidates, it’s critical that we stay
well-resourced 24/7, but our fundraising has been declining.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/125400?refcode=em20230117-27098&t=1022&akid=27098%2E1203867%2EvnoBIy ]Can you chip in $3 or more today as we shore up our
resources, continue the search for our next candidates, and prepare for
the battles ahead?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/125400?refcode=em20230117-27098&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=27098%2E1203867%2EvnoBIy ]Contribute $3

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1024&akid=27098%2E1203867%2EvnoBIy ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1025&akid=27098%2E1203867%2EvnoBIy ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230117-27098-footer&t=1026&refcode2=27098_1203867_vnoBIy&akid=27098%2E1203867%2EvnoBIy

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1027&akid=27098%2E1203867%2EvnoBIy

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

Just see what the New York Times said about us: [ ][IMG] New York Times: “...if Mr. Jeffries is lucky enough to sit in the majority, he’ll have to start counting votes. One of the overlooked stories of the 2022 midterms was how many leftist or Squad-friendly candidates won elections. The old Justice Democrats strategy of contesting safe-blue seats is beginning to bear considerable fruit.” It’s no secret that progressives are building power in Congress with every cycle. But it’s not enough to get our candidates in the door. We have to make sure they have a seat at the table where it counts, and there’s power in numbers. Our work is paying off — our candidates have become a bloc that the most powerful Democrats in the party can no longer ignore. But that doesn’t mean it’s going to be easy for us, or our candidates. We have what it takes to go up against the establishment and win — and the establishment works relentlessly to take our candidates down. As the last line of defense for our candidates, it’s critical that we stay well-resourced 24/7, but our fundraising has been declining. [ ]Can you chip in $3 or more today as we shore up our resources, continue the search for our next candidates, and prepare for the battles ahead? [ ]Contribute $3 In solidarity, Justice Democrats Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [ ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [ ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department. Contribute to Justice Democrats:

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Kevin McCarthy just paid back his lackeys at the expense of our national security and basic governmental integrity. Hakeem Jeffries needs our help fighting back and warning the public.
body:
People have to hear about this.
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4762829d-f677-4404-b41e-c15ca82a88cb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, _Kevin McCarthy just paid back his lackeys at the expense of our national security and basic governmental integrity._ _You may recall that Marjorie Taylor Greene vocally supported him for Speaker, whipped votes among her fellow crazies for him and even fought with former allies who didn't vote for him. __Her reward? __**Kevin McCarthy just put Greene on The Homeland Security Committee.** _ **Let me say that again: _Kevin McCarthy just put a Qanon adherent integrally involved with Donald Trump's planning of January 6h, one who claimed Jewish lasers placed in space by George Soros started California wildfires, on the committee where she'll have access to classified information about domestic terrorists with whom she sees eye to eye._ ** [_Democratic Leader Hakeem Jeffries needs our support to continue this fight against McCarthy as he proves he couldn't give a damn about the United States by placing Greene, Santos and others in positions to to us grave harm. _**_Will you join us in giving Democratic Leader, Hakeem Jeffries, $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can afford for what may be the defining battle of our democracy over the next two years?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbd8bd87a-d560-4a19-98fd-c85a49143e05/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _McCarthy also put George Santos (if that's his real name) on the Small Business Committee, where he'll have an oversight role of one of the largest government programs in history: The Paycheck Protection Act (PPP). _**_Santos is currently being investigated for multiple crimes by two countries, including bilking victims' bank accounts and stealing and pawning items of theirs for financial gain. Again, this is a fox in the henhouse._**
---
|

Hakeem Jeffries already has proven himself exactly what we need right now, first by holding the entire Democratic Caucus together all 15 times Mccarthy begged for votes, and since constantly messaging via print, cable, networks, social media, etc., what Democrats are doing and how corrupt and barren is the GOP.**_ [**_Will you join us in giving Democratic Leader, Hakeem Jeffries, $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can afford for what may be the defining battle of our democracy over the next two years?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcbd8e923-0521-4541-8e4d-45ec30bf8845/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for always standing up to McCarthy and his dangerous troupe of right-wing stooges. Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T49171718-08f8-405a-a503-ea4a3d515c64/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

We're the ONLY national organization dedicated to electing these state-level voting rights champions. = | =

Team -

Bob wants to hear from you. He wants to know your priorities for the new year and what he can do to make government work for the people of New Jersey.

After last week's fiasco in the House electing a Speaker, it’s clear far-right extremists in the House will make reaching a consensus harder than ever. To get a jump start on our plans to continue delivering results, Bob is looking to hear from you directly.

He wants to know what you want him to focus on, whether it's fighting inflation, addressing climate change, or making health care more affordable, **[so take the survey and let Bob know today!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57442830/387964386/-126943815?ms=em23_230117_survey_kicker_IA&refcode=em23_230117_survey_kicker_IA&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Njg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZmY4OWU3Mi1hZjk2LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hfDTIm7lH4lgKo61Sq9hzpFv_SMppOcznAxJoUisa64=&emci=df2d1186-aa96-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=4ff89e72-af96-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=28243070)** [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57442831/387964387/-126943815?ms=em23_230117_survey_kicker_IA&refcode=em23_230117_survey_kicker_IA&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Njg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZmY4OWU3Mi1hZjk2LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hfDTIm7lH4lgKo61Sq9hzpFv_SMppOcznAxJoUisa64=&emci=df2d1186-aa96-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=4ff89e72-af96-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=28243070) Your voice has never mattered more!

Team Menendez

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57442832/387964388/263522139?refcode=em23_230117_survey_kicker_IA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Njg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZmY4OWU3Mi1hZjk2LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hfDTIm7lH4lgKo61Sq9hzpFv_SMppOcznAxJoUisa64=)
Friend –

As the new year begins, I want to hear from you, the people of New Jersey. I’d love to hear your vision, dreams, and hopes for our beautiful state, country, and democracy.

There's a lot at stake this year, and with a dysfunctional House controlled by far-right extremists, change will be harder than ever.

**[But that won't stop us from trying. Friend, I want to make sure I prioritize the issues that matter most to you. Please take this quick survey so I can hear directly from you about what's important.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57442833/387964389/-126943815?ms=em23_230117_survey_kicker_IA&refcode=em23_230117_survey_kicker_IA&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Njg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZmY4OWU3Mi1hZjk2LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hfDTIm7lH4lgKo61Sq9hzpFv_SMppOcznAxJoUisa64=&emci=df2d1186-aa96-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=4ff89e72-af96-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=28243070)** [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57442834/387964390/-126943815?ms=em23_230117_survey_kicker_IA&refcode=em23_230117_survey_kicker_IA&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Njg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZmY4OWU3Mi1hZjk2LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hfDTIm7lH4lgKo61Sq9hzpFv_SMppOcznAxJoUisa64=&emci=df2d1186-aa96-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=4ff89e72-af96-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=28243070) As your Senator, delivering results for New Jerseyans is always my number one priority.

**[So, let me know what your priorities are. This year will be a fight from start to finish. That's why I want to hear from you about the issues that matter most to you. – Bob Menendez

**
In honor of her birthday, we want to show Michelle Obama how grateful we are for her work to elevate Black women and Black voters all across the country. She helped to register **_2 MILLION voters_** before the 2022 midterms — and she’s not done yet!

[Join us in celebrating Michelle Obama: Will you sign our card and wish her a happy birthday?](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnm9hFWYg4Cpvcku7P80uO4mr308walvaVDqjAL1kCq_MLxA6Xv9M38LqQ6CvIwso_Hf5utC66c8Vd0m5YmP-ygigTr8dENZBAHgw9tsSy5paYP3ZDSgILAWs2Bg-3NkzyIJs5HfFZyTlkYo0G14X2ct2z-_pzFglhw8NBadRYAQjSFfDr5XbBWEVxcRSnD9bR9ygE3Jg1UMALdujRpSB5hzeoGLRercXu6ZoaKDrY5AWrVCX0xkkyiC1Y73O6iEWP2PyhVZkt_vEI4r_YPc5mfb_XL-A3SMIjUUpwC2t7ZY6A/3sx/70LjTAEIQiOXla_uo7l8SA/h1/1SblxgD_BS0ZwF_xG6YO4eMYaPb-CdXCKr9KA0Fnubg)

The Collective PAC

In honor of her birthday, we want to show Michelle Obama how grateful we are for her work to elevate Black women and Black voters all across the country. She helped to register 2 MILLION voters before the 2022 midterms — and she’s not done yet! Thanks, The Collective PAC | The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. **Miriam Lira-Hickerson**
Miriam Lira-Hickerson is the Ombudsman of Consumer Affairs for Minorities at the Nevada Department of Business and Industry. She is responsible for implementing the Department's education and outreach activities within the State's minority communities. As the Ombudsman, Ms. Lira-Hickerson provides consumer education, helps resolve consumer issues involving fraud or deceptive trade practices, and assists with business outreach and development. She is also a senior certified mediator and has mediated numerous civil disputes; also, Hickerson has 15 years being a Producer and host of a weekly radio named " Consumer Protection." She was named the City of Las Vegas in April 2013 Citizen of the Month. Recently Ms.Hickerson was named by the National National organization (NAWBO) as an Iconic Distinction Woman in Corporate/Government Services 2022. Lira-Hickerson holds a bachelor's degree in Marketing and a master's degree in International Commerce from Instituto Politecnico Nacional in Mexico City. She graduated from the FBI Civil Academy and the Las Vegas Metro Police Department Hispanic Citizen Academy. She has been an FBI Ambassador since 2014.
|

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Moderna should not raise the price of the COVID-19 vaccine. Add your name if you agree.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
|
#
Corporate greed is out of control, Peter. But I know I don’t have to tell you that. I’m sure you feel it every time you head to the gas pump to fill up your tank, or when you refill a prescription just to learn that Big Pharma has increased the price once again. And while working families are struggling to decide between putting food on the table or getting the medications and vaccines they need to survive, large pharmaceutical companies are only getting richer. Take Moderna for example. During the COVID-19 pandemic, Moderna made _tens of billions_ in profits off of the vaccine that was brought to market with major tax-payer assistance — and then used it to turn several of their corporate executives into multi-billionaires. And now, the _Wall Street Journal_ is reporting that Moderna is considering more than _quadrupling_ the price of the COVID-19 vaccine after the supply that the government purchased and distributed for free has been depleted. **Meaning that folks could end up paying more than $130 to get this life-saving vaccine.** Well, I won’t stand by while Big Pharma companies like Moderna threaten to restrict access to the vaccine during a pandemic. The American people funded Moderna’s vaccine to protect against the deadly pandemic and to help save lives — not so their execs could become billionaires. [**Moderna should not raise the price of the COVID-19 vaccine. If you’re with me, add your name to my petition today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57443226/387965932/289005701?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230117_PM1_V1_S2_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Njk1MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNmVhNDBhYy1iMjk2LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qmmS80lYqkTxDy_Fh72Yi0y00N4JLLFfeFgCHvGAP0A=&emci=b5ea40ac-b296-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=b6ea40ac-b296-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=35007871) | | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57443227/387965933/289005701?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230117_PM1_V1_S2_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Njk1MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNmVhNDBhYy1iMjk2LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qmmS80lYqkTxDy_Fh72Yi0y00N4JLLFfeFgCHvGAP0A=&emci=b5ea40ac-b296-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=b6ea40ac-b296-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=35007871)
---
Thanks for taking the time to read this message and make your voice heard on this critical issue.
— Tammy

name: Team AOC
subject: How you can help relief efforts in California
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Weeks of rain have ravaged CA. Here’s one way you can help.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20230117-3804-header&t=1&akid=3804%2E2526796%2E8TIWdX)
Since December 26, California has been pummeled nearly nonstop with rain due to seven atmospheric river storm systems — triggering more than 500 mudslides, displacing over 10,000 people in flood zones, and leaving at least 18 people dead.1 As the storms begin to subside, early estimates put the damage at well over $1 billion.2
[Today we’re launching a fundraiser for a California organization working to provide direct relief to the undocumented community in Northern California, many of whom have not been able to collect a paycheck since the storms began. Can you chip in $4 today to help UndocuFund Disaster Relief of Sonoma County with relief efforts?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230117-2.fUzsfX&refcode=em20230117-3804-P_FND_CHA_DIR&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3804%2E2526796%2E8TIWdX)
**[Contribute $4](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230117-2.fUzsfX&refcode=em20230117-3804-P_FND_CHA_DIR&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=3804%2E2526796%2E8TIWdX)**
_**100% of your donation will directly benefit this organization.**_
Here’s a bit more about UndocuFund:
Originally founded to assist undocumented individuals and families through wildfires – starting with the Tubbs wildfire in 2017 – UndocuFund’s efforts shifted during the onset of COVID-19, and they have been a lifeline to the undocumented community in the area since. They assist undocumented people who have lost their homes, wages, and/or employment with expenses, including temporary housing, home repairs, rent, groceries, essential household items, clean-up items, medical and dental expenses, and funeral and burial expenses. Many undocumented people do not qualify for FEMA assistance.
[You can help make a major difference right now to affected Californians by making a $4 contribution to an organization providing direct, on-the-ground relief. Can UndocuFund count on your $4 contribution today?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230117-2.fUzsfX&refcode=em20230117-3804-P_FND_CHA_DIR&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=3804%2E2526796%2E8TIWdX)
Our thoughts are with those who have lost their homes, livelihoods, or loved ones during the storms. Together, we can help our communities rebuild after climate-related disasters.
In solidarity,
Team AOC
1 - [California Geological Survey
](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/16056?t=23&akid=3804%2E2526796%2E8TIWdX)2 - [New York Times](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/16057?t=24&akid=3804%2E2526796%2E8TIWdX)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20230117-2?refcode=em20230117-3804-P_FND_CHA_DIR&t=25&refcode2=3804_2526796_8TIWdX&akid=3804%2E2526796%2E8TIWdX)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230117-3804-P_FND_CHA_DIR&t=26&akid=3804%2E2526796%2E8TIWdX)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=27&akid=3804%2E2526796%2E8TIWdX) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=28&akid=3804%2E2526796%2E8TIWdX) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=29&akid=3804%2E2526796%2E8TIWdX)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=30&akid=3804%2E2526796%2E8TIWdX)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=31&akid=3804%2E2526796%2E8TIWdX)

Since December 26, California has been pummeled nearly nonstop with rain due to seven atmospheric river storm systems — triggering more than 500 mudslides, displacing over 10,000 people in flood zones, and leaving at least 18 people dead.1 As the storms begin to subside, early estimates put the damage at well over $1 billion.2 100% of your donation will directly benefit this organization. Here’s a bit more about UndocuFund: Originally founded to assist undocumented individuals and families through wildfires – starting with the Tubbs wildfire in 2017 – UndocuFund’s efforts shifted during the onset of COVID-19, and they have been a lifeline to the undocumented community in the area since. name: JD Vance
subject: We didn’t win the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by JD Vance for Senate Inc

As you know by now,**_Republicans didn 't achieve victory in the Senate._** We came up short.

**So, it 's time to hustle harder. It's time to****__STEP IT UP.__ **

Nothing is more important to me than ensuring our great country remains great, our Constitution remains protected, and our democracy remains intact.

**_To protect these United States of America as we know and love them, we must fight harder than we ever have - starting TODAY._ **

It's 2023, and I'm ready to make my time serving you **COUNT.**

**Over the next six years, I have the privilege of working for you, the American people,** and I want you to be assured that while we may have come up short in the Senate Majority, I'm dedicated to serving **YOU** and working harder than ever before to save our beautiful country.

name: Paul  Bud  Haedike, American Veterans Center
subject: D-Day from a paratrooper who was there
body:
| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cb909b8464af456ab11ede6e4832b945&_e=S9DpxFLyCDPewT8sJfdkuqoKmVY5BebykfPgJlpDkIPLO13-uKD_RdlxO9x7DCLBL3CqMdz3kWPVNwARoau5qgtTyXLeGFCH7BR6KRfrWTmqxJyVgmlmDZrz-Zl2qdcEVjA_p2VK1a5YE3EXAkOluR6I6988hBvnISFFfodYHPfxXqhLBmBlaCHCXRhxjmoDOFPhzc8sLBZN5VWvdGOobd5KXHqe6z1iq3KsvhcWg1JxEz28W2hKKHCEOouu21H7xOZSb7OVwDz6o1m-WC-3Ln6C0dwvgif216RCKaDvZnA%3D)
---
Fellow American, My plane was shot down by the Germans in my first combat mission in World War II. Our rookie B-17 crew was in "Tail End Charlie," which is what we called the last plane in the formation to pass over the target. The Germans had zeroed in on us with 88 millimeter cannons -- which could fire five miles up -- and they hit our number one and number two engine. A B-17 is not made to stay up on two engines. But with skill, determination, and good fortune, we crash-landed in Belgium just over the Nazi lines. Five days later, we were rescued ... and I went on to fly 22 more missions.
---
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cb909b8464af456ab11ede6e4832b945&_e=S9DpxFLyCDPewT8sJfdkuqoKmVY5BebykfPgJlpDkIPLO13-uKD_RdlxO9x7DCLBL3CqMdz3kWPVNwARoau5qgtTyXLeGFCH7BR6KRfrWTmqxJyVgmlmDZrz-Zl2qdcEVjA_p2VK1a5YE3EXAkOluaKi2dJsmehU-UWwDN_iEINsdxviYvOTDiYRs01gyDrQSkyr1S_CMyEYsOqwhVRPCU_k4knWXbXRnQ_o_r9drW_hOLDTLbxSTnOT7hWtVBjXu1cBKSn7q0UiTdbO28k2c-dDzQA42-f09oz6kCRqyCo%3D)
---
_Above: The American Veterans Center recorded and released a 30-minute video documentary with me about my service in World War II._
---
**A few years ago, my friends at the American Veterans Center invited me to record a video documentary about my experience in World War II.** I was proud to share my story with the American Veterans Center (AVC), both to honor the memories of the brave men I served with and to pass on our hard-fought lessons to the next generation. Right now, the American Veterans Center is working around the clock to interview and record as many video documentaries as possible with World War II veterans like me. [**May I ask you to chip in $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more today to help fund the American Veterans Center** '**s critical video documentary project? As a non-profit, AVC depends on the contributions of patriotic Americans like you.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cb909b8464af456ab11ede6e4832b945&_e=S9DpxFLyCDPewT8sJfdkuqoKmVY5BebykfPgJlpDkIPLO13-uKD_RdlxO9x7DCLBL3CqMdz3kWPVNwARoau5qgtTyXLeGFCH7BR6KRfrWTmqxJyVgmlmDZrz-Zl2qdcEVjA_p2VK1a5YE3EXAkOlueQWJ6px9EiQ5koINTKCufxf5nAyxP6dgxpbWsSFEvFuh5H7VCl7NuTvKE02r0UIrOcUsoBe8mALXxJXlx8vOq_2FAc72nkKIjkEXC44A2Jv2q5WSyv8L2M3pSaY780BOxUVjae0jfh6eW_Y5JzzOnI%3D)
---
[Help the American Veterans Center](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cb909b8464af456ab11ede6e4832b945&_e=S9DpxFLyCDPewT8sJfdkuqoKmVY5BebykfPgJlpDkIPLO13-uKD_RdlxO9x7DCLBL3CqMdz3kWPVNwARoau5qgtTyXLeGFCH7BR6KRfrWTmqxJyVgmlmDZrz-Zl2qdcEVjA_p2VK1a5YE3EXAkOluS1M8pG4ql0p0ONshuTfgURLInRLY8Yg2wiT7klTG14Gi5FAdm9xtw8kfiowWLO8EZrCMrignJLewvh2uwzpBetgvlIBWYvM5a_k9VOiLW0pzTdll-lh2KO91DpTG4rzEPWejwG84OqcIMp3LHtUtHM%3D)
---
When the American Veterans Center records video documentaries with veterans like me:
• The experienced AVC video team coordinates travel plans with the veteran and his or her family. Oftentimes, AVC will even send out their staff to veterans' homes - of course, at no cost to the veteran.

• AVC records a beautiful, professional-quality video documentary that lets veterans tell their own stories in their own words. A keepsake copy is also given to the veteran and their family to enjoy. • AVC makes available - for free! - these powerful video documentaries to be used as part of our shared American history. These videos reach millions on YouTube and have been used by the Library of Congress, presidential museums, and award-winning films. [**Can I count on you to help the American Veterans Center record even more video documentaries with your gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more today? Your gift is urgently needed for AVC to continue their efforts.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cb909b8464af456ab11ede6e4832b945&_e=S9DpxFLyCDPewT8sJfdkuqoKmVY5BebykfPgJlpDkIPLO13-uKD_RdlxO9x7DCLBL3CqMdz3kWPVNwARoau5qgtTyXLeGFCH7BR6KRfrWTmqxJyVgmlmDZrz-Zl2qdcEVjA_p2VK1a5YE3EXAkOluXIkO4hp8N8FBvA9Y3qctM7XoJbFJTJmMGoPAclDSpAlXYHduoLvSgo8_qwOaMIRAw-iNtScyKIbbfWw9PMV6hiay9vxhLzOANPXzbCuXmoY6DPXXG2TAbwMHsS6FB-1qnyUoKivTEMJw31mSfc1hdM%3D)
---
[Help the American Veterans Center](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cb909b8464af456ab11ede6e4832b945&_e=S9DpxFLyCDPewT8sJfdkuqoKmVY5BebykfPgJlpDkIPLO13-uKD_RdlxO9x7DCLBL3CqMdz3kWPVNwARoau5qgtTyXLeGFCH7BR6KRfrWTmqxJyVgmlmDZrz-Zl2qdcEVjA_p2VK1a5YE3EXAkOluUTqQ9U3BgMM6LiaWKsjV9hES7lxqGUHPKsBzUFSEQrl_FfP8rF_ID6cMVdLATvJMI7f-QJHU72rkchQm4ISBgBmhbbuNAqVOaRWaOIRKGsNk8S2Vwz1t1WQ_sJgrt2-6wQ_ZDX4iJYoK5UJQ-x_X-I%3D)
---
The history books will teach you the facts, but only the servicemen and women of World War II can tell you what it was really like. In the beginning of the war, they said if a guy flew six or eight missions, he was on borrowed time. There were many men who served with me who didn't come home. They didn't get to be husbands, didn't get to be dads, and none of them got to be grandfathers -- which you can't understand until you reach that point in your own life. _Thanks to the American Veterans Center, and generous Americans like you who made my video documentary possible, my story, and the story of the young men in the Eighth Air Force, has entered our shared American history._ [**To help preserve the legacy of more World War II veterans like me, please make your most generous gift to the American Veterans Center today.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cb909b8464af456ab11ede6e4832b945&_e=S9DpxFLyCDPewT8sJfdkuqoKmVY5BebykfPgJlpDkIPLO13-uKD_RdlxO9x7DCLBL3CqMdz3kWPVNwARoau5qgtTyXLeGFCH7BR6KRfrWTmqxJyVgmlmDZrz-Zl2qdcEVjA_p2VK1a5YE3EXAkOluV2lf8SA8mAjPCkyv2TelS5OtDPyN_HaTwigJdfRJW6lm5jyJkxSjlPnAnZr9E4bN4Y_5XIOtVYXvMdV9ZFskboLPToxFWw_h0IVUA4BVM_yoFxL_0s9-ZX7uh40UHYcPbWfhEwtqmJzcUtzzkdiFoY%3D) I understand first-hand what good, important work the American Veterans Center does - and why their mission to record video documentaries with more veterans like me is so urgent. [**That** '**s why I** '**m asking for your support of the American Veterans Center today.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cb909b8464af456ab11ede6e4832b945&_e=S9DpxFLyCDPewT8sJfdkuqoKmVY5BebykfPgJlpDkIPLO13-uKD_RdlxO9x7DCLBL3CqMdz3kWPVNwARoau5qgtTyXLeGFCH7BR6KRfrWTmqxJyVgmlmDZrz-Zl2qdcEVjA_p2VK1a5YE3EXAkOlufqNxkfDi0_3Eci-hx5yp2qP_wFZInkeKp2IF5UZQ17sABER0GxXyC5nldI2Kz1gNu0BFdLy7rnr9CJQjlxzeWegtqDydNkIHVJOEz411wgvdKz3uWY-1KjxXLYrfUGr8FrI2UrwpJidd_8NmiHIBPU%3D) Thank you,

clean_body: | | | Fellow American, My plane was shot down by the Germans in my first combat mission in World War II. Our rookie B-17 crew was in "Tail End Charlie," which is what we called the last plane in the formation to pass over the target. The Germans had zeroed in on us with 88 millimeter cannons -- which could fire five miles up -- and they hit our number one and number two engine. A B-17 is not made to stay up on two engines. But with skill, determination, and good fortune, we crash-landed in Belgium just over the Nazi lines. Five days later, we were rescued ... and I went on to fly 22 more missions. Above: The American Veterans Center recorded and released a 30-minute video documentary with me about my service in World War II. A few years ago, my friends at the American Veterans Center invited me to record a video documentary about my experience in World War II. I was proud to share my story with the American Veterans Center (AVC), both to honor the memories of the brave men I served with and to pass on our hard-fought lessons to the next generation. Right now, the American Veterans Center is working around the clock to interview and record as many video documentaries as possible with World War II veterans like me. When the American Veterans Center records video documentaries with veterans like me: • The experienced AVC video team coordinates travel plans with the veteran and his or her family. Oftentimes, AVC will even send out their staff to veterans' homes - of course, at no cost to the veteran. • AVC records a beautiful, professional-quality video documentary that lets veterans tell their own stories in their own words. A keepsake copy is also given to the veteran and their family to enjoy. • AVC makes available - for free! - these powerful video documentaries to be used as part of our shared American history. These videos reach millions on YouTube and have been used by the Library of Congress, presidential museums, and award-winning films. The history books will teach you the facts, but only the servicemen and women of World War II can tell you what it was really like. In the beginning of the war, they said if a guy flew six or eight missions, he was on borrowed time. There were many men who served with me who didn't come home. They didn't get to be husbands, didn't get to be dads, and none of them got to be grandfathers -- which you can't understand until you reach that point in your own life. Thanks to the American Veterans Center, and generous Americans like you who made my video documentary possible, my story, and the story of the young men in the Eighth Air Force, has entered our shared American history. I understand first-hand what good, important work the American Veterans Center does - and why their mission to record video documentaries with more veterans like me is so urgent. Thank you, Paul "Bud" Haedike World War II Veteran For the American Veterans Center | The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. The Latino Vote Podcast Episode 26, a new year has come along with much to talk about. Starting with the House speaker vote debacle.

** NEW PODCAST EPISODE OUT NOW
------------------------------------------------------------

** It’s a New Year and 2023 has already brought much to discuss. On this episode of The Latino Vote, Mike and Chuck dive right in, analyzing the House speaker vote debacle and previewing larger discussion questions that they’ll be exploring this year such as:

What's happening in Cuba? How does it affect the Cuban vote here and differ from the history of Cuban politicization? Could 2023 finally be the year that an immigration reform package passes? That and many other topics.

Latino Vote hopes to build an even deeper community and network with its listeners this year. And that means we need your help and your involvement. If you have a topic that you want us to discuss or a guest op-ed piece we can read, pitch us, and send it to us!

name: Greg Casar
subject: My first week in Congress was eye-opening
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

My first week in Congress was eye-opening.

The extreme right-wing faction of the Republican Party — the same people
who boosted the insurrection and denied election results — proved that
they are ready to shut down Congress to push for deeply unpopular policies
like forcing cuts to Social Security, Medicaid, and Medicare.

The fact that key social programs are on the chopping block means that the
rest of the Congressional Progressive Caucus and I are going to need your
help to make sure no one in Congress — regardless of party — agrees to a
deal that balances the budget on the backs of the poor, the sick, our
seniors and struggling everyday Americans.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8231?source=OR_EM_FR_25SP_20230117_1_1&t=1011&akid=3886%2E5885482%2EEfPAHZ ]With your help, Our Revolution can help us create public pressure to
save Medicare, Medicaid, and Social Security, and advance our popular
policies in 2023. Can I count on you to rush a donation?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to
Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8232?refcode=OR_EM_FR_25SP_20230117_1_1&t=1012&akid=3886%2E5885482%2EEfPAHZ ]CHIP IN $10 NOW » [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8233?refcode=OR_EM_FR_25SP_20230117_1_1&t=1013&akid=3886%2E5885482%2EEfPAHZ ]CHIP IN $18 NOW »
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8234?refcode=OR_EM_FR_25SP_20230117_1_1&t=1014&akid=3886%2E5885482%2EEfPAHZ ]CHIP IN $27 NOW » [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8235?refcode=OR_EM_FR_25SP_20230117_1_1&t=1015&akid=3886%2E5885482%2EEfPAHZ ]CHIP IN $100 NOW »
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8236?refcode=OR_EM_FR_25SP_20230117_1_1&t=1016&akid=3886%2E5885482%2EEfPAHZ ]CHIP IN $250 NOW » [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8231?refcode=OR_EM_FR_25SP_20230117_1_1&t=1017&akid=3886%2E5885482%2EEfPAHZ ]CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT »

We need to use this moment to show how both the extreme right-wing and the
corporate wing of the Republican Party are both dangerously extreme. Their
shared priorities are to redistribute as much money from working people to
big corporations as possible.

Don't just take my word for it. The first bill they brought to the House
floor was to eliminate programs made to catch wealthy tax cheats — all so
their billionaire donors could avoid taxes.

The organizing work we do now will create a stark contrast with
Republicans to build the kind of Democratic majority that does things —
like pass the Voting Rights Act, the Fair Housing Act, restore abortion
rights, and advance union rights.

We need to push and work with the White House to get things done. This
means we should mount support when they act to advance our goals and draw
a line when actions harm working people.

For example, the White House recently cleared the path for people to more
easily get abortion medication at pharmacies and legally use the USPS to
mail it to states with bans (like my home state of Texas). We can applaud
great moves like that, while also holding the administration accountable
when they do things that aren’t in-line with our values.

We need to be comfortable with doing both. That's when we get to a
powerful, mature movement that can hold all these truths simultaneously to
affect real change.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8231?source=OR_EM_FR_25SP_20230117_1_1&t=1018&akid=3886%2E5885482%2EEfPAHZ ]Please chip in to support Our Revolution this year! I can't think of a
better investment in working people; any amount is a big help!

When we organize, we win,

Congressman Greg Casar
Texas Congressional District 35
Whip, Congressional Progressive Caucus

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=3886%2E5885482%2EEfPAHZ ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=3886%2E5885482%2EEfPAHZ ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=3886%2E5885482%2EEfPAHZ ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=3886%2E5885482%2EEfPAHZ ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=3886%2E5885482%2EEfPAHZ ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/signup_2109/?t=1006&akid=3886%2E5885482%2EEfPAHZ ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5923?c0=OR_EM_FR_25SP_20230117_1_1.DRptGu&t=1007&akid=3886%2E5885482%2EEfPAHZ ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America. Last year alone, we elected 74% of our 450 endorsed
progressive candidates by mobilizing on the ground AND in the halls of
power.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5924?c0=OR_EM_FR_25SP_20230117_1_1.l-7nqZ&t=1008&akid=3886%2E5885482%2EEfPAHZ ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to a 2022 Movement Builder recurring
donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5925?c0=OR_EM_FR_25SP_20230117_1_1.HyHxYf&t=1009&akid=3886%2E5885482%2EEfPAHZ ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5926?c0=OR_EM_FR_25SP_20230117_1_1.-EDTrU&t=1010&akid=3886%2E5885482%2EEfPAHZ ]GIVE ONCE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=3886%2E5885482%2EEfPAHZ

Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a
501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as
charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are
made to support Our Revolution’s general mission and are not designated for

name: =?utf-8?Q?David=20H.=20McCormick?=
subject: How do we save the American Dream?
body:
My new book, Superpower in Peril, offers a battle plan for renewing our country. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/7d0f6dc5ac5f/how-do-we-save-the-american-dream?e=381d477081)
---
| | |
---
| | | **America is in a fight for global primacy.**
With a stalled economy, an open border, China threatening our very way of life, and failed leadership in Washington, the sad fact is we’re falling behind. But there’s nothing inevitable about American decline. What matters is what we do next, and that’s what my new book **Superpower in Peril** is about.
---
| |
---
In it, you’ll find the management and leadership lessons I learned during my time at West Point, as an Army paratrooper, as a CEO and business leader, and at the highest levels of government, and you’ll see a battle plan for how we can win this global contest and ensure America remains the greatest and strongest country in the world by:
* revitalizing the American Dream,
* revolutionizing our economy,
* confronting China,
* reviving the soul of America.

---
| My book comes out March 14th. I hope you'll pre-order your copy today and joine me in the fight to save America.
**PRE-ORDER NOW AT:**

body:
Peter, this is important.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57444997/387973208/-2042826227?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjI5YjNkOS1iZTk2LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nGZdIY3I8STKsfIWafkZqKX_Wb4RuZuQyY3APhwXj-4=)

Peter, will you take a moment to read this longer (but important) email on an extremely personal topic?

Since COVID-19 began, I’ve been heartbroken to see unprecedented levels of violence against Asian and Asian-American people across our country. And it’s getting worse: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57444998/387973209/299171790?amount=3&refcode=MTFC_20230117_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjI5YjNkOS1iZTk2LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nGZdIY3I8STKsfIWafkZqKX_Wb4RuZuQyY3APhwXj-4=) **It’s why I proudly led the fight to pass the COVID-19 Hate Crimes Act which will help document and fight anti-Asian hate crimes.**

[**I won't stop fighting bigotry and racism. But I can’t do it alone. Will you chip in $3 to help me stay in Congress so I can fight for Asian and Asian-American justice in Washington? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57444999/387973210/299171790?amount=3&refcode=MTFC_20230117_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjI5YjNkOS1iZTk2LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nGZdIY3I8STKsfIWafkZqKX_Wb4RuZuQyY3APhwXj-4=) | [500 DONATION GOAL: CHIP IN $3 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57445000/387973211/299171790?amount=3&refcode=MTFC_20230117_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjI5YjNkOS1iZTk2LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nGZdIY3I8STKsfIWafkZqKX_Wb4RuZuQyY3APhwXj-4=)
---
Peter, this fight is personal to me and my family.

During World War II, 120,000 Japanese-Americans were unjustly forced into internment camps -- including my grandparents and parents. Our family still bears the scars of that dark time in our nation’s history.

Today, we see anti-Asian discrimination in different forms. Elderly grandparents, young people, even spa workers have become tragic victims of anti-Asian discrimination.

_I refuse to become blind or complacent to these injustices._

**I’m working to end anti-Asian hatred and discrimination in all its forms.** We can’t ignore the ugly history of anti-Asian racism in our country. We must speak out against injustice and demand protection for ALL marginalized communities.

I just hope you’ll join me...

[**So Peter, I need to ask again: Will you chip in just $3 to help me fight against anti-Asian hate? With your help today, I know we can make a real difference »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57445001/387973212/299171790?amount=3&refcode=MTFC_20230117_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjI5YjNkOS1iZTk2LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nGZdIY3I8STKsfIWafkZqKX_Wb4RuZuQyY3APhwXj-4=)

We must speak out against injustice and demand protection for ALL marginalized communities. I just hope you’ll join me... = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = Thank you. \-- Mark Takano | | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. For six years, Jim Banks has been a trusted partner in the House and I know he will be an even stronger partner in the Senate.

Jim knows that Joe Biden and the Democrats have tanked our economy and opened our border – and he knows what it takes to fight back.

Like me, Jim is a veteran who served in Afghanistan. He knows that we must get toxic propaganda out of our military and out of our schools.

Put simply, Jim Banks is a proven conservative fighter who puts Hoosiers first. **I’m proud to endorse him, and I hope you’ll join me right now – because Democrats are going to do everything they can to stop him.**

clean_body: Join me in supporting his campaign | Hey friend, I’m proud to endorse my friend, and conservative fighter, Jim Banks for Indiana’s open U.S. Senate seat. We need more leaders like Jim – leaders with military experience who will defend our rights and our national security. | For six years, Jim Banks has been a trusted partner in the House and I know he will be an even stronger partner in the Senate. Jim knows that Joe Biden and the Democrats have tanked our economy and opened our border – and he knows what it takes to fight back. Like me, Jim is a veteran who served in Afghanistan. He knows that we must get toxic propaganda out of our military and out of our schools. Put simply, Jim Banks is a proven conservative fighter who puts Hoosiers first. I’m proud to endorse him, and I hope you’ll join me right now – because Democrats are going to do everything they can to stop him. In service, Tom Cotton Paid for by Banks for Senate Copyright (C) 2022 Banks for Senate, All rights reserved.
